Hey team,

With the Biden administration racking up failures in Washington, it's clear as day - we need to elect a Republican President in 2024. And the road to retaking the White House starts right here in Iowa! We're rolling out the welcome mat to our great Republican candidates as they make their case to voters. With your help, Republicans can take back the White House in 2024.

| [**DONATE TO TAKE BACK THE WHITE HOUSE**](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=86a61b865d3c428cb97624e4b69a5404&_e=A64_1Br2c51KmTYI7oDUiBKgg3yZxkfR3wxq8-neQV2LyogRXHOz12167o2la3wioKelE_YciKoh6MqC_4pXFO5H9K9PDjgj4UhlZ1ngJ6Wy1SVwHUtiUFQ1_oxlrnVDdPmtUB2KNi-Y3wXBaMDxTgqxoey0uGmC-ShDeSletxPANMiWXV2uJP9lp2Wn1ijkcUtq16202wd-bYkHLdy7JJuJNsAG1GHBBdIsBmXj4RPTSr2c7nrdE0Wpsx_2Ml5DEg0y8uMcyDyMshhzqMG5Xikcw0SQp0GGKKMsUpULP84iqQq5Sp9dGj1e9O_8ME9PICJVUHtYoMs0mnO2oMOncYfYhWVy7nQa6u7qELqp9iKHAE9kR7F1aObG6ac6UOp1BoR1agJjzQ2cXc-Q_xUBAylIKygO-ox3nR1k7FInHwLV9Z59GNBrKmG6KY8J5ltB64cxE_jz27TQHqc2u3R_-giVxf6VLDfR_etfd-qoYY2Uhi0sktipAzI--qcSEt-BcVnFZg8AqV2GYxLqs3VtpeL8mH5TjFOyu_Sp9rJ50u7t4esLh6HutVINbIY3h2Kt)

**As you know, the road to the White House begins in Iowa** , and Republicans are full speed ahead.

We know campaigning takes resources to hit the campaign trail, attend grassroots events and get out the message. **_[Can you chip in so Republicans can take back the White House?](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=86a61b865d3c428cb97624e4b69a5404&_e=A64_1Br2c51KmTYI7oDUiBKgg3yZxkfR3wxq8-neQV2LyogRXHOz12167o2la3wioKelE_YciKoh6MqC_4pXFO5H9K9PDjgj4UhlZ1ngJ6Wy1SVwHUtiUFQ1_oxlrnVDdPmtUB2KNi-Y3wXBaMDxTgqxoey0uGmC-ShDeSletxPANMiWXV2uJP9lp2Wn1ijkcUtq16202wd-bYkHLdy7JJuJNsAG1GHBBdIsBmXj4RPTSr2c7nrdE0Wpsx_2Ml5DEg0y8uMcyDyMshhzqMG5Xikcw0SQp0GGKKMsUpULP84iqQq5Sp9dGj1e9O_8ME9PICJVUHtYoMs0mnO2oMOncYfYhWVy7nQa6u7qELqp9iKHAE9kR7F1aObG6ac6UOp1BoR1agJjzQ2cXc-Q_xUBA4-WbX32X9GXyqOsDcW5Cmfw1yAU38rQNAUp6Ne0YHWv_hS6lr-CV1o2YsPH7qMKpyLOjnvgxiMOyh3QTEcOiftW28zZznSh1p7miX5h8Z3yn18dslP9kbhpXXbUZtBMG1LBNtF2eZRGT0ERm382VWXCbKqJuTV6ADWut2Pr6lQW)_**

Americans are **FED UP** with the destructive policies of the Biden administration. Consider what's happening on President Biden's watch -- historic inflation, border crisis, Chinese spy balloons, unprecedented $31 trillion federal debt, climbing interest rates, record-breaking household debt and sinking retirement savings.

**[Rush a donation to Win Back the White House and help our incredible GOP leaders pave the way for 2024!](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=86a61b865d3c428cb97624e4b69a5404&_e=A64_1Br2c51KmTYI7oDUiBKgg3yZxkfR3wxq8-neQV2LyogRXHOz12167o2la3wioKelE_YciKoh6MqC_4pXFO5H9K9PDjgj4UhlZ1ngJ6Wy1SVwHUtiUFQ1_oxlrnVDdPmtUB2KNi-Y3wXBaMDxTgqxoey0uGmC-ShDeSletxPANMiWXV2uJP9lp2Wn1ijkcUtq16202wd-bYkHLdy7JJuJNsAG1GHBBdIsBmXj4RPTSr2c7nrdE0Wpsx_2Ml5DEg0y8uMcyDyMshhzqMG5Xikcw0SQp0GGKKMsUpULP84iqQq5Sp9dGj1e9O_8ME9PICJVUHtYoMs0mnO2oMOncYfYhWVy7nQa6u7qELqp9iKHAE9kR7F1aObG6ac6UOp1BoR1agJjzQ2cXc-Q_xUBAzDD8t1J_uqNJaG3rhKlegxCsrTpL-b4E5DB9F_F5BGPZ6Xu8s6GkSOzN94F41Nh4T0eXbTw2VZ_OAlLayZuOIh9oSWdJW_WsS5Gxtuh2UiEzQWLzUd_OGE4GYmPYNbgwyYGmPhhfS0E5gnH-w3WK72am5BnO4fEanuHsIDSvAYB)
**
Americans in East Palestine, Ohio, were left hanging in the wind by the Biden administration after the train derailment. We need Republican leadership in the White House. Our Republican candidates love our country as much as we do, and we need all hands on deck to win.

**[With your help, we can ensure Republicans take back the White House and get America back on track. Chip in $5, $15, or $25 here!](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=86a61b865d3c428cb97624e4b69a5404&_e=A64_1Br2c51KmTYI7oDUiBKgg3yZxkfR3wxq8-neQV2LyogRXHOz12167o2la3wioKelE_YciKoh6MqC_4pXFO5H9K9PDjgj4UhlZ1ngJ6Wy1SVwHUtiUFQ1_oxlrnVDdPmtUB2KNi-Y3wXBaMDxTgqxoey0uGmC-ShDeSletxPANMiWXV2uJP9lp2Wn1ijkcUtq16202wd-bYkHLdy7JJuJNsAG1GHBBdIsBmXj4RPTSr2c7nrdE0Wpsx_2Ml5DEg0y8uMcyDyMshhzqMG5Xikcw0SQp0GGKKMsUpULP84iqQq5Sp9dGj1e9O_8ME9PICJVUHtYoMs0mnO2oMOncYfYhWVy7nQa6u7qELqp9iKHAE9kR7F1aObG6ac6UOp1BoR1agJjzQ2cXc-Q_xUBA3eBEjkWSRfMsCuDS0wj0E7Kt7ygyHyStmp-CUHF0KIC3l39td5HOD7PRk-g_jzNa4zaY9OaWd_eVv7-AyabxgmTZZdaZiGhuAm83jyfdD_XY2dFNwZ9zvYAqxeFD35q2HMHmtMtElXyLwaHHK5aJNiCj6w80I-9A3-Eo15IzO3M)

It’s time to ditch Google and get REAL results, censorship-free
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUEFugzAQfI25FZk1YDhwSJqmUtUeqjbpEQFegxUbKBgl_L42SnuoZK21M7OrmcUiSnkWxTyBOBBFDFUkm0AVQIFRRjmllEES1jTmaV7LHLIqgyQmMUVTKR3KCdF2qr_gJFy_hs1ggq7AKM9zQWspE5nxCmgqMYqpiEBQ1mQ00EVn7TgTtiNwdO-KcukFTn7etXaZL55gx8WasqnMWKm2J-xg61IMfTmYEk0prfDf3WtKIPXqeVimBp3Wb9oQg0ItxiH4izRDb7G3DvofwAnKXivhqM_jqdmZ_e7pZQM7JZzfw-379tHq9SuYCjFeldZqTrm7R7vdw8d3brWSa0H4ngBsYwBbUlgsO1en09u0Pry-m4fn5AytJ-HRVbuO-Ke8Lwm3M3uUH34AsF6GZQ)

| Friend,
I wanted to introduce you to **[Tusk](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUMtugzAQ_BpzCzJrY8OBQ1uUSlV7qKKkRwR-gBUMFIwS_r42SnuoZK21M7OrmVVFwniWUJ4CjWRBoU60iEwBGAgmmGOMCaRxgylneaNzyOoMUoooVrY2faxnpVxnhquape-3WIw26gpKc5XjtOG64bkUjNe6YZSxjKQkIYJFfdE5Ny2IPCE4-ndTeh2kmsO8b926XANBjquzlajtVJt2QKR0TSXHoRptpWylnQzfwytDwIJ6GddZKK8Nm3bEKmlW6xH1i4hxcGpwHvofwAuqoTfSU1bwN-GmU1buYGek91vev--ntt--ormQ0830vVkY9_do93uE-N5tb_RWIP6MAPYxgD0prI5c6vP5Y94O75_28JpeoA0kvPjqtkn9KR9L4v3MAeXlD4OThnM)** , my new one-of-a-kind web browser designed to promote censorship-free content that will restore free speech online.
**Our First Amendment is under attack** from all angles, but perhaps most prevalently online where Big Tech companies like Google censor and silence opposing views and sources.
These browsers have created algorithms that completely hide stories and articles with opposing views...and almost always those from Conservative authors and sources.
**_Just think about what would have happened if news outlets and Big Tech search engines hadn’t censored the Hunter Biden laptop story?_**
That’s why my team and I created **[Tusk, the internet’s ONLY web browser that truly values freedom of speech](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUMtugzAQ_Bq4BZm1jeHAoQ1KKqU9RFXSIwI_wAoGCkYJf18bpT1Ustba2ZnVzMo8TlgaE0aBhCInUMWKhzoHBBhhxBBCGGhUI8KSrFYZpFUKlAQESVPpLlKTlLbV_U1OwvVrxAcTtjnOMppiyqmSMVCqhKCMI4JZxhLCGYRd3lo7zgF-CeDg3l2qpRdy8nrX2mW--QE-LNaUvDJjpZs-wIWtSzH05WBKaUplhf-eXpMAEs-eh2Xi0nH9pg0xUujFOET-Inzoreytg_4HcISy77Rwo7fT8VzcTnvyuoGtFs5v8fh-fDbd-hVOuRjvuuv0nDB3j2a7h4_v3HZarXnAnBA2GcCWFBaLr9Xl8jGtu_ez2R3pFRo_hL2rdh3lH_O5JNrO7FFW_AC_dYWN)** which allows users to choose how they freely and securely search the web.
And now, you can be a leader in our fight to promote free speech online and throughout the world by helping us grow and becoming a true investor in Tusk. | | | [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUMtugzAQ_Bq4BZm1wXDg0JYml_ZQRaRHZPwAKxgomCb8fW2U9lDJWmtnZlczK4s4pVlMaAIkFAUBFise6gIQYIQRRQhhSKIGEZrmjcohYxkkJCBIGqb7SM1S2k4PVzkL128RH03YFUShBiECmHOcYMliLpDgMmcNVxkRJOyLztppCfBTAEf3blKtg5Czn3etXZerJ_BxtabmzExMt0OAS9vUYhzq0dTS1MoK_z28pgGkXr2M68yl0_pNO2Kk0KtxiPxF-DhYOVgH_Q_gBPXQa-GoE87Lir-e6fcOdlo4v-X9635u--0znAsx3XTf6yWl7h7tfg8f37nttdqKgD4HAPsYwJ4UVosvrKre5-3w9mEOp-QCrSfhxVW7TfJP-VgS7Wf2KC1_AGrvhvE)
---
| | | | | [JOIN TUSK](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUMFOhDAQ_Rq4LSlDaeHAQSXrRU2M2fVICp1CsxQQSnbx623J6sGkmWbeezN5b7CIGc9iylOgoSwoiFg1oS6AQEISwgkhCaRRTShnea1yyEQGKQ0oQSN0H6kZ0XZ6uOAsXb9FzWjCrohlmgkm8oyjzIRMhRQKKc0JUiUksLAvOmunJUgeAji6d0W1DhJnP-9auy4XTyTH1ZqqEWYSuh2CpLR1JcehGk2FplJW-u_ulQXAvHoZ17lBp_WbdsSg1KtxCP4izThYHKyD_gdwgmrotXSUrClr31J7-d7BTkvnt7x93T7afvsM50JOV933emHc3aPd7-HjO7e9VlsR8McAYB8D2JPCapOzOJ1e5-3w8m4Oz-kZWk_Ck6t2m_BPeV8S7Wf2KC9_AOEbh5I)

If you want to help take down Big Tech Oligarchs and take back our First Amendment rights on the web, **[don’t miss this opportunity to become an investor in our movement.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUEFugzAQfA3cgsza4OTAoS1NpaqNVEVJj8jGC1jBQMEooa-vjdIeKllr7czsamYxi1O-jRlPgIUqYyDiqgx1BgQooYQTQigkkSSMpztZ7WArtpCwgBE0QrdRNSLaRncXHJXrl6jsTdhkIGkllUxR7ZikyEQKSiaSyFjFJWcibLPG2mEK6EMAe_euWM2dwtHPu9bO08UTdD9bU5TCDELXXUBzKwvVd0VvCjRFZZX_7l7TAFKvnvp5LNFp_aYVMaj0bByCv0jZdxY766D_AZyg6FqtHPV6-T4-HwZzuK5go5Xzm9--bse6XT7DMVPDVbetnlLu7lGv9_DxndtWV0sW8McAYB0DWJPCbOlZnE7v47J5-zCbl-QMtSfhyVW7DPinvC-J1jN7lOc_IVeH5w)**

You’ll be getting in on the ground floor and as we grow with our team of top notch developers and advisors.

**[Take a few minutes to learn more about Tusk](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUMtugzAQ_Bq4FZm1seHAoW2U9NBIraokRwR-gBVsKBgl_H1tlPZQybK1M7PrmZVlSlmeEpYBiUVJoE4Vj3UJCDDCiCGEMGRJgwijRaMKyOscMhIRJE2t-0RNUrpO26uchK_XhA8m7kopcEGbLM9SwmnOC8wU40oq4X_iimdxX3bOjXOEnyPY-3OTarFCTqHfl26Zr4HA-8WZitdmrHVrI7xzTSUGWw2mkqZSToTn4ZVGQIN6HpaJS68NkzbESKEX4xH5i_DBOmmdh_4H8ILK9lp4ilyO-8OJvn2YDey08H539-_7V9uvl3gqxXjTfa9nyvw-2m0fIb5322u1lhF7iQC2NoAtKSwOn-vT6TitT--f5umQnaENJLz6262j_FM-hiTbmgPKdj813YbG)** , our vision, and the unique opportunity to join us as we fight to liberate the internet and provide a safe and truly free search engine for everyone to use.

Yours in Freedom,

Jeff Bermant
CEO, Tusk

name: Gov. Roy Cooper
subject: I just got off the stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
The state of North Carolina is bright and looking to the future.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59784019/395082752/823540626?refcode=ea.4ecc54d4-80bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.4ecc54d4-80bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWNjNTRkNC04MGJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIhbMCpRWmA_LgEIRBcCKpV3gVFxMIyYnDrYCK07O0Q=&emci=68ab38ce-79bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4ecc54d4-80bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
Hello Peter, **Just a few minutes ago, I finished the State of the State address to North Carolina.[You can watch it here if you missed seeing it live.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59784020/395082753/696350460?refcode=ea.4ecc54d4-80bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.4ecc54d4-80bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWNjNTRkNC04MGJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIhbMCpRWmA_LgEIRBcCKpV3gVFxMIyYnDrYCK07O0Q=&emci=68ab38ce-79bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4ecc54d4-80bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** If you weren’t able to watch, here’s the gist of my message: Over and over throughout our state’s history, North Carolinians have been a people who overcame adversity, seized opportunity, and invested in the future. That culture of innovation and determination makes our state the very best place to live, learn, work, and raise a family — my wife Kristin and I should know. It’s made North Carolina a global leader in the clean energy economy, endowed us with the enduring legacy of the first public university in the nation, and made us the number one state in the country for business in 2022. The dedicated, determined, diverse people who make up our workforce are the foundation of that success, and my commitment to serve them — and all North Carolinians — is what drives our administration’s plans for the future. **The state of our state is brighter than ever. After emerging from challenging years stronger and more resilient, we’re looking ahead.** We’ll work together to expand access to health care coverage, improve infrastructure, protect our people from gun violence, and continue leading the way on enacting pro-business solutions to our climate crisis. I’m gratified that legislators have now agreed to expand Medicaid, which is the path forward for keeping North Carolinians healthy. We can and must pass it immediately, to cover more than 600,000 folks who need good quality health care. Our state can’t work if workers can’t get the medical care they need to stay on the job. We also know that our future success depends upon giving the next generation the start they deserve. That’s why we’re investing in child care centers and public schools, and I hope that we can all come together to support every student from every walk of life. That includes supporting students who are facing challenges with their mental health. The youth mental health crisis cannot be ignored, and I’ve already directed tens of millions of federal dollars into the effort to fight it. We’ll continue to do everything we can to set our children up for success. **Peter, I am glad to have you with me as a partner in our efforts to ensure the doors of opportunity are wide open in North Carolina, bursting with possibility for everyone.[Tonight, I’m asking you to commit to a donation of just $10 to help me further our progress and invest in our future. Click here to join me >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59784021/395082754/435245919?amount=10&refcode=ea.4ecc54d4-80bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.4ecc54d4-80bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWNjNTRkNC04MGJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIhbMCpRWmA_LgEIRBcCKpV3gVFxMIyYnDrYCK07O0Q=)** | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59784022/395082755/435245919?amount=10&refcode=ea.4ecc54d4-80bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.4ecc54d4-80bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWNjNTRkNC04MGJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIhbMCpRWmA_LgEIRBcCKpV3gVFxMIyYnDrYCK07O0Q=)
---
Thank you so very much for your trust in me and your shared commitment to our state,
Roy Cooper

Hi Peter, I wanted to share some exciting news with you.

The basic foundation of the American Dream is that if you put in good, honest, hard work, you will be able to live a good life in this country – _but with rising costs and an uncertain economy,_that equation is broken_ for working class people._

**That’s why last week I joined my colleagues in introducing the bipartisan _Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act_ **– which strengthens protections for workers’ right to organize a union and bargain for higher wages, better benefits, and safer working conditions.

As a former union member myself, I’ve seen firsthand how collective bargaining puts the power back into the hands of our workers. For generations, our nation's labor unions have ensured workers receive a fair share of the profits they produce.

**I am proud to be an original cosponsor of the _PRO Act_ , which will help restore the balance and ensure that in America, hard work pays off.**

I'm eager to continue working and delivering for the hard working families of Colorado’s 8th district. Thank you for your support, Peter.

Sincerely,

Yadira

**Deadline:** March 7 at 11:59 PM [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59785289/395096282/721949173?ms=EM_PET_230306JF_N_PET_FULL_11_NG_N_B2&refcode=EM_PET_230306JF_N_PET_FULL_11_NG_N_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzE3ZWM5Yi04NWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abIwbEBShXwXU0cxJVieHh_VXFNewYiwmLbWczsDCVo=&emci=94de8906-73bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6c17ec9b-85bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120)

_**We're 1,617 signatures from our goal. Please add your name before our deadline tomorrow night!**_

_(Jennifer's original message follows below)_
* * *
Have you ever made an online purchase — maybe for food delivery, clothing, a concert ticket, or a hotel reservation — and wondered afterward why the charge was just a little higher than advertised?

Odds are, you've been charged with a "junk fee" many times in your life. That's what we call the additional (and often hidden) charges that a wide range of lenders and vendors apply to transactions.

**I was heartened during last month's State of the Union to see President Biden call for action to protect consumers and crack down on the widespread application of junk fees.** [**If you agree that corporations should stop price-gouging folks without their knowledge, please sign on to help us rally support for legislation that will reduce junk fees for millions of Americans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59785290/395096283/721949173?ms=EM_PET_230306JF_N_PET_FULL_11_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230306JF_N_PET_FULL_11_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzE3ZWM5Yi04NWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abIwbEBShXwXU0cxJVieHh_VXFNewYiwmLbWczsDCVo=&emci=94de8906-73bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6c17ec9b-85bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120)
[Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59785291/395096284/721949173?ms=EM_PET_230306JF_N_PET_FULL_11_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230306JF_N_PET_FULL_11_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzE3ZWM5Yi04NWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abIwbEBShXwXU0cxJVieHh_VXFNewYiwmLbWczsDCVo=&emci=94de8906-73bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6c17ec9b-85bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120)
The types of transactions that incur junk fees are inescapable in modern life. And so many still struggle with the daily cost of living, the impact of an extra charge here and an extra charge there does add up.

We can help millions of people if we put firmer guardrails in place against junk fees. But I can guarantee you that big special interests are going to fight us tooth and nail.

That's why we need as many Virginians/supporters as possible to make their voices heard and demand that Congress serve the people and not the special interests.

[**Please add your name now and help us reach 7,500 signatures by Tuesday →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59785292/395096285/721949173?ms=EM_PET_230306JF_N_PET_FULL_11_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230306JF_N_PET_FULL_11_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzE3ZWM5Yi04NWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abIwbEBShXwXU0cxJVieHh_VXFNewYiwmLbWczsDCVo=&emci=94de8906-73bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6c17ec9b-85bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120)

Thank you,

Jennifer

**Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59785293/395096286/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230306JF_N_PET_FULL_11_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzE3ZWM5Yi04NWJjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abIwbEBShXwXU0cxJVieHh_VXFNewYiwmLbWczsDCVo=)****

name: Maurice Mitchell, Working Families Party
subject: The news from Chicago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
If you haven't heard yet: last week, Brandon Johnson, the movement candidate for Mayor of Chicago, won a slot in the April runoff — surpassing a wide field of candidates including incumbent Mayor Lori Lightfoot. | | | Hi, Peter. I hope you’ve been following the news from Chicago. **If you haven't heard yet: last week, Brandon Johnson, the movement candidate for Mayor of Chicago, won a slot in the April runoff — surpassing a wide field of candidates including incumbent Mayor Lori Lightfoot.** Brandon’s performance is energizing proof of a decade of political power building — and also the starting bell to one of the most important and ideologically high-stakes sprints in recent memory, between two very different visions of our future. In April, Brandon will face off against Paul Vallas, a conservative who has called himself “more of a Republican than a Democrat,” and is one of the leading architects of the school privatization movement that has swept major cities — and especially Black and brown communities — over the last 20 years. **I think it’s worth grounding this moment in a bit of history. But before I do, I have to ask:[Can you split a contribution of $10 between Brandon Johnson’s campaign and our allies at United Working Families to help turn out voters in these next few weeks and win on April 4th?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUKklyJg-NweIzOF_nSdOc47GNpny2RIgyftShUflF8hPuM1esSx64tnbg1qNKxyvn6hvLY3t2BeUImngxMeqacT3ffy-USjOjJNY_j9q6p6Bc1sLVAvkAT-nv_EOpNi9_EYKuCkmNFwDgc8LjJZjDfzErgCt0cO86l_DL5VQ_pSgKqYZKijbuA4yw1X0CXweJjjEp2UTtdjBVlTQsFTnvwmViMF2Sd1tYg4DICgWUyvDUM2qTmRLMvzs_YOePyvZlSk8fMmO11Yue5P4pDuLjQN0WkHpPDw7N561zjEPLnAFURWCHjW1i7U9c1NGr5npw/3ua/BZc7yhrDTJyLLOYFfvscBw/h0/ybvYSkDX4LkBp4AQFdJCIR9p8NwS2OR2rwrPhhvnVq0)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUKklyJg-NweIzOF_nSdOc47GNpny2RIgyftShUflF8hPuM1esSx64tnbg1qNKxyvn66HcHSVtc1cwP1cnPrcnvci3tzoPu3ZSH22admAgmvaAQqA7T9N8w4qTncJRipYaFp-_jM-6AmO4zNt14lj-v-hpYE0OneW63KN6kV81zdRpXd30gWl8NFpXQ5XIGih8EOpXKL5pcyQlTzGc2OAVzUBno0PckSV_wdg73mFaFrsavJVBmb10loKd0i1AE_td0xQWtbMeTkWWJMgfxbN7GP45h-wEq7gOZHDjfxnWhcFYF5lRA1f5IUeDgrVpDTDe/3ua/BZc7yhrDTJyLLOYFfvscBw/h1/9Xm_TRrj4OCuepDuwNmb4rr0pQYYqDAfMCvBacMiByU)** A decade ago, Brandon Johnson was a brand new organizer with the Chicago Teachers Union. He was fresh off the historic 2012 Chicago Teachers strike that fought not just for fair pay for teachers, but also for smaller class sizes, and for music and arts in every community. **Out of the energy of that strike, he became a founding member of United Working Families** , WFP’s local partner in Chicago, and a coalition of labor and community leaders seeking to build a multiracial working class political movement strong enough to take power from the vaunted Chicago machine, and from the big developers, the school privatizers, and the forces of neoliberalism. During that same time, Paul Vallas was the Superintendent of Schools in Bridgeport, Connecticut, where he wound up after overseeing Chicago Public Schools, leading dramatic experiments with privatization in Philadelphia, and doing a stint privatizing the entire school district in Post-Katrina New Orleans. That year, the Connecticut Working Families Party led a coalition of parents, teachers and community members to elect a new school board majority in Bridgeport, which ran Paul out of town. **All of that is to say, the upcoming contest is a poignant one — and a crucial choice point.** In the last few years, we’ve seen how the outcome of big city races can shape the national conversation. Just take Eric Adams’ victory in New York City — and how that was read nationally as a lurch to the right. We all saw first hand how Adams’ right-wing message on crime contributed to undermining Democrats in New York, who lost 5 battleground Congressional seats, and with it, control of Congress. Brandon is running on a vision of making Chicago work for the many. He’s running on a vision of “treatment, not trauma,” and taxing the wealthy to pay for basic services that lift up and protect communities. He’s built a mulitracial base that picked up votes in every part of the city. His election over a conservative like Vallas would swing that narrative pendulum in the opposite direction. Brandon is a former public school teacher and union organizer who has stood with our movements time and again. He’s a battle-tested leader committed to making Chicago a city where everyone can thrive. **The organizers responsible for Brandon’s improbable surge are ready to throw down over the next four weeks and finish the job. But they need us to have their backs.[Will you rush a split contribution of $10 to elect former public school teacher and CTU organizer Brandon Johnson as Chicago’s next Mayor? clean_body: If you haven't heard yet: last week, Brandon Johnson, the movement candidate for Mayor of Chicago, won a slot in the April runoff — surpassing a wide field of candidates including incumbent Mayor Lori Lightfoot. | | | Hi, Peter. I hope you’ve been following the news from Chicago. If you haven't heard yet: last week, Brandon Johnson, the movement candidate for Mayor of Chicago, won a slot in the April runoff — surpassing a wide field of candidates including incumbent Mayor Lori Lightfoot. Brandon’s performance is energizing proof of a decade of political power building — and also the starting bell to one of the most important and ideologically high-stakes sprints in recent memory, between two very different visions of our future. In April, Brandon will face off against Paul Vallas, a conservative who has called himself “more of a Republican than a Democrat,” and is one of the leading architects of the school privatization movement that has swept major cities — and especially Black and brown communities — over the last 20 years. I think it’s worth grounding this moment in a bit of history. But before I do, I have to ask: A decade ago, Brandon Johnson was a brand new organizer with the Chicago Teachers Union. He was fresh off the historic 2012 Chicago Teachers strike that fought not just for fair pay for teachers, but also for smaller class sizes, and for music and arts in every community. Out of the energy of that strike, he became a founding member of United Working Families , WFP’s local partner in Chicago, and a coalition of labor and community leaders seeking to build a multiracial working class political movement strong enough to take power from the vaunted Chicago machine, and from the big developers, the school privatizers, and the forces of neoliberalism. During that same time, Paul Vallas was the Superintendent of Schools in Bridgeport, Connecticut, where he wound up after overseeing Chicago Public Schools, leading dramatic experiments with privatization in Philadelphia, and doing a stint privatizing the entire school district in Post-Katrina New Orleans. That year, the Connecticut Working Families Party led a coalition of parents, teachers and community members to elect a new school board majority in Bridgeport, which ran Paul out of town. All of that is to say, the upcoming contest is a poignant one — and a crucial choice point. In the last few years, we’ve seen how the outcome of big city races can shape the national conversation. Just take Eric Adams’ victory in New York City — and how that was read nationally as a lurch to the right. We all saw first hand how Adams’ right-wing message on crime contributed to undermining Democrats in New York, who lost 5 battleground Congressional seats, and with it, control of Congress. Brandon is running on a vision of making Chicago work for the many. He’s running on a vision of “treatment, not trauma,” and taxing the wealthy to pay for basic services that lift up and protect communities. He’s built a mulitracial base that picked up votes in every part of the city. His election over a conservative like Vallas would swing that narrative pendulum in the opposite direction. Brandon is a former public school teacher and union organizer who has stood with our movements time and again. He’s a battle-tested leader committed to making Chicago a city where everyone can thrive. The organizers responsible for Brandon’s improbable surge are ready to throw down over the next four weeks and finish the job. But they need us to have their backs. In love and radical solidarity, Maurice Mitchell National Director Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. name: =?utf-8?Q?Lori=20Chavez=2DDeRemer?=
subject: Parental Bill of Rights
body:
Putting Parents and Students First | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b7bc0764877c/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8119151?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=c1d6dce6d6&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Peter,

_**As a member of the Committee on Education and the Workforce, I am thrilled to announce that I have recently signed onto the Parents Bill of Rights as a cosponsor. This proposal seeks to promote children’s well-being and success by empowering parents and ensuring they have a seat at the table in their child’s education.**_
---
| [ ](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=f3ed83b85c&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| As a mother of two, I understand firsthand the importance of parental involvement in education. No one understands a child's interests and needs better than their parents, and the Parents Bill of Rights ensures that parents can speak up without fear of retaliation. This bill contains five key pillars that seek to empower parents and keep children safe:
* Parents have the right to know what their children are being taught.
* Parents have the right to be heard.
* Parents have the right to see the school's budget and spending.
* Parents have the right to protect their child's privacy.
* Parents have the right to keep their children safe.

These pillars are crucial to ensuring that parents are aware of what their children are being taught and are able to provide input and feedback. By supporting the Parents Bill of Rights, we can help to create a more transparent and equitable education system that puts the needs of parents and students first.

I believe in the power of parental involvement to drive student success. However, I also recognize that this is a bipartisan issue that affects families across the political spectrum. _**That's why I'm committed to working with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to ensure that every parent has a voice in their child's education.**_

Together, we can create a brighter future for our children and families.

Thank you,

[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=efa065d6d2&e=c87c5d8d97)
Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Congresswoman OR-05
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=d087161574&e=c87c5d8d97 "CONTRIBUTE")
---
| [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=199152926d&e=c87c5d8d97)
---

name: Larry Hogan
subject: I've only just begun to fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by An America United
body:
| | | Dear friend, You may have already heard, but after careful consideration, I have decided to not seek the Republican nomination for President. I’m not a career politician, and that has never been my aspiration. However, I will continue to stay in the fight. Our country is way off track and in desperate need of new leadership. With your support, we already showed a better path forward. Together, we cut taxes and regulations eight years in a row, turned a record deficit into a record surplus, stood behind our brave police, and led the charge against elitist higher education policies. I will stand with anyone who shares a common sense conservative vision for the Republican Party and can help get us back to winning elections again. Though I will not be a candidate for my party’s nomination for president, I’ve only just begun fighting for our future. I hope you will continue to stand with me. Thank you,Larry Hogan
---
| |

body:
Kevin McCarthy raised an astounding $12.3 million from a collection of donors from Big Pharma, the fossil fuel industry, and other corporate interests.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59785621/395100010/-648933138?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230206_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhZjVjOWUwLThkYmMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nEJJhekEI8baNzbfZh0_wS4PxouBbWLTt02kw8K1_oQ=) Peter —

In a single night last month, Kevin McCarthy raised an astounding **$12.3 million** from a collection of donors from Big Pharma, the fossil fuel industry, and other corporate interests.

It just goes to show everything that’s broken in Washington.

We have a terrible system of campaign finance that has allowed the rich and powerful to buy off our elections ever since the Supreme Court’s 2010 decision in _Citizens United v. FEC._

I’m not accepting corporate PAC money in this race, but if we’re going to reach every voter in California and compete with McCarthy and the MAGA Republican Party’s millions, then I’m going to need your help right now:

[**Please, before our FEC fundraising deadline, can you pitch in $10 or any amount to support our campaign and UniteDemocrats today and reject the corrupting influence of money in politics that allows Kevin McCarthy to raise $12.3 million in a single night?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59785622/395100011/-648933138?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230206_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhZjVjOWUwLThkYmMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nEJJhekEI8baNzbfZh0_wS4PxouBbWLTt02kw8K1_oQ=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59785628/395100017/-648933138?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230206_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhZjVjOWUwLThkYmMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nEJJhekEI8baNzbfZh0_wS4PxouBbWLTt02kw8K1_oQ=)

clean_body: Kevin McCarthy raised an astounding $12.3 million from a collection of donors from Big Pharma, the fossil fuel industry, and other corporate interests. | = Peter — In a single night last month, Kevin McCarthy raised an astounding $12.3 million from a collection of donors from Big Pharma, the fossil fuel industry, and other corporate interests. It just goes to show everything that’s broken in Washington. We have a terrible system of campaign finance that has allowed the rich and powerful to buy off our elections ever since the Supreme Court’s 2010 decision in Citizens United v. FEC. I’m not accepting corporate PAC money in this race, but if we’re going to reach every voter in California and compete with McCarthy and the MAGA Republican Party’s millions, then I’m going to need your help right now: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | = = = Thanks team, — Adam | | Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC (www.unitedemocrats.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 514 Daniels St., #286, Raleigh, NC 27605 to receive fewer emails. to update your information. subject: 2023 Republican Action Conference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Introducing the RAC Panels: Come and learn aboout campaigning - Join us at the Republican Action Conference!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: LCV Rapid Response
subject: URGENT: HORRIFYING dirty energy bill advancing in the House. We need to respond:
body:
__TRIPLE MATCH: Active |
---

|
DEVELOPING... House Republicans are officially cobbling together a _devastating_ dirty energy bill from a grab bag of Big Polluter requests. Hearings and markups are underway now, and it looks like a floor vote on a package could come soon. We need to act quickly -- **the various bills they 've released would set environmental policy back _decades_ if they became law.**

Provisions include gutting environmental review, opening up public lands and waters to massive new drilling operations, and putting fossil fuel projects on the fast track to approval, tying the Biden administration's hands. _****_

Fighting this will come down to grassroots pressure and debunking misinformation from polluters and their cronies. Campaigning. Flooding House and Senate office with calls, letters, and emails. Meetings with House champions and Senate leaders. We need to do all of that and more to ensure these damaging policies go nowhere and demand a clean energy future.____

**We need your help.** We need to raise $40,000 to power our campaign. A group of donors has agreed to TRIPLE MATCH all gifts if you give today. ****

So we're asking: [Help power our fight to protect our environment from dirty energy and fossil fuels. Give right now and your support will go 3X as far to protect our climate and our future. Even $5 helps.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

I can't overstate how bad this could be, Peter. House Republicans are shopping a laundry list of giveaways to the fossil fuel industry.

Here's a quick look at what they're proposing:
* **Gut environmental review.** Their bill would severely roll back the National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA), the law that requires environmental impact studies for projects like pipelines, highways, and drilling on public lands -- and allows affected communities to give input on these projects.
* **Massively expand oil and gas drilling.** Republicans' plan would immediately resurrect drilling leases canceled by the Biden administration. From there, it would open up even more public lands and waters for drilling and mining... at a steep discount.
* **Greenlight dirty oil pipelines.** Their plan could restart construction of the Keystone XL pipeline, parts of whose namesake existing pipeline have had three major oil spills in just five years. It most recently leaked half a million gallons of oil into a Kansas creek in December. Their plan would allow this pipeline extension and other new dangerous pipelines to run through our communities.

|
---
**[**TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT:
STOP THE GOP'S
DIRTY ENERGY BILL >>**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

We need to step up our grassroots campaigning -- our climate and health cannot afford extremist Republican attempts to ramp up drilling. Instead, we need to EXPAND clean energy and PROTECT the clean air and clean water our communities depend on.

But that'll only happen when we hear from people like you -- people who know how high the stakes are for people and the planet. We can't afford to wait.

[Please, make a gift right now to stop this dirty energy bill from becoming law. For a limited time, your support will make THREE TIMES the impact, thanks to a group of committed environmental donors who are matching all gifts -- meaning a gift of just $5 becomes $15 when you give right now.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Thanks for everything that you do. We'll be in touch soon with more opportunities to fight for a cleaner future.

Onward,

LCV Rapid Response Team
Alex, Annie, and Norita

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9262136&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDE3MDU1NgS2&spReportId=MTcwMDE3MDU1NgS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9262136&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDE3MDU1NgS2&spReportId=MTcwMDE3MDU1NgS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |

subject: Lori is focused on improving transportation and infrastructure
body:
Follow her - Stay up to date! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8b579160db14/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8118263?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=272e660954&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Peter,

_**Lori is fighting to improve transportation and infrastructure across Oregon and America.**_

One of Lori's main focuses while serving the 5th District is to _**ensure that transportation and infrastructure assets meet the needs of our communities, are safe and reliable, and can keep our economy running smoothly and effectively. **_

Lori is working hard in Congress to secure funding for infrastructure improvements that will benefit our communities. She is fighting for initiatives that support the modernization of our transportation systems and investing in critical infrastructure projects that will create jobs and stimulate economic growth.

_**To stay up-to-date on Lori’s progress you can follow her on her Social Media accounts.**_

You will have the opportunity to learn more about Lori's efforts to improve our transportation and infrastructure systems and stay informed on the important issues impacting our community.
---
| ** [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=09deff806f&e=c87c5d8d97)[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=e9cfc57b00&e=c87c5d8d97)[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=6601c379a4&e=c87c5d8d97)**

---
| Follow Lori and be a part of her efforts to create a safer, more reliable transportation system that benefits all Oregonians.

Thank you,

Team Lori

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgsqm4rip6em2iou9iriu3164jm3m8174en9pqag_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o72cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2j5f6bnpn1ekrbps2tppsfptfqlivntdi1934po_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o72cdh2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbmk5hjq0f8i8i3akf5s8s0atsdjttp5k79vh4b8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o72cdh2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z6vgljanfctiduulp133kqoepoupncvq3lfrrgqo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvve0o3088gdn6prjg0m3bp4ek8269kjhnjgaad8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o72cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times.

# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs149rm0k5jd8upmd5u2va4uii9vi6ofa1r92eh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o71c9h2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuo4t8fcp6kf0lqb1lko3cce5menqo9spu9nla70_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o71c9h2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqnmtopidm7mo8ekirrpgnm6v7d6gbppd6j5r2r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o71c9h2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkufjr34nu895lmheushfndu0kclt0m926l74ov8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o71c9h2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0qleciovncumg1b03flcln5fk0hm32j5jbcldr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o71c9h2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbk6f27ok1p4khtiiepsf6cvfknfc65pa4lcu050_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o71c9h2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs7p3ilb9nngchul0lh4hb02gdurqdqe74c0nn10_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o71c9h2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
[**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmhjp7ip2220erokfg5al1m1f45oi31edl4s8ijo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o71c9h2bs)

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh8tro2r5u6lmgtakah7d0dade1a15dv78tkqh28_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o71c9h2bs).

clean_body: We live in uncertain times. The Food Crisis of 2023 We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling . Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because: 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food is designed to last for 25 years , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too. You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food." And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out. You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest! And that's not all, because... FREE Bonus #1: because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you 2 of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. People love these kits. It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... FREE Bonus #2: You'll get a Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. FREE Bonus #3: You also get their Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater. With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. FREE Bonus #4: You'll also get an Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library. With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... FREE Bonus #5: You also get their Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. FREE Bonus #6: You also get Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee. Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. FREE Bonus #7: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... FREE Bonus #8: You also get $25 OFF your next purchase. This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #9: You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order! It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters More Raving Reviews From Customers! | | Rory H. I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things. ---|--- | Billy H. Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- Real reviews from real customers. name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj6ctjr0hth5od9vhbvahta61k8ha6pkv6aad740_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o74cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv6h3sldm6ve9juucr3u3qdh9p3rl9ol5r6it69o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o74cjh2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zub0bt37q9f7v682otvt15h7k3bvfj41v1p804q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o74cjh2bs) [NO](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn2mprho5uo7n2suqsmbc0ukbtgtlinr2val2rpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o74cjh2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2keqchua8gf6p415nt7rk4jevnpqrh0djvs5gag_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o74cjh2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](https://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zp6nhm73262rv9o49rbmjlkhkl8c7o40hcu7i5po).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1bhoaqd1gehk94524blcbgnsqjamlfduk7c21h8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c3i61or0shie49fg)
