name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Bottom-up, grassroots support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z87p78be7ke52q2ak713vlu3u9ne1l62336cgen8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o72c5h2bs)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zascj6nkrq84m8tle3asil6916p9461o2h37eu2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o72c5h2bs)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvp7v2bk091c9ighsqdfgbf31d6t9a1glfsi9soo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o72c5h2bs)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbsb2pmeshfjmnpe05m3hl220gd19e549vl075d0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o72c5h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8ptl1pb20gtmbgeceda0vtvl27r57dbbcua6p60_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o72c5h2bs)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER ->**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuefolc0aqldv5kdtss5j02ttvk3ca27phm2bhe0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o72c5h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjjcg4rp2et8on0rjiu6v3r5chvjann672f2h1cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o72c5h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbd5t4s266903p4epq566ih3q2laiorcusbngr0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o72c5h2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3l7s48s654o7h3j50vc0ltdbojj9r93vkejoifo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o72c5h2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5ut96m168jdfjqv4uo1pdtv15n8tdkipapt6vso_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge6o72c5h2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: 2023 Membership Services
subject: Never can say goodbye…renew today >>>We’re giving you one more chance to stay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgtdjb2s3jfb0l1jcgh8mlh26ohl1cm1oi1bds6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge1or4cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpuufolpi1llg7u941t8p7e27qjg55684euk70mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge1or4cdh2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd4idn0in6ud6gkdapn6d4bfosg6ge8105j6ogk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge1or4cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztaqvph7n68431hhibu9bthrb3n497er9mr0935o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shge1or4cdh2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651136%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zwhTNngIjOQm7Aths8eynQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651137%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QVkh%2fxX2CWayStn8Icbstw&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651137%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QVkh%2fxX2CWayStn8Icbstw&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1702%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=9XOkFs3KFKInFX7BspynpQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1702%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=9XOkFs3KFKInFX7BspynpQ&sysid=1)

name: Ret. Navy SEALs Zinke, Van Orden, and Crane
subject: You have (3) unread messages
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
>We have messages from three Navy SEALs who are serving the American people in Congress:

|
---
| | | **Friend, we have messages from three Navy SEALs who are serving the American people in Congress:**
"I was first elected to the House in 2014, and then I served as Secretary of the Interior in 2017, promoting energy independence and land conservation. I'm back in the House, but this time, I have some fellow SEALs to help me shake things up. My last race was separated by 3%, and I need resources to hold onto this seat."

**- Ryan Zinke**

"I grew up on food stamps, but my mom taught me how to pull myself up by the bootstraps. I enlisted in the Navy and became a Navy SEAL, retiring as a senior chief. The first time I ran for the House, I lost, but my mom didn't raise a quitter, so once again, I pulled myself up by the bootstraps and won in 2022. It's the first time it's flipped blue in over 25 years, and I'm going to need all the help I can get to keep it red."

**- Derrick Van Orden**

"I've been on five war-time deployments, defending our way of life against some of the worst odds. I'm also a small business owner, so I know the burden that Joe Biden's economic policies have put on America's mom and pop shops across the country. I'm from Arizona where fewer and fewer Republicans are able to win each year, and I need your help to secure a win for conservatives next time around."

**- Eli Crane**
**[These Navy SEALs are in races that will cost serious money, so we are pleading with you to split a donation between these three strong conservatives who bravely served our country and are serving our country again in the U.S. House of Representatives:](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z20i2sbr0f3h5b1c37aimia4l8g03umd2hqr3j5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0shie0ob4cdh2bs "These Navy SEALs are in races that will cost serious money, so we are pleading with you to split a donation between these three strong conservatives who bravely served our country and are serving our country again in the U.S. House of Representatives:")**

subject: You have (3) unread messages

body:
>We have messages from three Navy SEALs who are serving the American people in Congress:

|
---
| | | **Friend, we have messages from three Navy SEALs who are serving the American people in Congress:**
"I was first elected to the House in 2014, and then I served as Secretary of the Interior in 2017, promoting energy independence and land conservation. I'm back in the House, but this time, I have some fellow SEALs to help me shake things up. My last race was separated by 3%, and I need resources to hold onto this seat."

**- Ryan Zinke**

"I grew up on food stamps, but my mom taught me how to pull myself up by the bootstraps. I enlisted in the Navy and became a Navy SEAL, retiring as a senior chief. The first time I ran for the House, I lost, but my mom didn't raise a quitter, so once again, I pulled myself up by the bootstraps and won in 2022. It's the first time it's flipped blue in over 25 years, and I'm going to need all the help I can get to keep it red."

**- Derrick Van Orden**

"I've been on five war-time deployments, defending our way of life against some of the worst odds. I'm also a small business owner, so I know the burden that Joe Biden's economic policies have put on America's mom and pop shops across the country. I'm from Arizona where fewer and fewer Republicans are able to win each year, and I need your help to secure a win for conservatives next time around."

name: Alan Keck
subject: I’m gonna burst some bubbles…
body:
...because we’re told we can’t support teachers and also believe parents should have a role in what our kids are taught.
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pljhrhk-dytiuyidkd-r/) _**I 'm gonna burst some bubbles...**_because we're told as Republicans that we can't support teachers and also believe parents should have a role in what our kids are taught. We're told that if you don't believe in an all powerful teachers union, that you don't support the people working with our kids every day in the classroom. _**Let me tell you, that 's wrong.**_ _**[_In just 120 seconds I lay out my Keck Game Plan for education -my plan to fix Kentucky schools in my first term as your next governor._](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pljhrhk-dytiuyidkd-j/)**_ [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pljhrhk-dytiuyidkd-t/) _You know, I 'm a product of Kentucky public schools, **a really proud one.** My wife Tiffany went to Kentucky public schools and now our three beautiful daughters do as well-**and we love their teachers. **__**However, that doesn 't mean I'm gonna shy away from or apologize for saying that I'd like to know what they're being taught.**__So, we 're going to bust this paradigm in Kentucky that you can't have it both ways-that you can't support both parents and teachers._
### Kentucky can have the best education system in America-we can and should be leading the nation, but instead, with our schools ranking 43rd in the nation, _it 's clear something isn't working in Frankfort. _
_**But we can 't go from the bottom to the top if we don't invest in our schools, invest in our teachers and invest in our students. **_So, let's get to the specifics no other candidate will give you. My Keck Game Plan for Kentucky goes farther than anyone else. [__**Read through my entire Keck Game Plan here.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pljhrhk-dytiuyidkd-i/)
### 1️⃣ **Invest in public and private programs for pre-K and early literacy.**
Research consistently shows investing earlier in a child's educational journey produces better outcomes and reduces dependency on social programs in the future. [__**Read more here.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pljhrhk-dytiuyidkd-d/)
### 2️⃣ **Increase teacher pay, protect pensions and make student teaching a paid internship.**
We will make strategic investments in teacher salaries and incentives to attract people to the profession and ensure they remain invested in preparing our young people for the future. [__**Read more here.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pljhrhk-dytiuyidkd-h/)
### 3️⃣ **Change the testing culture.**
Teachers should be empowered to develop creative solutions for project-based learning instead of being pressured to teach to the standardized test. This will help students identify career pathways sooner and aid Kentucky's workforce crisis. [__**Read more here.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pljhrhk-dytiuyidkd-k/)
### 4️⃣ **Fund more student support personnel positions.**
By increasing the number of student support personnel, we equip our schools with trained experts to handle important behavior and mental health issues for our children while freeing our teachers to focus on classroom instruction. [__**Read more here.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pljhrhk-dytiuyidkd-u/)
### 5️⃣ **Promote personal responsibility in the classroom.**
We need to spend more time teaching workforce and life skills -- like technical trades and financial literacy -- to ensure students are equipped for adulthood. [__**Read more here.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pljhrhk-dytiuyidkd-o/)[__**That 's how we start, but I need your help to get across the finish line.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pljhrhk-dytiuyidkd-b/) I'm just over 24 hours from taking the debate stage for the very first time, and I'd love to know that you're in our corner. [__**I 've said it before, and I'll say it again, any donation of your time, talent or treasure truly does make this campaign hum. **__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pljhrhk-dytiuyidkd-n/)I can't travel the Commonwealth spreading our commonsense message without you. [__**So, would you chip in just $5, $10 or $25 to buy our volunteers a pizza, or buy a gallon of gas to support us as we travel the state?**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pljhrhk-dytiuyidkd-p/)[__**Your support, no matter the size, goes farther than you might think**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pljhrhk-dytiuyidkd-x/)-and for every bit of support, for every supporter we bring into our corner, we take one step closer to making Kentucky Win again-_**not just for our generation, but the next.**_ God Bless. [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pljhrhk-dytiuyidkd-m/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pljhrhk-dytiuyidkd-c/) Alan Keck ### | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-u-pljhrhk-dytiuyidkd-q/)
---

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: VETO anti-conservative, anti-Republican HB 401
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| House Bill 401, which has been deemed the “Anti-Tesla Bill”, has now passed both chambers and is headed to the Governor’s desk for signature. The bill isn’t only Anti-Tesla, but also Anti-Free Market, Anti-Conservative, and in complete opposition to our Republican Party Platform. The bill is nothing more than a protectionist bill.[Send Gov. Reeves a message - VETO anti-conservative, anti-Republican HB 401](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/LQsWMR-3miiNxc8CojIj_w)Protectionism, of course, is the act of using the government to protect your business or industry from competition. Instead of actually providing the best product or service at the best price, to contend in the marketplace, many businesses and industries pay to play by hiring lobbyists and turning to the power of the government to control their competition.Real conservatives know that competition in the market place is a good thing. Competition pushes businesses to cut costs, advances innovation, drives development of new processes and products, and it allows manufacturers to bring products to the consumer at a lower cost. Competition in the market place is good for everyone, except, of course, those businesses that don’t want to compete in a free market.Let’s go to the[ _platform_](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/TFzTQv1OvGKbLNm6HxfdSw) and see what it says about **Free Markets**. The MS GOP platform, which we as MS Republicans are supposed to believe in, says:**Preamble**
> _“The Mississippi Republican Party fundamentally believes in the conservative principles of individual freedom, personal responsibility, and**free market economic** policies...”_
**Economic Prosperity**
> _“We believe that**free enterprise** will thrive, flourish and benefit more people through a framework of low taxes and sensible but not overburdening regulations, which both encourages the expansion of existing businesses while also attracts new companies to locate in Mississippi.”_
**Taxes**
> _“Mississippi Republicans believe that people, not government, know best how to spend their own money. When people keep more of their hard-earned money, jobs and economic growth will flourish in the**free market system**.”_
**Healthcare** :
> _“We can have an affordable, accessible and quality health care system by empowering individuals and families,**promoting free-market competition** and embracing the benefits of technology, innovation...”_
**Energy**
> _“Continued technological developments will increase their economic viability in the**free market.** ”_
Five different times, it says in the platform that we believe in free markets, meaning we want less government in the market place. The MS GOP platform also references competition three different times in a positive way, illustrating that we as Republicans believe in letting business compete in a free market.Yet only 9 Republicans in the House and 11 Republicans in the Senate, out of the 112 Republicans in both chambers, voted against this anti-free market bill. This bill doesn’t “level the playing field”, it only continues to spread anti-competitive legislation to new businesses, like Tesla, and prevents them from opening new dealerships in the state. If HB 401 becomes law in the State of Mississippi, electric vehicles from manufacturers like Tesla, Rivian, and Lucid will be banned from operating dealerships in the Magnolia State.We urge you to contact Governor Tate Reeves to tell him to VETO this anti-conservative, anti-Republican legislation![Send Gov. Reeves a message - VETO anti-conservative, anti-Republican HB 401](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/LQsWMR-3miiNxc8CojIj_w)
---
|
---
| Thank you for taking a stand for freedom and liberty in Mississippi. The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is the only group of legislators in the state who fight every day for you. We need your help to continue the fight. Please consider making a donation.[**DONATE TODAY!**](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/kdtY_YfJB9VU5OeUAIl-aw)
---
| | [DONATE TODAY! ](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/kdtY_YfJB9VU5OeUAIl-aw)
---
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/VVqCxjuhC7coXSFJB3Y4eQ) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

| During my speech at CPAC, I added that _**" I am your warrior. I am your justice. And for those who have been wronged and betrayed, I am your RETRIBUTION."**_

| 2024 is the final battle for America.
---
| Either they win, or we win. And I promise you this: if you put me back in the White House, their reign will be OVER, and America will be a FREE NATION once again.

| I also went through some of our big plans that I will do as the 47th President of the United States.
---
| At the top of my list will be stopping the slide into costly and never-ending wars.
---
| **As you know, I was the only president in DECADES who didn 't start a war.**
---
| But I also _COMPLETED_ wars that had already started, including defeating 100% of the ISIS caliphate - which everyone said was impossible to do.
---
| In fact, a certain general said it could only be done in 3 years - if at all. _**I did it in 3 weeks.**_
---
| Before I even arrive at the Oval Office, I will have the disastrous war between Russia and Ukraine settled. I will get the problem solved - and get it solved quickly.
---
| **Instead of spending hundreds of billions of dollars to defend the borders of distant foreign countries, under my leadership, we will defend OUR borders.**
---
| Three years ago, we had the safest border in the history of our country. I built hundreds of miles of wall and completed that task as promised.
---
| When I am back in the White House, we will use all necessary state, local, federal, and military resources to carry out the **LARGEST DOMESTIC DEPORTATION** operation in American History.
---
| I will ask every state and federal agency to identify every known or suspected gang member in America, and every one of them that is here illegally, we will pick them up, and we will throw them out of our country - and there will be no questions asked.
---
| _I will also direct the Department of Justice to go after Marxist prosecutors ' offices to make them pay for their illegal, race-based enforcement of the law._
---
| _All of us have seen too many videos of 13-year-old carjackers and 14-year-old hoodlums viciously beating their victims._
---
| My administration will crack down on these out-of-control monsters, young though they may be, and impose tough consequences on juvenile criminals.
---
| I will also fight for PARENTS' RIGHTS, including universal school choice, and the direct election of school principals by the parents.
---
| I will revoke every Biden policy promoting the chemical castration and sexual mutilation of our youth -- and ask Congress to send me a bill prohibiting child sexual mutilation in all 50 states.
---
| And we will keep men out of women's sports!
---
| There's no other way to say it: _**our enemies are lunatics and maniacs.**_
---
| **_They cannot stand that they do not own me, they cannot steer me, they cannot shake me, and they will NEVER, EVER control me._**
---
| At the end of the day, ANYONE else could be intimidated, bought-off, blackmailed, or ripped to shreds.
---
| I alone will NEVER retreat.
---
| But that's why we must stand together...
---
| While the Soros Money Machine, Hollywood, and globalist billionaires - who have made a fortune off of selling out our country - try to defeat our America First movement, grassroots donors like YOU are our only hope of fighting back to save America.

name: National Rifle Association
subject: We need to address the elephant in the room
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Self-defense isn't just a right. It's the most important right. | Self-defense is our most important right. In recent years, instances of law-abiding Americans being punished for protecting...
We are helping NRA fundraise. Questions? 1(800)662-3888

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404347:Jmo4oaGMN:m:1:3365131770:B9D06AA61D64055CC0D3AB1F5D92EEA2:r)

Peter,

Self-defense is our most important right.

In recent years, instances of law-abiding Americans being punished for protecting themselves have become alarmingly common. Far too often, responsible gun owners are being **reprimanded, chastised, or even imprisoned** for using their legal firearms to defend themselves.

That's insane, and we need to put an end to it. _No one is more committed to protecting the American people's Constitutionally guaranteed right to self-defense than the NRA._
**[PROTECT YOUR RIGHTS»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404347:Jmo4oaGMN:m:1:3365131770:B9D06AA61D64055CC0D3AB1F5D92EEA2:r)**
**The right to self-defense is the cornerstone of all freedoms. Without it, we cannot be free.** That's why, given the recent deranged attacks on our right to protect ourselves, the NRA's work has never been more important.

We recently set a new fundraising goal to preserve **your right to self-defense** , and we need your immediate support to reach it. _**Peter, can you step up?**_

**[Contribute any amount TODAY to help the NRA CRUSH its Self-Defense Preservation Fundraising Goal.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404347:Jmo4oaGMN:m:1:3365131770:B9D06AA61D64055CC0D3AB1F5D92EEA2:r)**

**[DONOR FILE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404347:Jmo4oaGMN:m:1:3365131770:B9D06AA61D64055CC0D3AB1F5D92EEA2:r)**
**SUPPORTER: Peter
DONATION STATUS: Awaiting contribution
PURPOSE: PROTECT YOUR RIGHTS**

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404347:Jmo4oaGMN:m:1:3365131770:B9D06AA61D64055CC0D3AB1F5D92EEA2:r)**

Cases of Americans being taken to court for defending themselves have been making headlines all over the country. Meanwhile, violent crime has been rampant, threatening law-abiding citizens' livelihoods everywhere. _This cannot continue to happen._

The NRA will ALWAYS work to protect your right to self-defense. _We'll fight back against ANY action taken by activist politicians that restricts your liberty or threatens your freedom, and crushing this Self-Defense Preservation Fundraising Goal will be a huge step in the right direction._

**[Please donate to the NRA TODAY so we can continue to work to protect your right to self-defense.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404347:Jmo4oaGMN:m:1:3365131770:B9D06AA61D64055CC0D3AB1F5D92EEA2:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404347:Jmo4oaGMN:m:1:3365131770:B9D06AA61D64055CC0D3AB1F5D92EEA2:r)**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Not your typical political email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I'm looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24cf8edd2cd5448cb297e155a6e6f252&_e=jfkuLft-i0IaEGueq9Mf46QyKK3Oj-DLNhSDlgKydB25gqQtzRfShmzgZ1oyQQvi4uWqwfWtbrDF1TEQJaCh0cpCa21UaAC1UWj1O-LIr_E7ih5J03x7Rhi4AAcJPT_VDJCxl_WXPk6OwVJi3wTYDADJU51L6ovGXWdAO2H3IFqTXQrf_m9ityDnFlnChFb6lt29-acQaubVODSMM9S1hwRpHZP591gdxWxCA2sdgi_bd4wcnYCzgZXF3vrqPj_RJJEnussxIPO1y3eltGD5rKLlcNyNcgQKY0xJr_27hOx-dOYXJCnF2kJC65d0K2gLpsAQgqyrtQtL4MMg3KZeM1_ySsxXZBt3kGuBnU5Yhvlda7NU1cj1ADMXOVqHPQh3gVlpbFCtp6JTZqkQLgzrAuEtSHMqW05cf7TxEPWZ-60RY1WHo1Svkx56rshUIhZG)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans-that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

subject: knock it down

| | |

Friend, as International Women's Day approaches, I'm thinking about the incredible women who made me the person I am today — my mom and my grandmother.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807976/395156574/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3973-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGY5ZTdkMy0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V4IwjvziOLa9rg1q7gLisPZcYmO0z2AiPJx1Lw2f4ec=)
My mother was one of just _three_ women in her law school's graduating class. And my grandmother was a true political powerhouse — a well-respected and hardworking activist in New York politics. Together, they inspired me to study law and to eventually run for office. **And they taught me that a closed door was nothing more than an invitation to knock it down.**
That's why I've spent my time in Washington fighting for women's rights and family rights — while doing everything I can to ensure we elect more women up and down the ballot.
But I know that the business of knocking down doors and shattering glass ceilings isn't an easy one. **When the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, it felt like a punch to the gut. That single ruling — issued by an out-of-touch, ultra-conservative majority — set the fight for equality back generations.** Today, there are children all across this country who are growing up with fewer rights than I did.
Opponents of progress and equality want us to believe that all of our work has been for nothing. **But I refuse to accept that this fight will end in anything other than victory — and I hope you'll join me.**
The task ahead of us is daunting but clear. We _must_ restore reproductive rights to all Americans. We _must_ expand family rights like family leave and universal pre-K. We _must_ build a country where every child has the chance to achieve their greatest dreams. **All of that starts with defending our Senate majority from the right-wing extremists who are doing everything they can to set our country back.[So please, will you join me in this fight by making a donation to defend our Senate majority and invest in a better, brighter future for our children? I'm counting on you have to my back in this fight, friend.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807977/395156575/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3973-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGY5ZTdkMy0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V4IwjvziOLa9rg1q7gLisPZcYmO0z2AiPJx1Lw2f4ec=)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807983/395156581/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3973-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGY5ZTdkMy0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V4IwjvziOLa9rg1q7gLisPZcYmO0z2AiPJx1Lw2f4ec=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807984/395156582/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3973-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGY5ZTdkMy0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V4IwjvziOLa9rg1q7gLisPZcYmO0z2AiPJx1Lw2f4ec=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: | | | Friend, as International Women's Day approaches, I'm thinking about the incredible women who made me the person I am today — my mom and my grandmother. = My mother was one of just three women in her law school's graduating class. And my grandmother was a true political powerhouse — a well-respected and hardworking activist in New York politics. Together, they inspired me to study law and to eventually run for office. And they taught me that a closed door was nothing more than an invitation to knock it down. That's why I've spent my time in Washington fighting for women's rights and family rights — while doing everything I can to ensure we elect more women up and down the ballot. But I know that the business of knocking down doors and shattering glass ceilings isn't an easy one. When the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, it felt like a punch to the gut. That single ruling — issued by an out-of-touch, ultra-conservative majority — set the fight for equality back generations. Today, there are children all across this country who are growing up with fewer rights than I did. Opponents of progress and equality want us to believe that all of our work has been for nothing. But I refuse to accept that this fight will end in anything other than victory — and I hope you'll join me. The task ahead of us is daunting but clear. We must restore reproductive rights to all Americans. We must expand family rights like family leave and universal pre-K. We must build a country where every child has the chance to achieve their greatest dreams. All of that starts with defending our Senate majority from the right-wing extremists who are doing everything they can to set our country back.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I am so grateful to have your support in this fight. Happy International Women's Day. In solidarity, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

subject: Fox News has turned tens of millions of Americans against their country, communities and democracy. Will you stand with VoteVets to ban this propaganda outlet from US military bases?
body:
The Pentagon must ban Fox News propaganda
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2e80824-ad88-49a2-9ff5-170bdaa4f27c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Fox News is a propaganda organization._ **_**Dangerous conspiracy-mongers that pollute the minds of millions of Americans, turning them into right-wing kooks and Russian sympathizers. **_ _**[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T192a4d98-45a4-4814-b193-9600d44bae1d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**_ _You may have seen the news re the Dominion Voting Systems' lawsuit vs Fox. It produced texts and emails proving_**Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, Sean Hannity, their supposedly *serious newsman* Brett Baier and owner Rupert Murdoch knew Trump's bs about "election fraud" was just that. Bs. But like the treacherous jackals they are, they repeated it anyhow.** _**Because, Fox cares only for ratings and profits, **not anything approaching integrity or their fellow human beings**.** __**Fox has turned tens of millions of Americans against their country, communities and democracy. **_ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in giving VoteVets $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so they can promote this video far and wide and begin the process of de-Foxing our country to stabilize our democracy?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a0d0823-b99f-412c-9151-e410dcce10f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_So, It's a sick joke this station can call itself news, much less be played at our military bases. In fact, one in seven of those who stormed the Capitol in an attempted coup had military experience._** _As an American, and son of a father who spent much of his career on a military base,** it's sickening we allow Fox's cabal of conspiracists anywhere near our military** to convince our troops to not only hate their country, but use their training to attack it._

We fight for these values every day. name: Steve Scalise, Majority Leader
subject: Biden Weighs First VETO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Reduced punishments for CARJACKINGS?
|
---
| | | **BIDEN WEIGHS FIRST VETO TO PROTECT DC 'S SOFT-ON-CRIME LAW **
---
| | | [READ MORE >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404954:J6_nVaGON:m:1:3331421248:916DBD1D15D636E61D02C90687AC0416:r "button")
---
Peter, crime is spiraling out of control - _murder rates are breaking records and carjackings are at an all-time HIGH. _

What did the Democrats do about it?
1. Ended cash bail
2. Slashed police department budgets
3. Let dangerous criminals back on the street with only a slap on the wrist
4. FAILED TO PROTECT OUR COMMUNITIES

When House Republicans won back the House, we promised we would do everything possible to strengthen the rule of law, not weaken it as the Democrats have for the past 2 years.

As Majority Leader, I have been leading House Republicans to protect communities across our country, starting with our nation's capital. Just a few weeks ago, House Republicans voted to BLOCK the DC City Council from weakening their criminal code.

_They 're moving to reduce punishments for robberies, carjackings, and other violent crimes - can you believe it??? _

**Now the Radical Left is mounting a massive pressure campaign calling for Joe Biden to VETO our tough-on-crime legislation.** This will UNDO the hard work House Republicans put in to protect the community from violent crime.

_**[We aren't giving up. But we are going to need your help in the next few minutes. Will you sign your name as a supporter of the following statement?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404954:J6_nVaGON:m:1:3331421248:916DBD1D15D636E61D02C90687AC0416:r "We aren’t giving up. But we are
going to need your help in the next few minutes. Will you sign your name as a supporter of the following statement? ")**_
| **OFFICIAL STATEMENT:**
I, Peter, endorse House Republicans' plan to stop the Left's soft-on-crime agenda in our nation's capital. I am 100% opposed to Joe Biden VETOING this legislation and making our streets less safe.
| | [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404954:J6_nVaGON:m:1:3331421248:916DBD1D15D636E61D02C90687AC0416:r "SIGN YOUR NAME >>")
---

**100,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404954:J6_nVaGON:m:1:3331421248:916DBD1D15D636E61D02C90687AC0416:r "timer")
---

I am glad I can count on you.

Thank you and God bless America,

Steve Scalise
_Majority Leader_

---

name: 2023 Membership Services
subject: We’re giving you one more chance to stay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfm6ahmfuebvlp7632f2qre4eq3tjqeuh6q8k8go_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g6eob4cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbev28tf36jha51j2jcv3lrmqd7695q3la3gjv18_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g6eob4cdh2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z25bngesi5vgulojsrcis0d4fk9m9o009sd6ipno_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g6eob4cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl8knd9bqmq6949m8jjlj7si93pvp8s5cr7bpl9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g6eob4cdh2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfor4br3275eqv9c80enhk65mi0q9r1l57ekthio_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g6eob4cdh2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgqe0ap8kj8dhkpitr785hravpohil4pes4777e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g6eob4cdh2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf2f7480lr1fm4otk7pck3d55cctu5mnr6sf1q08_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g6eob4cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7ontlh06ohrp6572k7tr501mn3p3t2cb8s3j330_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g6eob4cdh2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4hnuv6qeavon4nqlq11sv25ohc9ad9s17ikv48o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g6eob4cdh2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpgf2gd76pu4qv1tdqg0802pqhgkh8suv8fgmprg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g6eob4cdh2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

Join the conservative team working tirelessly to rebuild America! Retaking the Majority was just the first step. name: Mary Miller Update (via Team IDCCA)
subject: We are far past concerned, fellow Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
Mary Miller is now VICE CHAIR of the House Committee on Education and the Workforce.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/oGpO74p70qsrIfEKUY_RwtEbO4RVI0x1L3J6xKFBQ9A=/k8m6Kby7CIagkzeyQ2Noukh6tQaalpU3D2t9Q7nem6o=?refcode=EM_FR_230307ViceMillerRS_MMU_90DO_5_NG_N_Logo)
Fellow Democrats,

Illinois' most extreme Congressional Representative, Mary Miller, has been appointed to serve as the Vice Chair of the House Committee on Education and the Workforce. Quite honestly, on a scale of 1 to 10, we are off the charts distressed on what this means to youths across the country.

**[Students in Illinois and across the country deserve better than what Mary Miller is planning on giving them. Our students deserve a _free_ , public education where every single student feels safe in their classroom. Donate $10 today to join our fight to protect the public education system from Mary Miller.](https://act.myngp.com/el/oGpO74p70qsrIfEKUY_RwtEbO4RVI0x1L3J6xKFBQ9A=/k8m6Kby7CIagkzeyQ2Noukh6tQaalpU3D2t9Q7nem6o=?refcode=EM_FR_230307ViceMillerRS_MMU_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=10)**
[**DONATE NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oGpO74p70qsrIfEKUY_RwtEbO4RVI0x1L3J6xKFBQ9A=/k8m6Kby7CIagkzeyQ2Noukh6tQaalpU3D2t9Q7nem6o=?refcode=EM_FR_230307ViceMillerRS_MMU_90DO_5_NG_N_B1&amount=10)
Here's a refresher on why Miller's appointment to a leadership role over our nation's education policy is so concerning:

1\. She wants to mandate the teaching of religion in public schools, claiming "We need to tell our kids, they were created by God, they have a gift, they have a purpose and bring that back into the public school as a foundation."

2\. Her family supports a far-right private religious school whose textbooks teach students "God regulated but did not forbid slavery" and instruct them to argue in favor of counting slaves as three-fifths of a person without giving them any rights.

3\. She was caught on camera approvingly quoting **Hitler** : "If we win a few elections, we're still going to be losing unless we win the hearts and minds of our children... Hitler was right on one thing. He said, 'Whoever has the youth has the future.'"

**[Fellow Democrats, Miller could not make her intentions any clearer. She is a danger to public education, our children, and our society. Will you donate $10 right now to help protect them by continuing our work to kick Miller out of Congress?](https://act.myngp.com/el/oGpO74p70qsrIfEKUY_RwtEbO4RVI0x1L3J6xKFBQ9A=/k8m6Kby7CIagkzeyQ2Noukh6tQaalpU3D2t9Q7nem6o=?refcode=EM_FR_230307ViceMillerRS_MMU_90DO_5_NG_N_L2&amount=10)**

_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [**$5**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oGpO74p70qsrIfEKUY_RwtEbO4RVI0x1L3J6xKFBQ9A=/k8m6Kby7CIagkzeyQ2Noukh6tQaalpU3D2t9Q7nem6o=?refcode=EM_FR_230307ViceMillerRS_MMU_90DO_5_NG_N_B1&express_lane=true&amount=5) [**$10**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oGpO74p70qsrIfEKUY_RwtEbO4RVI0x1L3J6xKFBQ9A=/k8m6Kby7CIagkzeyQ2Noukh6tQaalpU3D2t9Q7nem6o=?refcode=EM_FR_230307ViceMillerRS_MMU_90DO_5_NG_N_B2&express_lane=true&amount=10) [**$25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oGpO74p70qsrIfEKUY_RwtEbO4RVI0x1L3J6xKFBQ9A=/k8m6Kby7CIagkzeyQ2Noukh6tQaalpU3D2t9Q7nem6o=?refcode=EM_FR_230307ViceMillerRS_MMU_90DO_5_NG_N_B3&express_lane=true&amount=25) [**$50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oGpO74p70qsrIfEKUY_RwtEbO4RVI0x1L3J6xKFBQ9A=/k8m6Kby7CIagkzeyQ2Noukh6tQaalpU3D2t9Q7nem6o=?refcode=EM_FR_230307ViceMillerRS_MMU_90DO_5_NG_N_B4&express_lane=true&amount=50) [**$102**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oGpO74p70qsrIfEKUY_RwtEbO4RVI0x1L3J6xKFBQ9A=/k8m6Kby7CIagkzeyQ2Noukh6tQaalpU3D2t9Q7nem6o=?refcode=EM_FR_230307ViceMillerRS_MMU_90DO_5_NG_N_B5&express_lane=true&amount=102) [**CHIP IN**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oGpO74p70qsrIfEKUY_RwtEbO4RVI0x1L3J6xKFBQ9A=/k8m6Kby7CIagkzeyQ2Noukh6tQaalpU3D2t9Q7nem6o=?refcode=EM_FR_230307ViceMillerRS_MMU_90DO_5_NG_N_B6&amount=other) Thank you,

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Change starts today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjtk21o8ii1gk4rdot2iu9h1482c841n0c873jp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g61pr1c5h2bs)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcqpkikt6k1nu5v31il870le2so59gg261tdrd1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g61pr1c5h2bs)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9vugdfd4tuk2lv5v01hnrvjosd958bggtk8d7v8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g61pr1c5h2bs)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6b13mpkgtquusegnam9ns2g5mjcqliug4gn5bcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g61pr1c5h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z064g6s0gcf5javbhjjmc3u9g7jph65gi9ahfd2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g61pr1c5h2bs)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER ->**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za8u5ksb1mgvifm6lum3jp4d6kdni78o454fmsn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g61pr1c5h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0kg2thrj3fl2c558rmpsi4rtoq2ifav0ogut6c8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g61pr1c5h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoj3fguah3eb0jk3rtolqgm3338u3gfu6gbm7pa8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g61pr1c5h2bs)| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv2k10j781ol6u5h7s0711c5os22f8kmt8e58gso_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g61pr1c5h2bs)| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrg3uf1mf6bdrl4n6lj89pk4bvq45im9i5h0lo18_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9g61pr1c5h2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr4hk3ad5mv4ib5ihl3l552tss7ginqg8t4hr53o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c3h60o77c5gm49fg)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Update to the attack on my license
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Scott Jensen for Governor
body:
An update for you | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/response?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

I wanted to update you on my medical license situation. As I've said, political activists are weaponizing the Board of Medical License - and even Keith Ellison is joining the fray. I've received my sixth letter and now it's time to respond. I shared... you answered. YOU GET IT: if they can do it to me, they can do it to you! [Please watch my critical video by clicking the thumbnail below.](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=f338873357&e=9828080a05) Share it with family and friends to help get the word out.
We cannot let these politically-motivated witch hunts win:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=df43fb8a7f&e=9828080a05 "MY RESPONSE: An Update on my Medical License")
---
| The relationship between a doctor and a patient is built on trust. Patients trust their doctors to provide them with accurate diagnoses, effective treatments, and confidential care. As doctors we, in turn, trust our patients to provide them with honest and complete information about their health and medical history. The sacred bond between doctor and patient is important because it helps to build trust, improve communication, foster empathy, and promote collaboration.

The fact that politically-motivated activists continue to threaten this relationship across the country is disgraceful. I will not back down and I will continue to fight this. I need your support in this fight; all I ask is that you watch this critical video on [Facebook](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=df357b161f&e=9828080a05), [Youtube](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=9ca66eaa7f&e=9828080a05), or [Rumble](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=1e6a27fa1d&e=9828080a05) \- and share it with anyone you can. The more transparency we can bring to this process, the better!

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Former Republican Candidate for Governor
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
|
---

name: Adam Frisch
subject: I’m running again to defeat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
Counting on you.

Hello,
I am officially running again against Lauren Boebert!
In 2022, we came just 546 votes short of kicking Boebert out of Congress. It was the closest race in the entire country. Now, I’m running again to finish the job, but I need you with me from day one:
Please, will you make a donation now and become a Founding Donor to my 2024 campaign to defeat Boebert? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester's. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2023-lbr4frisch?refcode=EM_FR_20230307_frisch]
No one believed we could pull it off in 2022. All of the pundits said Colorado’s 3rd congressional district was a “Safe Republican” seat. The national Democrats and the national Republicans wrote us off.
But we proved them all wrong.
With Lauren Boebert now on notice, this campaign is going to get even nastier. Her Super PACs and supporters are going to spin lie after lie against me on TV. I’m counting on you to be able to correct the record and hold Boebert accountable.
No amount is too small: Click here now and make a donation to my campaign of whatever you can afford today. It’s important that we have as strong of an early showing as possible. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2023-lbr4frisch?refcode=EM_FR_20230307_frisch]
I never could have done it last time without supporters and donors like you. I am eternally grateful to have you alongside me again.
With gratitude
— Adam
Adam Frisch is a common-sense businessman, family man, and former city councilman. He has worked for two decades to create jobs, grow the economy and make our communities safer. He is running to defeat far-right extremist Lauren Boebert and join Lisa in the House.

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times.

# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b514442c75944028bcf2b6a2e6db5c2d&_e=XiyR1FtBTf7X3rLS0Dkmo3bUDBJ7tYpueKAfU_p526yYEFraZgSMADlvasy3IICGsRHZyUJ7dsGmVN5eO82pCmXoTY4LH9iUcMBkyUvKh1GuhT8S7bMpF3fj8w0ypmxcb8ERniXX3zR5nFYjNivCKEoATFWyRoAq4O4N4nOeMcpz6dff0MIXbJlv4j--sjMYKOpD-DesbvEO-d_Nps3COwACCjilH-0Dly_VgDaSwPwn45Px6ngKwpEzCCkrJhD1W-9Ib1LtcHXeDlrTBiwi8CyDyd3lYHFScnXay6Q2HPk%3D). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b514442c75944028bcf2b6a2e6db5c2d&_e=XiyR1FtBTf7X3rLS0Dkmo3bUDBJ7tYpueKAfU_p526yYEFraZgSMADlvasy3IICGsRHZyUJ7dsGmVN5eO82pCmXoTY4LH9iUcMBkyUvKh1GuhT8S7bMpF3fj8w0ypmxcb8ERniXX3zR5nFYjNivCKHJzrXE-QZlt28cW55uWbDz4gBzr7LLEt7-JOJsn_ByhtaRadEsVHziHenQWni3FGRODq616pcvivYC3hnHyjDAA1IeuWiRagNfMJ7x6R5g5PcXbFr26LaDOF798_8BVayt2nO4kxXaRwNE_zcYhmOM%3D) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b514442c75944028bcf2b6a2e6db5c2d&_e=XiyR1FtBTf7X3rLS0Dkmo3bUDBJ7tYpueKAfU_p526yYEFraZgSMADlvasy3IICGsRHZyUJ7dsGmVN5eO82pCmXoTY4LH9iUcMBkyUvKh1GuhT8S7bMpF3fj8w0ypmxcb8ERniXX3zR5nFYjNivCKAywyjT5F87tMEvfgcSba6aWnxqf6CIZcnI88XNx802FFj6jsNVzk2yF869amNtTC7US_Fj0wPmwO_EHcJu56cfMTn9Z2WBVWoE9Ms8uW9ycj4JlXc0Y4Gs05INtA_VrK1hLfSg2fuCrRk7BQ_sFCPA%3D) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b514442c75944028bcf2b6a2e6db5c2d&_e=XiyR1FtBTf7X3rLS0Dkmo3bUDBJ7tYpueKAfU_p526yYEFraZgSMADlvasy3IICGsRHZyUJ7dsGmVN5eO82pCmXoTY4LH9iUcMBkyUvKh1GuhT8S7bMpF3fj8w0ypmxcb8ERniXX3zR5nFYjNivCKE0BSkc_7Bv_FLj11jj_eJXzP627yC3tefeZJksaCpF_ke4Puc-uj-XPtkXHRo9Nz2LMNS3lZVJKOKUIo8Y96EvJHBSbgoPyuXhK6L4sdc4bToM7RNDnoXy-fl0HMkz3rrM21jEIMC9zkBkSXmjTkoo%3D). I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.

Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters More Raving Reviews From Customers! | | Rory H. I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things. ---|--- | Billy H. Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- Real reviews from real customers. name: National Rifle Association
subject: We need to address the elephant in the room
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Self-defense isn't just a right. It's the most important right. | Self-defense is our most important right. In recent years, instances of law-abiding Americans being punished for protecting...
We are helping NRA fundraise. Questions? 1(800)662-3888

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404955:6DgwIaGFN:m:1:3331421248:B864B4FED071C8F97B9060EDA250F7BC:r)

Peter,

Self-defense is our most important right.

In recent years, instances of law-abiding Americans being punished for protecting themselves have become alarmingly common. Far too often, responsible gun owners are being **reprimanded, chastised, or even imprisoned** for using their legal firearms to defend themselves.

That's insane, and we need to put an end to it. _No one is more committed to protecting the American people's Constitutionally guaranteed right to self-defense than the NRA._
**[PROTECT YOUR RIGHTS»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404955:6DgwIaGFN:m:1:3331421248:B864B4FED071C8F97B9060EDA250F7BC:r)**
**The right to self-defense is the cornerstone of all freedoms. Without it, we cannot be free.** That's why, given the recent deranged attacks on our right to protect ourselves, the NRA's work has never been more important.

We recently set a new fundraising goal to preserve **your right to self-defense** , and we need your immediate support to reach it. _**Peter, can you step up?**_

**[Contribute any amount TODAY to help the NRA CRUSH its Self-Defense Preservation Fundraising Goal.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404955:6DgwIaGFN:m:1:3331421248:B864B4FED071C8F97B9060EDA250F7BC:r)**

**[DONOR FILE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404955:6DgwIaGFN:m:1:3331421248:B864B4FED071C8F97B9060EDA250F7BC:r)**
**SUPPORTER: Peter
DONATION STATUS: Awaiting contribution
PURPOSE: PROTECT YOUR RIGHTS**

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404955:6DgwIaGFN:m:1:3331421248:B864B4FED071C8F97B9060EDA250F7BC:r)**

Cases of Americans being taken to court for defending themselves have been making headlines all over the country. Meanwhile, violent crime has been rampant, threatening law-abiding citizens' livelihoods everywhere. _This cannot continue to happen._

The NRA will ALWAYS work to protect your right to self-defense. _We'll fight back against ANY action taken by activist politicians that restricts your liberty or threatens your freedom, and crushing this Self-Defense Preservation Fundraising Goal will be a huge step in the right direction._

**[Please donate to the NRA TODAY so we can continue to work to protect your right to self-defense.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404955:6DgwIaGFN:m:1:3331421248:B864B4FED071C8F97B9060EDA250F7BC:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404955:6DgwIaGFN:m:1:3331421248:B864B4FED071C8F97B9060EDA250F7BC:r)**

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we’ve seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they’re going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651131%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OIF4c8daB7Ylg5Vc%2bTswSQ&sysid=1 "but you only have until
midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**
