---
You’ve fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can’t DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it’s too late>>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651132%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N3GZ8VP0QiOEflJ3xftbZA&sysid=1 "Renew your membership
before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There’s good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651133%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bHwdVg6b%2bgtJpG%2feDzgEbQ&sysid=1 "11:59 PM
TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651134%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=szZ8G5pvaRWsPZXb7is1Jw&sysid=1 "Are you going to renew
your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4
consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to
let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651130%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7fOVlRBrlu%2bj9pitVdemBA&sysid=1 "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651145%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jhicHm%2bbHmUPDivxNjxHOw&sysid=1 "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn’t over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651146%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lZZhlZz2t5c5jSFDjDweAw&sysid=1 "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it’s too late>>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651147%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7ZQIwn%2bo7jGy0vwoOdRr4Q&sysid=1 "Renew before it’s too
late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office
---

Now the next step towards saving our country is underway, and House Republicans need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. **[Step up and claim your 2023 House Majority Membership today!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651149%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N2xHy%2fO8N0GPpDdHcw7oAw&sysid=1 "Step up and claim your

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: With a heavy heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I come bearing some bad news

| |
---
| | | I write to you with a heavy heart. Not sure if you saw my briefing last night - but I'll be blunt. I come bearing some bad news:

name: Michael Hagg - AdoptaPlatoon
subject: Please sponsor a Care Package today
body:
Requests from our Troops are flooding into our warehouse... | |
---
| Dear Peter, This is an especially emotional time for our Troops and their families. They are living with so much uncertainty... It's been about a year since Russia invaded Ukraine and no one expected this conflict to continue so long. Extended deployments and rotations are continuing longer than originally planned. The Ukrainians have suffered many losses, but they are enduring and continue to fiercely fight to hold on to their country. Due to Russia's economic, social and military power, it is extremely difficult for many other nations to assist Ukraine. It truly is a political quagmire. However, there are countries that are doing what they can to help, including the U.S. This aid consists of accepting Ukrainian refuges and providing them with food, shelter, clothing, and various humanitarian assistance. The U.S. and many of its allies have also recently provided weapon systems, military training, armored vehicles, anti-aircraft missiles and coastal defense ships. And most recently, the 101st Airborne Division (the Screaming Eagles) has been moved to southeast Romania, the closest to the Russian border that the U.S. has dared to go since the start of this conflict. Reports tell us that this location is near to where Moscow is amassing weapons and our Troops are there building trenches, staging helicopter attacks, and performing artillery exercises. |
---
Unfortunately, Russia has newly deployed tens of thousands additional troops to the front lines in Ukraine, however, with this latest move, the Screaming Eagles are well positioned to provide a robust deterrent and defensive posture alongside U.S. Allies.
In addition, due to North Korea's unprecedented number of missile fires in 2022, and then their decision to fire three short-range ballistic missiles toward the sea east of the Korean Peninsula at the end of December, has resulted in an agreement between the U.S and South Korea to expand their joint military efforts.
There are currently 28,500 U.S. Service Members stationed in South Korea who maintain security on the Korean Peninsula and stability in Northeast Asia, however with the heightened, aggressive moves by North Korea, more deployments are expected. The expanded U.S. actions will stretch from Japan to the Solomon Islands involving advanced military exercises in the region and additional troop rotations in key areas facing the Taiwan Strait and South China Sea.
As tensions heat up around the world, and more of our Troops are activated, is it any wonder that requests for support from our deployed (and soon to be deployed) Service Members are increasing?
**And AdoptaPlatoon, with the support of patriotic Americans across the U.S., responds to every one of their requests as quickly as possible. And we have for 25 years now...**
Check out this email we received last year from two of our long-time supporters:
**From:** Dawn Reall
**Sent:** Wednesday, April 06, 2022 11:01 AM
**To:** info@AdoptaPlatoon.org
**Subject:** My son deployed Hello, My name is Dawn Reall and my husband, Gus, and I have been donating $33 a month for several years and I believe we once provided socks to an entire platoon. Our son, **XXXXXX XXXX** , was deployed to **XXXXX** about two months ago for his 9 month deployment. The other day he sent us a picture of the attached letter and boy it really made my day. First, that he knows we have been doing this for years and now his entire group knows too, secondly that he received a box from us and lastly that it was proof too me that our money goes where you said it was going. So, thank you for all that you do and all the other people involved with this program! Dawn and Gus Reall
---

---
---
Isn't that amazing?
Dawn's and Gus' words of support truly warmed my heart and I hope they touch you as well and help you understand how much your Care Packages mean to our Service Members and their families.
I also hope that you will lend your support to our brave men and women in uniform.
For a one-time gift of $38, your Care Package will be chocked-full of items that our Service Members have requested including hand sanitizer, cleansing wipes, field dental kits, nail clippers, bootlaces, and socks.
| [Click here to send your Care Package to a brave soldier!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404611:6hcgwaGNH:m:1:3365131770:A361F3BD0E7E384105ACA2052F505012:r)
---
Your Care Package will also include soap, shampoo and a shaving kit (Operation Clean Shave) plus other personal hygiene and quality-of-life items. And, as winter is upon them, hand warmers and blankets will be sent and, of course, special treats to remind them of home, such as Pop-Tarts®, Kellogg's® Rice Krispies Treats (a favorite), beef sticks, tuna packets, trail mix, and cookies.
And perhaps most importantly, each Care Package contains an encouraging note with your words of support and appreciation boosting the morale of our Troops! Perhaps your Care Package will get into the hands of a Service Member that you know like Dawn and Gus' did!
---
##### "Many words of gratitude to the American people who make sure AdoptaPlatoon continues to send support to U.S. deployed Troops."
**[Please sponsor a Care Package today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404611:6hcgwaGNH:m:1:3365131770:A361F3BD0E7E384105ACA2052F505012:r)** Your Care Package is guaranteed to lift the morale of an Airman, Guardsman, Marine, Sailor or Soldier serving on our behalf so far from home.
On behalf of those who serve,
---
Michael Henry Hagg
Executive Director
[DONATE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404611:6hcgwaGNH:m:1:3365131770:A361F3BD0E7E384105ACA2052F505012:r)

clean_body: Requests from our Troops are flooding into our warehouse... | | | Dear Peter, This is an especially emotional time for our Troops and their families. They are living with so much uncertainty... It's been about a year since Russia invaded Ukraine and no one expected this conflict to continue so long. Extended deployments and rotations are continuing longer than originally planned. The Ukrainians have suffered many losses, but they are enduring and continue to fiercely fight to hold on to their country. Due to Russia's economic, social and military power, it is extremely difficult for many other nations to assist Ukraine. It truly is a political quagmire. However, there are countries that are doing what they can to help, including the U.S. This aid consists of accepting Ukrainian refuges and providing them with food, shelter, clothing, and various humanitarian assistance. The U.S. and many of its allies have also recently provided weapon systems, military training, armored vehicles, anti-aircraft missiles and coastal defense ships. And most recently, the 101st Airborne Division (the Screaming Eagles) has been moved to southeast Romania, the closest to the Russian border that the U.S. has dared to go since the start of this conflict. Reports tell us that this location is near to where Moscow is amassing weapons and our Troops are there building trenches, staging helicopter attacks, and performing artillery exercises. | Unfortunately, Russia has newly deployed tens of thousands additional troops to the front lines in Ukraine, however, with this latest move, the Screaming Eagles are well positioned to provide a robust deterrent and defensive posture alongside U.S. Allies. In addition, due to North Korea's unprecedented number of missile fires in 2022, and then their decision to fire three short-range ballistic missiles toward the sea east of the Korean Peninsula at the end of December, has resulted in an agreement between the U.S and South Korea to expand their joint military efforts. There are currently 28,500 U.S. Service Members stationed in South Korea who maintain security on the Korean Peninsula and stability in Northeast Asia, however with the heightened, aggressive moves by North Korea, more deployments are expected. The expanded U.S. actions will stretch from Japan to the Solomon Islands involving advanced military exercises in the region and additional troop rotations in key areas facing the Taiwan Strait and South China Sea. As tensions heat up around the world, and more of our Troops are activated, is it any wonder that requests for support from our deployed (and soon to be deployed) Service Members are increasing? And AdoptaPlatoon, with the support of patriotic Americans across the U.S., responds to every one of their requests as quickly as possible. And we have for 25 years now... Check out this email we received last year from two of our long-time supporters: From: Dawn Reall Sent: Wednesday, April 06, 2022 11:01 AM To: info@AdoptaPlatoon.org Subject: My son deployed Hello, My name is Dawn Reall and my husband, Gus, and I have been donating $33 a month for several years and I believe we once provided socks to an entire platoon. Our son, XXXXXX XXXX , was deployed to XXXXX about two months ago for his 9 month deployment. The other day he sent us a picture of the attached letter and boy it really made my day. First, that he knows we have been doing this for years and now his entire group knows too, secondly that he received a box from us and lastly that it was proof too me that our money goes where you said it was going. So, thank you for all that you do and all the other people involved with this program! Dawn and Gus Reall Isn't that amazing? Dawn's and Gus' words of support truly warmed my heart and I hope they touch you as well and help you understand how much your Care Packages mean to our Service Members and their families. I also hope that you will lend your support to our brave men and women in uniform. For a one-time gift of $38, your Care Package will be chocked-full of items that our Service Members have requested including hand sanitizer, cleansing wipes, field dental kits, nail clippers, bootlaces, and socks. | Your Care Package will also include soap, shampoo and a shaving kit (Operation Clean Shave) plus other personal hygiene and quality-of-life items. And, as winter is upon them, hand warmers and blankets will be sent and, of course, special treats to remind them of home, such as Pop-Tarts®, Kellogg's® Rice Krispies Treats (a favorite), beef sticks, tuna packets, trail mix, and cookies. And perhaps most importantly, each Care Package contains an encouraging note with your words of support and appreciation boosting the morale of our Troops! Perhaps your Care Package will get into the hands of a Service Member that you know like Dawn and Gus' did! "Many words of gratitude to the American people who make sure AdoptaPlatoon continues to send support to U.S. deployed Troops." Your Care Package is guaranteed to lift the morale of an Airman, Guardsman, Marine, Sailor or Soldier serving on our behalf so far from home. On behalf of those who serve, Michael Henry Hagg Executive Director | | AdoptaPlatoon is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. A copy of AdoptaPlatoons' current financial statement is available on request to AdoptaPlatoon at P.O. Box 234, Lozano, TX 78568. name: Shift WA
subject: The deaths on Democrats’ hands
body:
Communities across our state have suffered the high cost of Democrats' irresponsible 2021 bill. Despite the growing number of tragic incidents, many Democrats are still refusing to amend their law. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61571149:WkJhCKDNw:m:1:2610672541:23901F95B2604858CC67A81AF6B27FBA:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

TOMORROW is the last day for lawmakers in the State House to pass HB 1363, the amending bill to the catastrophic law passed by Democrats in 2021 banning police from pursuing criminals fleeing the scene of a crime.

As Shift WA reported, the original version of HB 1363 would have allowed police pursuits for any crimes given a reasonable suspicion a crime had been committed. Unfortunately for families across our state, the rationality behind that was a step too far for many House Democrats.

The current, watered-down version of the bill gives police the authority to pursue someone who they reasonably suspect of a violent crime, a sexual crime, vehicular assault, escape, DUI, and domestic violence. **Notably, vehicular theft - a crime that has reached unprecedented levels in our state - was not included.**

Communities across our state have suffered the high cost of Democrats' irresponsible 2021 bill. Recently - in a truly tragic consequence - two foster children, an 8-year-old girl and a 6-year-old boy, were killed by a driver who was speeding and allegedly driving under the influence. A mere hour before the crash, police clocked the speeding driver but could not pursue due to Democrats' insane law.

**Despite the growing number of tragic incidents, many Democrats are still refusing to amend their law.** And mainstream media outlets are refusing to hold them accountable.

David Horsey, the editorial cartoonist for The Seattle Times, criticized the law in a recent piece. But - tellingly - he stopped short of calling out Democrats in particular. In the cartoon, Horsey refers to the "Legislature" saying it is not safe to pursue criminals. Of course, that's not true. **It 's not the "Legislature," it's Democrats.**

Given the impending need for action, we here at Shift WA are demanding that House Democrats take three actions before tomorrow.

1. Return the current bill to the original copy allowing for the police pursuit of criminals suspected of car theft and not sunseting after two years - and PASS IT!
2. Demand that far-Left State Sen. Manka Dhingra (D-Kirkland) schedule a committee hearing for the bill.
3. Secure an agreement that would ensure the bill is brought to a floor vote in the State Senate.

**Innocent people will continue to suffer until Democrats ' irresponsible law is completely reversed.** That means cooperation from Democrat lawmakers. **And that cooperation requires the mainstream media grow a backbone and call out Democrats.**

Until then, we here at Shift WA are doing our part to ensure the public knows what is going on with the police pursuit bill - and **how Democrats are responsible for the death and destruction of lives that has followed it**.

[**But we need your help. We hope you 'll help us continue our important work by contributing today!**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61571150:WkJhCKDNw:m:1:2610672541:23901F95B2604858CC67A81AF6B27FBA:r)

As the only media outlets reporting news coming out of Olympia from a conservative perspective, our work must go on. [**We hope you will help today.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61571150:WkJhCKDNw:m:1:2610672541:23901F95B2604858CC67A81AF6B27FBA:r)

Thank you,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61571151:WkJhCKDNw:m:1:2610672541:23901F95B2604858CC67A81AF6B27FBA:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14152507&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWkJhCKDNw).
---

name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18899?t=1001&akid=3033%2E346206%2E-Z3yey ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230307-3033-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3033_346206_-Z3yey&akid=3033%2E346206%2E-Z3yey

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3033%2E346206%2E-Z3yey

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651279%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bPlqVCIzSb29rLvi%2b5L29Q&sysid=1 An In-depth Look At Tucker Carlson Shattering The January 6th Narrative

House Speaker Kevin McCarthy gave “Tucker Carlson Tonight” an exclusive preview of security camera footage from the Capitol Building, which had been concealed from the public for over two years. On Monday, Carlson shared snippets of the footage that feature key individuals from the January 6th incident. Speaker McCarthy provided over 40,000 hours of security camera footage, of which three sets were released to Fox News and Carlson.

name: Lena Moffitt, Executive Director Evergreen Action
subject: Hello from the new executive director
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
I am honored to work with you
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/339?t=2&akid=13296%2E53494%2EuEMmS6)
---
Friend, like so many of you, I came to the climate movement fueled by a passion for creating a better world for us all. I saw the greatest existential threat we've ever faced harming the places and people I loved, and I knew I needed to spend my life trying to tackle the climate crisis and creating that better world we know is possible.
Growing up in Albuquerque, New Mexico, my love of the outdoors fueled a desire to protect our planet. I learned how our world can be so fragile, but our relationships can be so strong. I learned about the ways we are shaped by history, community, ecology, and—critically—policy.
---
**I learned that every change for the better is accomplished by people working together, in solidarity, for justice.**
I took that worldview straight into my studies of ecology and then into political advocacy. After graduate school, I started at the Union of Concerned Scientists, bringing scientists to meet with Members of Congress as they wrote the Waxman-Markey climate bill—and learned the hard way that our movement wasn't big or powerful enough yet to secure the bold policies we needed. So I spent the last 12 years working to build up the strength of that movement—forging broad cross-movement coalitions and effective, intersectional campaigns. I had the honor of forming deep partnerships with individuals bearing the impacts of our fossil fuel-based economy. I learned to lead large, national teams, and to create strategic campaigns driving real impact on legislation and policy.
**And, now, as a mother and stepmother, my resolve to make the world a better, safer place has only strengthened.**
Back in 2020, when I first sat down and began reading a copy of the Evergreen Action Plan, I was only a few pages in when I had to literally set the document down to stand up and pace the room. I felt so charged with excitement, seeing that there was this group of people doing exactly the work I felt our movement needed—creating an ambitious, actionable policy roadmap that could slash pollution at the pace needed to avoid outright disaster, while simultaneously creating a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. Then and now, Evergreen's mission resonated deeply with me, and I knew I wanted to be a part of it.
I've been honored to serve Evergreen as a campaigns director and chief of staff, and I have great admiration and gratitude for all that Jamal Raad, Sam Ricketts, and the team have accomplished in the three years since they turned that document into one of the most influential climate organizations in our country. I can't wait to continue building that organization with them.
**As executive director, I will help Evergreen continue to grow as a force within the climate movement, supercharging our transition to a more equitable, inclusive clean energy economy.**
Thank you for all that you do to support our work and for your commitment to a better future.
Sincerely,
Lena Moffitt
Executive Director, Evergreen
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=13296%2E53494%2EuEMmS6). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---
All content © 2023 EVERGREEN ACTION, All Rights Reserved

clean_body: The work to lay the foundations for 2024 started yesterday. | | | Hi Peter — 👋 it's Chris Deluzio. I wanted to take a quick moment to introduce myself and ask you to join my fight with the help of United Rural Democrats to protect rural Pennsylvania from the radical GOP targeting our communities. As a father, voting rights lawyer, Iraq War veteran, and someone who helped organize a union, I ran for Congress to fight for the common good and our shared prosperity. Now that I’m in Congress, thanks in part to efforts by organizations like United Rural Democrats, I am committed to building a future that leaves no one behind and a government that takes care of all of us. But right now, the radical Republicans in charge of the House of Representatives are doing everything they can to hurt working folks. It’s going to take the full strength of our grassroots team to put a stop to them, If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: The GOP has no answers for the problems rural Americans like us are facing. They want to pass a constitutional amendment to ban abortion and criminalize women and their doctors. They want to kill the union way of life, and are more than happy to ship your job overseas if it means a penny more in profit. They want to put Social Security and Medicare on the chopping block, ripping away working folks’ hard-earned benefits. Our country deserves better than Kevin McCarthy and the radical GOP. That’s why it’s all hands on deck to take back the House in 2024. If you’re with me, I’d be so grateful if you join my team by splitting a few dollars between my grassroots campaign and United Rural Democrats today. Thank you, and let’s get to work, — Chris Deluzio United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

body:

the team’s message about Howard Schutz’s plan to refuse to testify before
Bernie’s committee – he thinks he can get away with illegally ignoring the
coming subpoena just like he wrongly thinks he can break federal labor law
with impunity.

Howard Schultz and Starbucks have unlimited resources, but Bernie is using
his power to show them they’re not above the law — and he needs our help!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8349?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230305_FR_Starbucks_0_12MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_union&t=1009&akid=4084%2E5885482%2E5Wb6-W ]Pitch in here to help Our Revolution expose Howard Schultz’s criminal

Now, we have the opportunity to show him our appreciation and support by contributing to his campaign. Every dollar counts and will make a significant impact in helping him continue his work in Congress.

[**Will you join us in celebrating Congressman Stanton's birthday and supporting his campaign by making a donation today? subject: We need to know...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress
body:
| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=41497231dcc04894bbc0e4c1d8dfcdd1&_e=Um6bJeTx29o0NJXPTrM19Jr3Bv9etsCXo2_ZImdmgAd2RFXonM6HKjt0UM91zF1zo43sSLpB35ts6aKfsRELN3E9HaIi6HoiZ5sjRnV-IHY5jXSG9NV3pOtqcx6fCR5Hle_exzW_Lis13FkqTaYwxPHQgJoNojuKBu6024fyIAanjSCGl5yWV5llZJHrsunoN9l7KFjQAzXpX7GWal1PI2EFxT2uYLJbEq4Vlq4g1yqFCIV1P-h62ubuPnF-l9yCt8mOyyhebGkWkzqlglzF6CVsYOedOyMS6WmDvfsTdinFWzmXAsDZzm_8S4vgR6XlJNWiKWT-f-uv-35olZsKLo7SK8Kqr0GvrHGceFYFZVgpnInsEns9CpuuwFroSbxwBoMTB2ZJ434vPY1bk97yLDCiVoiP4aMLUVNsEXW-zDnGfp7K3yNc3z8hTrFWILQqS54DVzgTFzaCJ2JOozkJ-LaA3Fr-k0LSxyqYUejoCgc%3D)
---

Friend,

The reason I ran for office in the first place was to represent the people of Iowa and to try and solve issues to the best of my ability.

We’ve got more issues than you can shake a stick at going on in our country right now. I don’t want to take up too much of your time, but I would love to know which is most important to you.

So, if you could, would you mind taking the one question survey below to let me know what issue is most important to you, and what issue I should focus my efforts on **IMMEDIATELY?**
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=41497231dcc04894bbc0e4c1d8dfcdd1&_e=Um6bJeTx29o0NJXPTrM19Jr3Bv9etsCXo2_ZImdmgAd2RFXonM6HKjt0UM91zF1zo43sSLpB35ts6aKfsRELN3E9HaIi6HoiZ5sjRnV-IHY5jXSG9NV3pOtqcx6fCR5Hle_exzW_Lis13FkqTaYwxPHQgJoNojuKBu6024fyIAanjSCGl5yWV5llZJHrsunoN9l7KFjQAzXpX7GWal1PI2EFxT2uYLJbEq4Vlq4g1yqFCIV1P-h62ubuPnF-l9yCt8mOyyhebGkWkzqlglzF6CVsYOedOyMS6WmDvfsTdinFWzmXAsDZzm_8S4vgR6XlJNWiKWT-f-uv-35olZsKLkRuk7XX2YlwKITNrfcc8rAGIWN1LzFwA6YnsCZ8kZNc7TOkj_-5Wqz1RgF3CoEyjarsWiaKnl5W-VvkdGoWSToi-ev4j7PszxfaxVC-sYcTb2FsmuhcBSP08cCGMuRc77O1pAYcziDhjSPRe7EtmhA%3D)
---

I’m going to fight for you and for solutions to all these issues, but I just want to know where to focus my energy the most right now.

Thank you for letting me serve you.

God Bless,

[](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=41497231dcc04894bbc0e4c1d8dfcdd1&_e=Um6bJeTx29o0NJXPTrM19Jr3Bv9etsCXo2_ZImdmgAd2RFXonM6HKjt0UM91zF1zo43sSLpB35ts6aKfsRELN3E9HaIi6HoiZ5sjRnV-IHY5jXSG9NV3pOtqcx6fCR5Hle_exzW_Lis13FkqTaYwxPHQgJoNojuKBu6024fyIAanjSCGl5yWV5llZJHrsunoN9l7KFjQAzXpX7GWal1PI2EFxT2uYLJbEq4Vlq4g1yqFCIV1P-h62ubuPnF-l9yCt8mOyyhebGkWkzqlglzF6CVsYOedOyMS6WmDvfsTdinFWzmXAsDZzm_8S4vgR6XlJNWiKWT-f-uv-35olZsKLsYwOE8S-siUyAEqpftKjVekMLTUEnMFINldMO_t0Cu2ibgTwlwcEMqpfU92dkVAB2heo5jv1lgM0ZlvL2b66XEMqQofMHnYcZ21sWy72lKeIyjnQo1egE7zzTxpr4nTPmCv17doe86MQ_uurZIjcck%3D)

So, if you could, would you mind taking the one question survey below to let me know what issue is most important to you, and what issue I should focus my efforts on IMMEDIATELY? | I’m going to fight for you and for solutions to all these issues, but I just want to know where to focus my energy the most right now. From the mysterious Chinese spy balloons in the north to the chaos, violence, and drugs pouring in at our southern border, America is under attack. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Do what feels right for you today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I got into this job to serve, not to spend a ton of time calling donors and holding fundraisers.
#

Peter -
See this?
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar23.PJzORo&refcode=em230307-1-30-15gm&t=1&akid=441%2E734936%2ERnQGHd)
It’s a bill I introduced earlier this month.
I share it for two reasons: first, because it’s important legislation that deserves support. We have way too many missing indigenous women in this country and not enough attention to the problem.
But I also share it because while I am running for Senate, I am still a Congressman at the same time.
And the truth is, the response to emails like this one is generally so good that it really allows me to prioritize my work as a Congressman. That means the world to me, because **I got into this job to serve, not to spend a ton of time calling donors and holding fundraisers.**
But it also means I have to ask — especially with this being an FEC fundraising deadline month.
[**Can you please contribute $3 or whatever feels right for you today to help us report as large a number of donations as we possibly can when we file our FEC report?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar23.PJzORo&refcode=em230307-1-30-15gm&t=2&akid=441%2E734936%2ERnQGHd)
Just pick the amount that feels right here:
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: My latest business venture
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I am running for President to revive the ideals that made America great.

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztc9gbq4k9hvhoi0vv92aosvlcl6terf8q451gg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9i6eob2cth2bs)

Fellow American,

My name is Vivek Ramaswamy, and I'm running for president of the United States. You may know me from appearances on Fox News or from my book _Woke Inc._

At the age of 37, I've lived the full arch of the American Dream. I worked hard, and I got ahead. I'm running for president because I'm determined to help Americans like me, who want to work hard to get ahead - not based on their skin color, but based on merit. I am launching not only a political campaign but a cultural movement to create a new American Dream - one that is not only about money but about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself.

**Campaign Goals Overview**
**
* Embrace, revive & restore merit in the United States
* Provide economic independence from China
* Reclaim global energy leadership
**
It's been nearly 250 years since the greatest experiment man has ever undertaken began when breakaway colonists rebelled against the most formidable empire of the time and founded our democracy. You get national unity in this country by embracing the radicalism of the ideals that set this nation into motion 250 years ago. Unbridled meritocracy. Free speech. Self-governance. Yes, these are extreme ideas. If we don't continue to prioritize teaching our children and embracing those radical ideals that made this country exceptional, America as we know it will cease to exist.

I'm running for president because I have a vision - a firsthand understanding of how to revive our national identity and unify this great nation.

I'm running for president because complex times require a President who actually understands the issues firsthand. Not someone who memorized talking points out of a binder.

I'm willing to say the things that other Republicans believe but are too scared to say out loud. I'm willing to talk openly about the ailments that have brought our country to a halt.

**We need to stop apologizing for what it means to be American.** We are the greatest nation the world has ever known, but we deeply need to rediscover ourselves. That's going to require taking woke secular religions to the slaughterhouse. **It's time to stop credence to the climate change fanatics and the individuals who believe that affirmative action still has a place in our culture in the year 2023.**

**[Join my team today with a contribution of $1, $5, or even $15 right now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmk2thodhlaned9q2hhvocmi67c6mqcnsd631vr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9i6eob2cth2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4sqoa0q710cjeq42pqpfmk1351gjv1u770jdkpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9i6eob2cth2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziq9e1h7nfbqtvp9pu7ng849h1g1gmlupf2t7d5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9i6eob2cth2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $15 ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zletnub7g2q6u3ro3cjl9jivc7gvn3lsluhml3s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9i6eob2cth2bs) | | [Chip in _More_ ➔](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9q61d4ddu6vm2bi00t0v2kpr16lq7gteakeqing_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9i6eob2cth2bs)

We need a robust Republican Presidential Primary because we can't afford another four years of Democrat control of the White House. I believe I'm the best candidate for the job and **[would like the opportunity to earn your support.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk2uqrvfjreolait3gqu3v3iebsj4clnir3qd2f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9i6eob2cth2bs)**

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

Now is our moment to make a bold move. _**I hope you're with me, Fellow American.**_

For The New American Dream,

Vivek Ramaswamy

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztghuipooqs9c8jolm35j970ls8s1r0psce2a5eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9i6eob2cth2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqr6gqqo15uqfbf3l1kpfefggivv4ukatr8976a0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9i6eob2cth2bs)

---

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkdl1q5erp6n91ongd30ab3449ood09shnv0ra6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9i6eob2cth2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvkopedsdp17glsmfhpa0o6tm08lkka6i7g6kuug_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9i6eob2cth2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl2t39cojeudopao6tjahv1plm55gn0o0e6a7pf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9i6eob2cth2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2z06oqcf4bo13rh772ic44v225dvoh4pvnpt3iiho).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv5e9pvub2nm03of5epgl0l7qu71ocluv4ag1v6o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c3h68pr1c9jm49fg)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Radical leftists forcing gender transition surgery on children
body:
I’ve filed a groundbreaking new lawsuit against a hospital and the doctors that lied to a young girl and her family

| |
---
| |
---
**_“It’s well known that 80%, even up to 85% of children who experience gender dysphoria and cross sex identification feel differently when they reach puberty after the early phases of puberty.”_**
---
-Dr. Riittakerttu Kaltiala, Chief Psychiatrist, Tampere University Hospital and one of Finland’s leading experts on pediatric gender care
---
|
---
Fellow Patriot, I’ve filed a groundbreaking new lawsuit against a hospital and the doctors that lied to a young girl and her family, manipulating her into taking medication and having surgery to become a “boy.” In fact, my client and I joined Laura Ingraham the other night on her great Fox News show _Ingraham Angle_ to discuss the lawsuit and the dangerous lies that woke doctors are telling patients and their parents to push their radical ideology. [**Please take a moment right now to watch video from this primetime interview and learn what we’re up against in this monumental battle - then consider making a tax-deductible gift of $25 or more to help fund this critical lawsuit.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09221%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uBDMOtY%2fNMYZsnqEgYgo4w&sysid=1) Chloe Cole was just 9 years old when she was bombarded with transgender ideology. As a child Chloe was bombarded--largely through social media--with the idea that “transitioning” would make her special, accepted and popular. When she shared with her pediatrician that she felt uncomfortable as a girl, leftist activist doctors put her on an irreversible path to chemically and surgically "transitioning” her gender. At age 13, the doctors began pumping Chloe full of dangerous drugs with unknown long-term side effects. At 15, they performed a double mastectomy on her. And all of this happened because doctors lied and concealed less invasive treatment options from Chloe and her parents. They told her parents point blank that they could have a dead daughter or a live son. That’s right. A dead daughter or a living son. Those were their only options. (So they said.) EVEN THOUGH RESEARCH SHOWS THE VAST MAJORITY OF CHILDREN EXPERIENCING GENDER DYSPHORIA GET OVER IT AFTER PUBERTY BEGINS. Chloe Cole and her parents were lied to, coerced, and manipulated not only for monetary gain, but as part of a radical woke agenda that is being pushed on vulnerable children across the country. That’s why we’re not just suing Kaiser Permanente... **We’re suing Dr. Lisa Taylor** for prescribing testosterone and the dangerous puberty blocker Lupron Depot without doing ANY proper evaluation or treatment of Chloe’s other symptoms OR receiving any kind of informed consent from Chloe or her parents for puberty blockers. **We’re suing Dr. Hop Nguyen Le** for performing a double mastectomy without evaluating whether it was the right decision for Chloe, who was just 15 years old and for not obtaining proper informed consent to perform the surgery. **And we’re suing Dr. Susanna Watson** who recommended that Chloe have her breasts removed without evaluating Chloe’s mental or psychological condition. Additionally, she withheld information that may have changed Chloe’s mind about the surgery, including a litany of studies that show drugs and surgeries do not help children suffering from gender dysphoria. _If folks like you and I don’t stand up and fight back now, who will?_ [**Chloe deserves justice, and children deserve protection - so can we count on your tax-deductible donation of $25 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09222%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rKPbRXFAgaqQkaIYgykV5g&sysid=1) My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty because I saw an opportunity to use my legal expertise to fight for our values and restore the rights left-wing extremists are trying to rip from us. I put together a team of talented, trusted attorneys taking on cases like this not for fame or money, but because we love our country and our Constitution. Unfortunately legal battles aren’t free and the costs of these lawsuits pile up quickly. **But the Center for American Liberty takes these cases on anyway, going head-to-head with some of the most powerful and connected leftists in the country. And we win - but as a nonprofit organization, that’s only possible with your help.** In fact, Chloe Cole is just one of three clients we are representing on this issue, because we recognize just how serious of a threat it is to allow medical professionals to experiment with our children. I think this will be one of the most important cases in the history of our movement, and I hope you’ll be with us every step of the way. [**Can I count on your generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09223%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fY%2bLb%2fjEtERyZduraUugig&sysid=1) Winning this lawsuit for Chloe Cole won’t turn back the clock. Today Chloe faces medical issues stemming from the surgeries and medication. She will never be able to breastfeed a child - if she’s even able to get pregnant after poison coursed through her veins. Her life will never be “normal.” But winning this lawsuit will send a loud and clear message to every single doctor in America who is thinking of performing a gruesome and barbaric gender transition surgery on a child: **_There are steep financial consequences for lying to your patients and coercing young children and their parents into irreversible sex changes surgeries ... and we’re coming for you!_** My friend, you and I cannot sit back while vulnerable children are chemically castrated when what they need is counseling... while parents are fed the lie, “you can either have a dead daughter or a live son.” And we most certainly cannot sit back while money-hungry “Big Pharma” and woke doctors experiment on an entire generation of young Americans like lab rats. Thank you in advance for your help taking on Chloe Cole’s case and stopping this outrageous medical malpractice - and attack on American children - in its tracks.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | **[DONATE](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09224%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ljDYWzDiqUdFzaryUr6GIg&sysid=1)**
---
P.S. Doctors told Chloe and her parents from the beginning that nothing was permanent. They told her she could change her mind if she wanted to, but when she did exactly that, they shrugged their shoulders at her, told her there was nothing they could do and chalked it up to “just another part of her gender journey.” Because they’d already gotten what they wanted from her family. P.P.S. We must put a stop to this. Doctors have abandoned their sacred oath in the pursuit of payouts, and we must make them pay. [**Please make a generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today, and give our lawyers the resources they need to win this crucial fight.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09235%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4I%2ftRfqwB5UmRtQMb40LvQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
---
| |
---

Dan Bishop

name: Michael Hagg - AdoptaPlatoon
subject: Please sponsor a Care Package today
body:
Requests from our Troops are flooding into our warehouse... | |
---
| Dear Peter, This is an especially emotional time for our Troops and their families. They are living with so much uncertainty... It's been about a year since Russia invaded Ukraine and no one expected this conflict to continue so long. Extended deployments and rotations are continuing longer than originally planned. The Ukrainians have suffered many losses, but they are enduring and continue to fiercely fight to hold on to their country. Due to Russia's economic, social and military power, it is extremely difficult for many other nations to assist Ukraine. It truly is a political quagmire. However, there are countries that are doing what they can to help, including the U.S. This aid consists of accepting Ukrainian refuges and providing them with food, shelter, clothing, and various humanitarian assistance. The U.S. and many of its allies have also recently provided weapon systems, military training, armored vehicles, anti-aircraft missiles and coastal defense ships. And most recently, the 101st Airborne Division (the Screaming Eagles) has been moved to southeast Romania, the closest to the Russian border that the U.S. has dared to go since the start of this conflict. Reports tell us that this location is near to where Moscow is amassing weapons and our Troops are there building trenches, staging helicopter attacks, and performing artillery exercises. |
---
Unfortunately, Russia has newly deployed tens of thousands additional troops to the front lines in Ukraine, however, with this latest move, the Screaming Eagles are well positioned to provide a robust deterrent and defensive posture alongside U.S. Allies.
In addition, due to North Korea's unprecedented number of missile fires in 2022, and then their decision to fire three short-range ballistic missiles toward the sea east of the Korean Peninsula at the end of December, has resulted in an agreement between the U.S and South Korea to expand their joint military efforts.
There are currently 28,500 U.S. Service Members stationed in South Korea who maintain security on the Korean Peninsula and stability in Northeast Asia, however with the heightened, aggressive moves by North Korea, more deployments are expected. The expanded U.S. actions will stretch from Japan to the Solomon Islands involving advanced military exercises in the region and additional troop rotations in key areas facing the Taiwan Strait and South China Sea.
As tensions heat up around the world, and more of our Troops are activated, is it any wonder that requests for support from our deployed (and soon to be deployed) Service Members are increasing?
**And AdoptaPlatoon, with the support of patriotic Americans across the U.S., responds to every one of their requests as quickly as possible. And we have for 25 years now...**
Check out this email we received last year from two of our long-time supporters:
**From:** Dawn Reall
**Sent:** Wednesday, April 06, 2022 11:01 AM
**To:** info@AdoptaPlatoon.org
**Subject:** My son deployed Hello, My name is Dawn Reall and my husband, Gus, and I have been donating $33 a month for several years and I believe we once provided socks to an entire platoon. Our son, **XXXXXX XXXX** , was deployed to **XXXXX** about two months ago for his 9 month deployment. The other day he sent us a picture of the attached letter and boy it really made my day. First, that he knows we have been doing this for years and now his entire group knows too, secondly that he received a box from us and lastly that it was proof too me that our money goes where you said it was going. So, thank you for all that you do and all the other people involved with this program! Dawn and Gus Reall
---

---
---
Isn't that amazing?
Dawn's and Gus' words of support truly warmed my heart and I hope they touch you as well and help you understand how much your Care Packages mean to our Service Members and their families.
I also hope that you will lend your support to our brave men and women in uniform.
For a one-time gift of $38, your Care Package will be chocked-full of items that our Service Members have requested including hand sanitizer, cleansing wipes, field dental kits, nail clippers, bootlaces, and socks.
| [Click here to send your Care Package to a brave soldier!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404755:6SGV-aGN6:m:1:3365131770:B8D26C4165156C798F573956BB65596E:r)
---
Your Care Package will also include soap, shampoo and a shaving kit (Operation Clean Shave) plus other personal hygiene and quality-of-life items. And, as winter is upon them, hand warmers and blankets will be sent and, of course, special treats to remind them of home, such as Pop-Tarts®, Kellogg's® Rice Krispies Treats (a favorite), beef sticks, tuna packets, trail mix, and cookies.
And perhaps most importantly, each Care Package contains an encouraging note with your words of support and appreciation boosting the morale of our Troops! Perhaps your Care Package will get into the hands of a Service Member that you know like Dawn and Gus' did!
---
##### "Many words of gratitude to the American people who make sure AdoptaPlatoon continues to send support to U.S. deployed Troops."
**[Please sponsor a Care Package today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404755:6SGV-aGN6:m:1:3365131770:B8D26C4165156C798F573956BB65596E:r)** Your Care Package is guaranteed to lift the morale of an Airman, Guardsman, Marine, Sailor or Soldier serving on our behalf so far from home.
On behalf of those who serve,
---
Michael Henry Hagg
Executive Director

clean_body: Requests from our Troops are flooding into our warehouse... | | | Dear Peter, This is an especially emotional time for our Troops and their families. They are living with so much uncertainty... It's been about a year since Russia invaded Ukraine and no one expected this conflict to continue so long. Extended deployments and rotations are continuing longer than originally planned. The Ukrainians have suffered many losses, but they are enduring and continue to fiercely fight to hold on to their country. Due to Russia's economic, social and military power, it is extremely difficult for many other nations to assist Ukraine. It truly is a political quagmire. However, there are countries that are doing what they can to help, including the U.S. This aid consists of accepting Ukrainian refuges and providing them with food, shelter, clothing, and various humanitarian assistance. The U.S. and many of its allies have also recently provided weapon systems, military training, armored vehicles, anti-aircraft missiles and coastal defense ships. And most recently, the 101st Airborne Division (the Screaming Eagles) has been moved to southeast Romania, the closest to the Russian border that the U.S. has dared to go since the start of this conflict. Reports tell us that this location is near to where Moscow is amassing weapons and our Troops are there building trenches, staging helicopter attacks, and performing artillery exercises. | Unfortunately, Russia has newly deployed tens of thousands additional troops to the front lines in Ukraine, however, with this latest move, the Screaming Eagles are well positioned to provide a robust deterrent and defensive posture alongside U.S. Allies. In addition, due to North Korea's unprecedented number of missile fires in 2022, and then their decision to fire three short-range ballistic missiles toward the sea east of the Korean Peninsula at the end of December, has resulted in an agreement between the U.S and South Korea to expand their joint military efforts. There are currently 28,500 U.S. Service Members stationed in South Korea who maintain security on the Korean Peninsula and stability in Northeast Asia, however with the heightened, aggressive moves by North Korea, more deployments are expected. The expanded U.S. actions will stretch from Japan to the Solomon Islands involving advanced military exercises in the region and additional troop rotations in key areas facing the Taiwan Strait and South China Sea. As tensions heat up around the world, and more of our Troops are activated, is it any wonder that requests for support from our deployed (and soon to be deployed) Service Members are increasing? And AdoptaPlatoon, with the support of patriotic Americans across the U.S., responds to every one of their requests as quickly as possible. And we have for 25 years now... Check out this email we received last year from two of our long-time supporters: From: Dawn Reall Sent: Wednesday, April 06, 2022 11:01 AM To: info@AdoptaPlatoon.org Subject: My son deployed Hello, My name is Dawn Reall and my husband, Gus, and I have been donating $33 a month for several years and I believe we once provided socks to an entire platoon. | | As our team gets underway for [**Rick Scott’s 67-county Florida tour**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=96ffc646949f4a0fa2d004df040acb3a&_e=fG6bPOcP60UN0JcXoO-Z2zgCVxOXnp_3cxA5ZOR_y5vY82tKeb5HWokX54imqdjV9Wn6Ro0YtOvN_zkxr5SrEdfzA7LfvyMBocI78UDZVBWZHswbrY9GGfE_6qR7saKaRbwGXW0k0DHvpex3AfgEuEQJeQlGPwBlEA_ys9PG5Rou0LLlzapXbSwz0T6loweKDi12MqDNoc04UO9O5iVb64r7ZCe8rV_jbgUwyKuSbSlnJMjZV-SxgzLnUHzufqNJwmjz-bfg7f7Dp3ne6bki5OTI0WW8yIELOykD4MFDro6bFRob4pC_9XobBRgYAuErBLVCfJLGRPFJPBLXUnkV-YtswcOPw0t6YKGrHYQ5bsG9rl6cx0ULjdJ_66PibMlz) , we’ve been honored to meet so many of you.

Some of the greatest patriots in our country today live in Florida, and your dedication to conservatism keeps our state shining bright.

From talking to Rick, here are some of the takeaways we’ve seen so far:
1. Floridians want woke OUT of our schools. Our priority is educating our children and keeping them safe from the radical Left’s lies.
2. Florida is BOOMING. Our state is open for business, and the incredible small businesses we’ve been visiting across the Sunshine State make us proud to be Floridians.

4. _But this is just the beginning, and we still have SO many more amazing Floridians to visit across our state._

Whether we’ve been able to meet you so far or not, Peter, we want YOU to be a part of this journey.

name: Cherise Trump, Speech First
subject: I was punished because my name is “Trump”
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews._xIedg)
---
Fellow American, **Trinity University in Texas labeled me an "elevated risk" for their school's security ..._simply because my last name is Trump!_** That's right... before I can step foot on campus for my event promoting Free Speech Rights, my organization, Speech First, is being forced to pay for special liability insurance. In fact, my hosts, the Young Conservatives of Texas, tell me they have NEVER seen this happen to a speaker before. [**Will you join me in telling the Trinity University leadership that they should overturn this****outrageous decision? Add your name to our open letter right now.** ](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[Stand with Speech First](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Fellow American, even if I _were_ related to President Trump (I'm no relation), Trinity University would still be making a bad call - and setting a dangerous anti-free-speech precedent. Not only is it wrong to burden anyone who shares a name with a famous political conservative ... but it also caters to the "Woke" student mob in trying to preemptively silence anyone far-left students might find objectionable. Put simply, when school administrators let "Woke" student protestors hold their schools hostage, this is where the next generation - and our educational system - ends up: A small number of far-left student activists are feared and coddled, while free speech and free thinking suffer! **After all, do you think this would be happening if my last name were Biden, Obama, or Clinton instead?** I don't think so! Fellow American, let's add one more win for free speech to Speech First's Texas Victory Tour. [**Add your name to Speech First's open letter right now to tell Trinity University to overturn their outrageous decision ... and show their support for free thinking and free speech instead.** ](http://trk.readactnews.) There's barely any time left, and I urgently need you to sign this Open Letter and stand with me against the Leftist Administrators at Trinity University. Thank you for your support!
---
Cherise TrumpSpeech First
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[Stand with Speech First](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
1300 I St NW Suite 400EWashington, DC 20005
---

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m up for re-election and I need your help, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
I’m up for re-election in 2024, friend, and as one of just three Democrats in states Trump won and the only remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I’m a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. _(__There's already a Republican vying for the GOP nomination.)_
NBC says my race could be “even nastier and more expensive” than last year’s Senate race in Ohio – and that race was one of the most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent.
**[Frankly, it’s going to be my toughest race yet, but if we work together, we can win in Ohio. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and American Bridge PAC as we begin the new year?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59799478/395141575/-1708609261?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2326-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxYzU1ZDZjLWY5YmMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gEDMuGhwUU92-w6anaUmGjBf0VE4Eh-3EZaHXXy2J7o=)**
I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio. I went to school with the sons and daughters of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. Eventually, those jobs disappeared as one big plant after another left town. Every day, I fight in the U.S. Senate to bring those jobs back to our state and to put money back in the pockets of hardworking families.
I wear a canary pin that a steelworker gave to me years ago – a reminder that workers used to have to take a canary with them to the coal mines in case there was dangerous gas. The pin is a symbol of the progress we’ve made on workers’ rights and the work we still have left to do.
Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by.
That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about, friend. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do – whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips – your work has dignity and I’ll fight for you.
[**I need you in this fight, too friend. It won’t be easy, but if we organize, work hard, and start early, I know we can do this. Please consider chipping in $15 – or whatever amount makes the most sense for you – to my campaign and American Bridge PAC.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59799482/395141578/-1708609261?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2326-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxYzU1ZDZjLWY5YmMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gEDMuGhwUU92-w6anaUmGjBf0VE4Eh-3EZaHXXy2J7o=)

subject: Let's Make Tennessee the Progressive Center of the South
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
March 7, 2022
Dear friend,
Now more than ever, we need to uplift & support Democrats all across Tennessee. Recently our state has made national news for right-wing attacks on our marginalized communities.
We won't let them have the last word.
There are Democrats running in every corner of the state that will advocate for the needs of working families, expand healthcare access, and do something about climate change. TVP will be reaching out to these candidates throughout the year, starting now, and we'll do all we can to make sure they win.
HELP TVP SUPPORT TENNESSEE DEMOCRATS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
We want to register and turnout thousands of voters for upcoming elections. The work starts now and we need your support. Can you donate $23 towards TVP efforts in 2023 to support Democrats [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1] ?
Thank you for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

---
| | I need you to understand what’s happening, Peter.

[**1.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59825361/395205522/1662333042?refcode=20230307_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTlkMGVkOS0yNmJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=imp0P0JnVv7dSxGQQSVje832S4cE0hqP_XX3GPQEn_8=) Analysts revealed the battle for House control is a _toss-up_.

[**2.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59825365/395205524/1662333042?refcode=20230307_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTlkMGVkOS0yNmJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=imp0P0JnVv7dSxGQQSVje832S4cE0hqP_XX3GPQEn_8=) Extreme MAGA Republicans launched a massive new “Protect the House” fundraising operation to hold their majority.

[**3.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59825368/395205526/1662333042?refcode=20230307_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTlkMGVkOS0yNmJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=imp0P0JnVv7dSxGQQSVje832S4cE0hqP_XX3GPQEn_8=) The GOP raised an unprecedented $12 million in one night to block Democrats from retaking the House. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: The ‘CEO of anti-woke’
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I am running for President to revive the ideals that made America great.

| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09230%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=enGd6u4o563kte1yCumwdw&sysid=1)

Fellow American,

My name is Vivek Ramaswamy, and I'm running for president of the United States. You may know me from appearances on Fox News or from my book _Woke Inc._

At the age of 37, I've lived the full arch of the American Dream. I worked hard, and I got ahead. I'm running for president because I'm determined to help Americans like me, who want to work hard to get ahead - not based on their skin color, but based on merit. I am launching not only a political campaign but a cultural movement to create a new American Dream - one that is not only about money but about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself.

**Campaign Goals Overview**
**
* Embrace, revive & restore merit in the United States
* Provide economic independence from China
* Reclaim global energy leadership
**
It's been nearly 250 years since the greatest experiment man has ever undertaken began when breakaway colonists rebelled against the most formidable empire of the time and founded our democracy. You get national unity in this country by embracing the radicalism of the ideals that set this nation into motion 250 years ago. Unbridled meritocracy. Free speech. Self-governance. Yes, these are extreme ideas. If we don't continue to prioritize teaching our children and embracing those radical ideals that made this country exceptional, America as we know it will cease to exist.

I'm running for president because I have a vision - a firsthand understanding of how to revive our national identity and unify this great nation.

I'm running for president because complex times require a President who actually understands the issues firsthand. Not someone who memorized talking points out of a binder.

I'm willing to say the things that other Republicans believe but are too scared to say out loud. I'm willing to talk openly about the ailments that have brought our country to a halt.

**We need to stop apologizing for what it means to be American.** We are the greatest nation the world has ever known, but we deeply need to rediscover ourselves. That's going to require taking woke secular religions to the slaughterhouse. **It's time to stop credence to the climate change fanatics and the individuals who believe that affirmative action still has a place in our culture in the year 2023.**

**[Join my team today with a contribution of $1, $5, or even $15 right now.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09231%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2scovGeiwF1F5Ed3GNHnNg&sysid=1)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09232%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q4kejtiImk3rT1kmKE1RzA&sysid=1) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09233%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fmtZyx4hNv9ie1OzFHwt8Q&sysid=1)
---|---|---
[Chip in $15 ➔](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09234%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mvs%2bl6%2bTC%2f72V9h81CCr9Q&sysid=1) | | [Chip in _More_ ➔](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09245%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=12cgdCCGamjhCyHOOrm2%2bQ&sysid=1)

We need a robust Republican Presidential Primary because we can't afford another four years of Democrat control of the White House. I believe I'm the best candidate for the job and **[would like the opportunity to earn your support.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09246%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V5WtHhghvI3dMIB37e4nyA&sysid=1)**

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

Now is our moment to make a bold move. _**I hope you're with me, Fellow American.**_

For The New American Dream,

Vivek Ramaswamy

[** DONATE TODAY →**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09247%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SJlOxhzceypblMfyGxj2dA&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09248%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gck98O%2fpDwGqDQGj0FAZkg&sysid=1)

---

| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09249%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RQfBlzEdodQW7sRisnLi4Q&sysid=1) | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09240%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9HP92NG%2fBv71kfMfqOnbTQ&sysid=1) | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09241%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y0zgQBkY25zXyJqv%2fJlP3g&sysid=1)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

subject: We need you to STAY on our team. Renew your 2023 Membership today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6fiq9q5k4rgfeuil7jr9fq8e4hk0sne5m045fd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h68oj4shh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj12pu8vt1u9ba7ld36a0cr7qhfgeo1o04e2d28g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h68oj4shh2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zauva1lh36gnqqfsm1gsrd6l1rejkbekuacvpen8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h68oj4shh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0jkauh7jlm48m9ro7toihtf7r3p8g1cttrv49d0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h68oj4shh2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4j0i0hjc1p61ghvtl1pqu9q5gqq6vdr4h1aml2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h68oj4shh2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2ravdfj2t057l9dggadrjvu4hleh5fjp98liurg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h68oj4shh2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3uoduvk5sn6me939jsuphh0lem863j4ogh5ht2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h68oj4shh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm30d62qhfah8h4veblc4o7r5fetih50oi12u4eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h68oj4shh2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zavjdtm7jat5fba6nu654es9qucq6v0hmopc4hao_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h68oj4shh2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbqahia9on7jhkskh88sd181ki728h3lodu5o8h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h68oj4shh2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

Now the next step towards saving our country is underway, and House Republicans need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. **[Step up and claim your 2023 House Majority Membership today!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5is1kgmq8pmkf2k89r8ivq25sii66n6ghamp298_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h68oj4shh2bs "Step up and claim your 2023 House Majority Membership today!")**
