name: Frances Hui
subject: Do you know what living without freedom is like?
body:
The CCP imposed a national security law that cracked down on political activism in Hong Kong.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkdbm41q3egqbmprcj6s8a9u23b83cgk2vr7m9j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h68pb1c5h2bs)

Friend,

I grew up in Hong Kong, a city that was once free. When I was 14, I got involved in social movements as a student in Hong Kong.

Then the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) cracked down and started stealing our freedom.

The CCP imposed a national security law that cracked down on political activism in Hong Kong. _Offenders could face penalties of up to life in prison_.

**Friend, the CCP is the ultimate surveillance state. They are known for silencing the opposition, human rights abuses, and persecuting people for their religion. **

Their takeover of Hong Kong left no family, town, or life untouched.

My name is Frances Hui, a speaker with the Dissident Project and the first Hong Kong activist to receive political asylum in America.

The Dissident Project provides high schools with access to informed, intelligent perspectives from speakers who have lived under current and former socialist states worldwide.

And I've set a goal to raise $15,000 this month to support our work as we reach thousands of students with the true horrors of communism.

[_**Friend, will you with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zut6kfn7il4q4rncdqn3kll7k3r9gr2m48efmd3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h68pb1c5h2bs)

The Dissident Project hosts speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Eritrea,
and Venezuela with unique stories that high schoolers need to hear.

We undergo a rigorous audition and training process. There we learn to communicate our experiences in a _powerful but compassionate_ way.

And our speakers are in high demand!

**Our dissidents have already completed over 20 speeches across the country, with four upcoming speeches on the books. **

We're gearing up for a busy spring, which is why I'm emailing you today.

The Dissident Project is a not-for-profit endeavor. We don't charge schools for access to our speakers, so their testimonies are more accessible to all. **But to keep our services completely free, we rely on the generosity of people like you. **

**Will you chip in today and support the Dissident Project?**

[_**Donate $10 >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2ajduvfg03463bqdphr9l5cl6bgp1vt5felc5p0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h68pb1c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl7a2sf5uj8ef1ia8l2d39abd1lqioq4ecgu632g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h68pb1c5h2bs)

**I want to share my story with students across America. **

This might be the only time these high school students get to hear the truth about how life in Hong Kong has radically changed since being under the thumb of the CCP.

Students should be thankful that they live in a country that protects our freedoms - the right to free speech, protest, and gather together to share ideas.

_**But these freedoms are often taken for granted.**_

American students need to understand how dangerous communism is to the freedoms we hold dear. Our experiences remind them how easily they can lose their freedom and how hard it is to try and get it back when it's gone.

Your generous gift will give high school students a lesson they will carry with them for a lifetime.

clean_body: The CCP imposed a national security law that cracked down on political activism in Hong Kong. Friend, I grew up in Hong Kong, a city that was once free. When I was 14, I got involved in social movements as a student in Hong Kong. Then the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) cracked down and started stealing our freedom. The CCP imposed a national security law that cracked down on political activism in Hong Kong. Offenders could face penalties of up to life in prison. Friend, the CCP is the ultimate surveillance state. They are known for silencing the opposition, human rights abuses, and persecuting people for their religion. Their takeover of Hong Kong left no family, town, or life untouched. My name is Frances Hui, a speaker with the Dissident Project and the first Hong Kong activist to receive political asylum in America. The Dissident Project provides high schools with access to informed, intelligent perspectives from speakers who have lived under current and former socialist states worldwide. And I've set a goal to raise $15,000 this month to support our work as we reach thousands of students with the true horrors of communism. The Dissident Project hosts speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Eritrea, and Venezuela with unique stories that high schoolers need to hear. We undergo a rigorous audition and training process. There we learn to communicate our experiences in a powerful but compassionate way. And our speakers are in high demand! Our dissidents have already completed over 20 speeches across the country, with four upcoming speeches on the books. We're gearing up for a busy spring, which is why I'm emailing you today. The Dissident Project is a not-for-profit endeavor. We don't charge schools for access to our speakers, so their testimonies are more accessible to all. But to keep our services completely free, we rely on the generosity of people like you. Will you chip in today and support the Dissident Project? I want to share my story with students across America. This might be the only time these high school students get to hear the truth about how life in Hong Kong has radically changed since being under the thumb of the CCP. Students should be thankful that they live in a country that protects our freedoms - the right to free speech, protest, and gather together to share ideas. But these freedoms are often taken for granted. American students need to understand how dangerous communism is to the freedoms we hold dear. Our experiences remind them how easily they can lose their freedom and how hard it is to try and get it back when it's gone. Your generous gift will give high school students a lesson they will carry with them for a lifetime. Thank you, Frances Hui The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Mullin?=
subject: Public service runs in my family
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Public service and labor union heritage runs deep in my family. | | | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=3ae458d836&e=292fde286a)
---
| Hi Peter,

Public service and labor union heritage runs deep in my family.

My great grandfather was an immigrant from Northern Ireland, and I recently learned that he was a South San Francisco elections worker, while also a member of the railroad union. My grandfather was a member of the Machinists’ union while working at Bayview-Hunters Point. And my father, Gene Mullin, was a high school civics teacher for 30+ years while also heading the local teachers’ union, before becoming a mayor and an Assemblymember. I share in their dedication to fair elections and championing voting rights and workers’ rights.

I’m honored to celebrate their service (and our Irish heritage) this St. Patrick’s Day. [Will you join me to celebrate St. Patrick’s Day on Wednesday, March 15th, in Millbrae? I hope you can make it.](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=0d0fc5fec2&e=292fde286a)

Thank you for your support, see you soon.
---
| Sincerely,
Kevin Mullin

disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807458/395154977/265476937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGY1ZGYxZS0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M0ANuCNVcAh_0j_iY-N0QdqlPocJ3gGPWciNxq0GDTs=)

**Peter, this election cycle, reproductive freedom was on the ballot.**

And Americans in several states – from Kentucky to Vermont – resoundingly rejected the GOP’s attempts to take away our right to choose. Peter, this is an incredibly powerful first step in our fight to protect reproductive rights after Roe v. Wade was overturned – but we cannot relent.

**[Peter, will you add your name now to my petition to protect reproductive rights? I need 592 more signatures before midnight tonight, and I’m still missing YOUR response.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807459/395154978/1753456815?code=jtk1006-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-repro-rights-0223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGY1ZGYxZS0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M0ANuCNVcAh_0j_iY-N0QdqlPocJ3gGPWciNxq0GDTs=&emci=5b5bb325-0db9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f0f5df1e-01bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807460/395154979/1753456815?code=jtk1006-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-repro-rights-0223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGY1ZGYxZS0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M0ANuCNVcAh_0j_iY-N0QdqlPocJ3gGPWciNxq0GDTs=&emci=5b5bb325-0db9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f0f5df1e-01bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
Now that Democrats have officially lost the House of Representatives, reproductive rights continue to be in a precarious position. **That’s why I’m calling on fearless fighters like you to step up now and join my fight to protect the right to choose.

Let me be clear:** I will not accept a future where Americans are denied access to essential health care products and services. Since the moment Roe v. Wade was struck down this summer, I’ve fought tirelessly to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care, and I’m proud to say that we’ve already made _real_ progress.

I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund – all because I know that abortion access is a social justice issue.

**But, Peter, we can only win this fight for reproductive freedom if we _all_ work together. That’s why I set a goal to collect 5,000 signatures on my reproductive rights petition before midnight tonight — and I’m counting on you to step up now.

[Will you please take 30 seconds to add your name to my petition to protect reproductive rights? With the House now under Republican control, we cannot lose our momentum in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807461/395154980/1753456815?code=jtk1006-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-repro-rights-0223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGY1ZGYxZS0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M0ANuCNVcAh_0j_iY-N0QdqlPocJ3gGPWciNxq0GDTs=&emci=5b5bb325-0db9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f0f5df1e-01bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807462/395154981/1753456815?code=jtk1006-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-repro-rights-0223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGY1ZGYxZS0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M0ANuCNVcAh_0j_iY-N0QdqlPocJ3gGPWciNxq0GDTs=&emci=5b5bb325-0db9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f0f5df1e-01bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)

Thank you for standing with me to defend reproductive rights for every last person.

Letitia

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: No one expected me to run for elected office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
and not many people expected me to win either
| | |
---
Friend, I want to tell you a little bit about why fighting for American families in the U.S. Senate is so important to me. **[My work is made possible by this grassroots team so, if you’re able, I hope you split a contribution of any amount between myself and Maggie Hassan to help me keep going.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807578/395155379/1690237438?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk2224-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2Y1ZGYxZS0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5VBnVYDy_CKc-rhoVOmIeU8IbogR5895p076-MRKQKw=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807581/395155384/1690237438?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk2224-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2Y1ZGYxZS0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5VBnVYDy_CKc-rhoVOmIeU8IbogR5895p076-MRKQKw=)
Every day, I’m reminded of the fact that I stand on the shoulders of those before me. I am the daughter of a newspaperman and a teacher and the granddaughter of an iron ore miner who saved his money in a coffee can in the basement to send my dad to college. No one expected me to run for elected office – and not many people expected me to win either.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807586/395155387/1690237438?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk2224-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2Y1ZGYxZS0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5VBnVYDy_CKc-rhoVOmIeU8IbogR5895p076-MRKQKw=)
**But thanks to supporters like you, our grassroots movement beat the odds, and I became the first woman elected to the U.S. Senate from Minnesota._That’s the American dream in action. _**
Every day since then I’ve been fighting for progress. And I want you to know:
**I will never stop fighting to build a nation that works for working families. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807591/395155392/1690237438?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk2224-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2Y1ZGYxZS0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5VBnVYDy_CKc-rhoVOmIeU8IbogR5895p076-MRKQKw=)
**[But I can’t do it alone, friend. That's why I'm so thankful to have grassroots supporters like you by my side. If you can, I’m asking you to split a quick donation between myself and Maggie Hassan today to help me continue this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807597/395155397/1690237438?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk2224-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2Y1ZGYxZS0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5VBnVYDy_CKc-rhoVOmIeU8IbogR5895p076-MRKQKw=)**
Thank you so much – this team has never let me down.
– Amy
| If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, **[donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807603/395155403/-1829049351?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2Y1ZGYxZS0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5VBnVYDy_CKc-rhoVOmIeU8IbogR5895p076-MRKQKw=)**. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807609/395155414/-1829049351?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2Y1ZGYxZS0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5VBnVYDy_CKc-rhoVOmIeU8IbogR5895p076-MRKQKw=) This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59807615/395155427/-2088849429?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2Y1ZGYxZS0wMWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5VBnVYDy_CKc-rhoVOmIeU8IbogR5895p076-MRKQKw=&emci=53bebe5d-41b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ecf5df1e-01bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5452893).

Click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/5x7qQEMIdEm9NbaCyLloaw2?unsubscribedata=l0BC%2BzUyw5cgF0V%2B7F4rxeimXDYnagubsAeQDpxD1n5MsHeaf5SIAIky96Y7lAsSDoVStxJfRBBsZCeePt2s1%2FoJmrUEiKY2hsyVKa%2FsBTZt7e7exEIRONA%2B4q2aOBceXEHGlGoP1isoFyvYlAQtoo5Eao4UQ2wWBPsejvjDBVV1Dr4%2BXm6CJTEfsKVxPBRiDda9uebHVWzGOSzrIbFMla6%2FVyh7jkBygcbEnRftOe2obVEvN%2FIuqmCu6CfjANvNgqkMVayi7c3xlNpPPuPgFFOOA2gnWO%2BL%2BS%2FfUR7IpUiEBqgPMcX%2FsjaKujUGgkIKfQYdLEBWEHoOC7CD7N2h4L2aJM%2Br2QpNKYMipu17aun5d6wy0pZxSYv6INUvZTwSB5DJByikCR5UhqRBJmAdsCzyp8fTgq1sOGS9BUNMJ%2Bs%3D). Concord, NH 03302

name: 2023 Membership Services
subject: We need you to STAY on our team. Renew your 2023 Membership today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znvgspivnqic1uiqunfdrhva436e4gakbsh2s0to_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h64o72chh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z41jl6e4n757k3i5h7l9c5kas52053f7sgp4f150_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h64o72chh2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn9v6q7ntpf1askpgpk4mvm2bm8ng55n190qg8q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h64o72chh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zuf8ti542ek2ug5iev8et7lrfe3e2jt004s6k3b8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h64o72chh2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk8uusobi029uospj55tumdbria20pbu5h9vj1og_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h64o72chh2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqkm1n16l79b1hamk65pno37eh74nle951drm8b0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h64o72chh2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkdalgu07iq4p36vsqh7m9k9ht926md5foasqa7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h64o72chh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zens7qn18ruu5q8pn3r6v34ngbkdbr6lc9b4v80o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9h64o72chh2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

subject: Don't forget! ☘️ Join us this Saturday
body:
Our St. Patrick's Day celebration is this weekend—will I see you there? | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/37cdd3be5fd4/join-us-st-patricks-day-celebration-321793?e=0e0cd0261a)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

It's almost time for one of the biggest celebrations of the year—St. Patrick's Day! Missi and I hope you can join us _**this Saturday, March 11**_ for Carlson Meissner Hayslett's [Annual St. Patrick's Day Celebration](https://kevinhayslett.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=578edd77573c702fac79c7bf2&id=1302a0cbe7&e=0e0cd0261a).

What started out as a small gathering has now grown into an annual bash that's a chance to catch up with old friends and new. The party is this [**Saturday, March 11 at 5:00 p.m.**](https://kevinhayslett.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=578edd77573c702fac79c7bf2&id=cfe6760568&e=0e0cd0261a)—it'll be an unforgettable night of FREE food, drinks, and fun that you won't want to miss!

We even have Dunedin's world-famous bagpipers on the guest list (okay, they may be Scottish, but they wear kilts just like the Irish—that counts, right?!).

---
| [RSVP Now!](https://kevinhayslett.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=578edd77573c702fac79c7bf2&id=5a81e9917c&e=0e0cd0261a "RSVP Now!")

---
| **WHAT:** Carlson Meissner Hayslett's Annual St. Patrick's Day Party
**WHERE:** Enter at 2165 NE Coachman Road, Clearwater
**WHEN:** Saturday, March 11 @ 5:00 p.m.

---
| [RSVP Now!](https://kevinhayslett.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=578edd77573c702fac79c7bf2&id=b336407abc&e=0e0cd0261a "RSVP Now!")
---
| We would love to see all of you to celebrate spring and our wonderful St. Patrick's Day holiday tradition. Please let us know you're coming by sending your RSVP today!

Sláinte!
---
| **Kevin & Missi**

| | Peter,

We don’t have to tell you that Tucker Carlson and Marjorie Taylor Greene represent some of the worst extremes of the GOP.

We’ve all seen and heard their racist, divisive antics. We’ve all watched them fearmonger and spew hateful MAGA extremism.

Hi friend,
From the entire team, I want to thank you for your support with our February fundraising goal. We had a record-breaking month for online fundraising – and that's all thanks to you!
We are setting the right pace to power our campaign for the weeks leading up to our June Primary Election.
Now we can continue expanding our grassroots outreach, organize in every neighborhood of our district, and deliver our message directly to voters.
Thank you!

name: Kat Cammack
subject: How we can stop the Border Crisis
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012gkORvXtZcaWnYue67rkKMYGkK7Gd7GkqjCLR-n4Q4vGNkaHrHKozWGtSE7AeZmdUm5QaOTNqjoAsAn9ZyUor0GHr7Fa_6YXQ7oNucO9O6yIoAaD2cseopFCxi_mRqJ2nMvLIdU2xIFuMPX_cy5DOk27wAlaEk_rR643yv9DlvFyWEs4zSFmDQ_3M0ALNl6iQU2jBVb_pqBAiDDJtmMmgfEK1eLTGHjw&c=aCra457S1Y1rIT5xbfuL45SE05PyiGb4Y4QEq6CCKJlvJh8LcBEqYw==&ch=PfJTdYLWK3zg6txEKh4sA01rOOQ3A2tIosxs4LB33MF2Vr-iaGj50Q==)
---
| Friend
Millions of illegal immigrants have been encountered at the Southern Border since Biden took office. His administration has released countless immigrants into the INTERIOR of our nation... and that's not including those who escaped federal custody!
And while we have small-time criminals entering our neighborhoods, the cartels in Mexico are making billions -- they've used migrants to traffic thousands of pounds of dangerous drugs into America, including fentanyl.
I recently was on Fox News and shed light on what's really going on at our Southern Border.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012gkORvXtZcaWnYue67rkKMYGkK7Gd7GkqjCLR-n4Q4vGNkaHrHKozWGtSE7AeZmdUm5QaOTNqjoAsAn9ZyUor0GHr7Fa_6YXQ7oNucO9O6yIoAaD2cseopFCxi_mRqJ2nMvLIdU2xIFuMPX_cy5DOk27wAlaEk_rR643yv9DlvFyWEs4zSFmDQ_3M0ALNl6iQU2jBVb_pqBAiDDJtmMmgfEK1eLTGHjw&c=aCra457S1Y1rIT5xbfuL45SE05PyiGb4Y4QEq6CCKJlvJh8LcBEqYw==&ch=PfJTdYLWK3zg6txEKh4sA01rOOQ3A2tIosxs4LB33MF2Vr-iaGj50Q==)
---
| | [TAKE ON THE BORDER CRISIS WITH ME](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012gkORvXtZcaWnYue67rkKMYGkK7Gd7GkqjCLR-n4Q4vGNkaHrHKozWGtSE7AeZmdUm5QaOTNqjoAsAn9ZyUor0GHr7Fa_6YXQ7oNucO9O6yIoAaD2cseopFCxi_mRqJ2nMvLIdU2xIFuMPX_cy5DOk27wAlaEk_rR643yv9DlvFyWEs4zSFmDQ_3M0ALNl6iQU2jBVb_pqBAiDDJtmMmgfEK1eLTGHjw&c=aCra457S1Y1rIT5xbfuL45SE05PyiGb4Y4QEq6CCKJlvJh8LcBEqYw==&ch=PfJTdYLWK3zg6txEKh4sA01rOOQ3A2tIosxs4LB33MF2Vr-iaGj50Q==)
---
| The Left has made it clear that they have no intention of solving Biden's border crisis or standing up for Americans. That's why I've been fighting to:

1. Build a wall and construct physical infrastructure to block entry attempts.
2. Force the Biden Administration to uphold the laws we have on the books.
3. Support border patrol and get them the reinforcements they've needed for years.

Friend these are policies that should have been implemented the moment this crisis started. However, it's been over two years, and all we've seen are late visits, lip service, and inaction.
---
| | [CUT THROUGH THE LIES AND SUPPORT ACTION](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012gkORvXtZcaWnYue67rkKMYGkK7Gd7GkqjCLR-n4Q4vGNkaHrHKozWGtSE7AeZmdUm5QaOTNqjoAsAn9ZyUor0GHr7Fa_6YXQ7oNucO9O6yIoAaD2cseopFCxi_mRqJ2nMvLIdU2xIFuMPX_cy5DOk27wAlaEk_rR643yv9DlvFyWEs4zSFmDQ_3M0ALNl6iQU2jBVb_pqBAiDDJtmMmgfEK1eLTGHjw&c=aCra457S1Y1rIT5xbfuL45SE05PyiGb4Y4QEq6CCKJlvJh8LcBEqYw==&ch=PfJTdYLWK3zg6txEKh4sA01rOOQ3A2tIosxs4LB33MF2Vr-iaGj50Q==)
---
| More Americans are falling victim to dangerous drugs, cartel crime, and human trafficking, but if you're ready to end the suffering - [rush in your support and join me in the fight to secure our Southern Border once and for all!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012gkORvXtZcaWnYue67rkKMYGkK7Gd7GkqjCLR-n4Q4vGNkaHrHKozWGtSE7AeZmdUm5QaOTNqjoAsAn9ZyUor0GHr7Fa_6YXQ7oNucO9O6yIoAaD2cseopFCxi_mRqJ2nMvLIdU2xIFuMPX_cy5DOk27wAlaEk_rR643yv9DlvFyWEs4zSFmDQ_3M0ALNl6iQU2jBVb_pqBAiDDJtmMmgfEK1eLTGHjw&c=aCra457S1Y1rIT5xbfuL45SE05PyiGb4Y4QEq6CCKJlvJh8LcBEqYw==&ch=PfJTdYLWK3zg6txEKh4sA01rOOQ3A2tIosxs4LB33MF2Vr-iaGj50Q==)
For American Security,

clean_body: Help us keep building grassroots support | Derek, We need to flip some Republican districts BLUE this year. Only three seats stand between Democrats taking control of the Virginia House of Delegates and two more years of GOP overreach. Taking back the majority is critical — it allows us to protect what makes our Commonwealth such a great and welcoming place to call home. But we can’t accomplish any of these things without support from grassroots donors all over the state. ** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ******=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=****** Can we count on you to make a contribution to help develop Virginia Democrat’s grassroots movement? Every dollar counts and every contribution adds up by the end of the campaign — you chipping in really makes a difference. ******=****** Grassroots movements like the ones we’re building all over the Commonwealth are why we are where we are, folks. We can’t let Republican dark money control the lives of Virginians for ANY period of time. We need to band together to ensure we win in November. subject: Common Sense Is Lacking
body:
Bring common sense back to New Jersey AND America.
|
---
| Friends, Our state capital of Trenton (and, our entire nation for that matter) has been lacking common sense for many years. Today, I'm asking you to join us in the important fight to bring common sense back to New Jersey AND America.
If you want to be a part of a community of individuals who are passionate about restoring common sense to New Jersey and putting America first,**consider this your official invitation to join the Common Sense Club.**

Talk soon, Bill | | Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States

It’s easy to claim your refund. After you donate, my team will send you a receipt and a 2023 PCR application in the mail. After completing the PCR application, simply mail it to the Minnesota Department of Revenue and they’ll mail back your refund.

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: We’re asking you to support Selma’s ongoing tornado recovery today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
Every dollar raised will support the ongoing Selma tornado recovery and further our mission of protecting the freedom to vote. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59810622/395165037/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230307_f_bloodysunday_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjRmODEzMC0wOGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Tu2KUJ1l8ej33h38DA5KdIQnwEZEPZHLdonH8hJmoY=&emci=cd4f8130-08bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d24f8130-08bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)

| | Today, on the 58th anniversary of Bloody Sunday, we’re reflecting. We’re reflecting on the sacrifices that Black activists made throughout history to achieve and protect the freedom to vote. The violence they endured while protesting for their fundamental rights. And the powerful movement they ignited to challenge barriers to the ballot box, which continues today. On March 7, 1965, hundreds of civil rights activists marched across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, aiming to eventually reach Montgomery, to peacefully protest the denial of Black voting rights and the police’s recent murder of Black activist Jimmie Lee Jackson. Led by John Lewis of the Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee and Reverend Hosea Williams of the Southern Christian Leadership Conference, the peaceful protestors were met with extreme violence by local police. That brutal day became known as Bloody Sunday. Every year, to commemorate the anniversary of the attack, a large group of civil rights and voting rights leaders from around the country gather in Selma to march across the Edmund Pettus Bridge — that same path that activists walked not long ago. Like every year, the march took place this week, but under slightly different circumstances. **The people of Selma are facing the devastating aftermath of a tornado that ripped through the city on January 12, 2023 — destroying homes, businesses, and infrastructure.****Still, local organizers were dedicated to ensuring that the march went on.** **_[That’s why we’re asking you to make a split donation to Fair Fight Action and the Selma Area Food Bank, an on-the-ground organization delivering critical aid to the people of Selma. Will you make a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59810623/395165045/-1281683560?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230307_f_bloodysunday_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjRmODEzMC0wOGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Tu2KUJ1l8ej33h38DA5KdIQnwEZEPZHLdonH8hJmoY=)_** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59810624/395165053/-1281683560?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230307_f_bloodysunday_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjRmODEzMC0wOGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Tu2KUJ1l8ej33h38DA5KdIQnwEZEPZHLdonH8hJmoY=)

Every dollar raised will support the ongoing Selma tornado recovery and further our mission of protecting the freedom to vote — carrying on the movement that the Bloody Sunday activists bravely fought for.
Thank you,
The Fair Fight Action Team

clean_body: Every dollar raised will support the ongoing Selma tornado recovery and further our mission of protecting the freedom to vote. | | | Today, on the 58th anniversary of Bloody Sunday, we’re reflecting. We’re reflecting on the sacrifices that Black activists made throughout history to achieve and protect the freedom to vote. The violence they endured while protesting for their fundamental rights. And the powerful movement they ignited to challenge barriers to the ballot box, which continues today. On March 7, 1965, hundreds of civil rights activists marched across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, aiming to eventually reach Montgomery, to peacefully protest the denial of Black voting rights and the police’s recent murder of Black activist Jimmie Lee Jackson. Led by John Lewis of the Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee and Reverend Hosea Williams of the Southern Christian Leadership Conference, the peaceful protestors were met with extreme violence by local police. That brutal day became known as Bloody Sunday. Every year, to commemorate the anniversary of the attack, a large group of civil rights and voting rights leaders from around the country gather in Selma to march across the Edmund Pettus Bridge — that same path that activists walked not long ago. Like every year, the march took place this week, but under slightly different circumstances. The people of Selma are facing the devastating aftermath of a tornado that ripped through the city on January 12, 2023 — destroying homes, businesses, and infrastructure.Still, local organizers were dedicated to ensuring that the march went on. = | = Every dollar raised will support the ongoing Selma tornado recovery and further our mission of protecting the freedom to vote — carrying on the movement that the Bloody Sunday activists bravely fought for. Thank you, The Fair Fight Action Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: Great America Update
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78194%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rmIf5BBvLkgoPzpE2k607w&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78105%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8yo0%2bqtdCYCxieYkFygw3w&sysid=1) [NO](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78106%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Bypg83of1DKCIEXVdYzNGw&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78107%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cz%2fV%2fTRGDnYT3hpfi6B8CA&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78108%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5LeNGAfeY4JbiKV0uYhjZw&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7616%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=7%2f%2bq8%2bH2j2qM5lOP6bAW5A&sysid=1)_

|
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7616%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=7%2f%2bq8%2bH2j2qM5lOP6bAW5A&sysid=1)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: John Lewis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| The history of the filibuster is not noble, or bipartisan, or even a part of how our Constitution is written. It is a relic of Jim Crow, and we must acknowledge that.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1906%2E5257348%2Em_reab)
Derek, today we recognize the 58th anniversary of Bloody Sunday in Selma, Alabama, when civil rights heroes including a then 25-year-old John Lewis crossed a bridge named after a Confederate officer, U.S. Senator, and Ku Klux Klansman named Edmund Pettus.
On the other side of that bridge, John and his colleagues were met by officers of the state who beat them within an inch of their lives.
But in order to tell that story, we need to go many decades further back, to 1890.
That was the year that Representative Henry Cabot Lodge introduced the _Federal Elections Bill_ to appoint federal supervisors in U.S. House elections, to ensure that Black Americans could exercise their Constitutional right to vote.
Segregationists filibustered and killed the Lodge bill, and just a few years after the hope and promise of Reconstruction, Jim Crow became the law of the land all across the American South.
**When the activism of John Lewis and others brought the _Voting Rights Act of 1965_ up again, segregationists again filibustered the bill for over two months.**
The history of the filibuster is not noble, or bipartisan, or even a part of how our Constitution is written. It is a relic of Jim Crow, and we must acknowledge that.
**It has an ugly history of denying Constitutional rights, entrenching white supremacy, and subjugating Black Americans to minority rule.**
This is _living history._ In 2013, the Supreme Court gutted the _Voting Rights Act_ that John Lewis put his life on the line to pass, and ever since then, Republicans have done everything they can to turn back the clock.
In the last Congress, Republican Senators again used the filibuster to deny passage of bills we passed in the House — H.R. 1, the _For the People Act_ , and H.R. 4, the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act._
**[The Senate filibuster has been the enemy of American democracy for over 100 years, and it is time we abolish it to pass comprehensive voting rights legislation. That is how we can honor the sacrifice of John Lewis and so many others. If you agree we must abolish the Senate filibuster and pass voting rights, add your name today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230307-voting-rights-petition.umiTpR&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230307_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=1906%2E5257348%2Em_reab)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230307-voting-rights-petition.umiTpR&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230307_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=1906%2E5257348%2Em_reab)
---
I hope this bit of history gives you some perspective and renews your commitment to our fight for justice and democracy. Thanks for doing your part by adding your name today.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1813?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230307_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=1906%2E5257348%2Em_reab)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1807?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230307_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=1906%2E5257348%2Em_reab)

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Demand Tucker Carlson’s Advertisers Dump Him after his Disgusting Use of the January 6th Videos
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Demand Tucker Carlson’s Advertisers Dump Him after his Disgusting Use of the January 6th Videos](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4844aaf8-2945-4701-bd46-2dc39768de81/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b5fccf2-7cb2-4afa-9b50-5e052bafa55c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **[Tucker Carlson has reached a new low, and his advertisers need to dump him NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a25e988-98af-41de-862d-c646f98f3a7e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).**

After being given exclusive access to 41,000 hours of surveillance video footage from the January 6th attack, Carlson [cherry-picked](https://default.salsalabs.org/T154ba499-a0f1-4566-800f-039009dedb15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) out of context snippets to try to make it look like a normal tourist visit. And disgustingly, he even showed footage of a Capitol police officer who was violently assaulted and later died, and tried to argue his death had nothing to do with the events of that day.

Carlson has been [condemned](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2c40024-b6e9-47e6-ba63-76cb39066446/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) by the chief of the Capitol Police, and by people across the political spectrum.

**And his advertisers need to do this as well. They need to stop bankrolling his lies NOW.**

[**Add your name: Demand Tucker Carlson's Advertisers Dump Him.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf87ae7d1-b8af-4172-a83c-c654110c4f45/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

I built a group of 5,000 of our top supporters to participate in our critical focus group, **but I still need** _YOUR_**response.**[**Will you take my survey right now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59812219/395170128/-1657212254?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2313-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlNDdhYzM1LTBhYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2p_ynRJXKPAxBC7FkDMi7ET8Oqq3JzU6ZSvsp_9MG50=&emci=28aac350-75bc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=3e47ac35-0abd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=23124236)

I invited you to participate in my exclusive Democratic Focus Group because I thought I could count on you, but I don't see your response. | | I need you to record your responses now, friend. – Carville | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. I'm looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans-that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c85c09642e564ab19932020733210c84&_e=LM-KdDVv3V-AHxQm1fEjeBbjKeH3w5vUHfWitfeIXiCF0iRA9WhL2QjY6nK3H5u2I3_rNJ8XveyWwIyhuSCmSz46qS40sofNFEVmahuX-7hV2iyJt5Jqbr5ycV-izq5MOSqr5NgJP6GRGNFj-RaLhMVu5LDz8cZJ0PJaYS-Hj5scY3XOu9xFprdGSx8Hd2Ur4WsZpfANz1oH8buvT8Onq7kLMuIFMcAYOeB7VfoA0b12QE6iJd2qPx-e0Fvg3C6DoZGyxjILla2jiAArkToA3XONlBnbLVIkoLj93mUnMBtHybx-8tKBRkdSbTuiCl0mer3ghXeiWdAksUlcJV2-wxP_EPaVSHVpSBo3sOjrEQzwcXTu_yPGpyGmtpc5apxLUcXX_V8sWbANEYzAPxbbH_yTnGEAQ4ykmgkjnpqe9rD9yAYs7AebU-yhCR63CBtv)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c85c09642e564ab19932020733210c84&_e=LM-KdDVv3V-AHxQm1fEjeBbjKeH3w5vUHfWitfeIXiCF0iRA9WhL2QjY6nK3H5u2I3_rNJ8XveyWwIyhuSCmSz46qS40sofNFEVmahuX-7hV2iyJt5Jqbr5ycV-izq5MOSqr5NgJP6GRGNFj-RaLhMVu5LDz8cZJ0PJaYS-Hj5scY3XOu9xFprdGSx8Hd2Ur4WsZpfANz1oH8buvT8Onq7kLMuIFMcAYOeB7VfoA0b12QE6iJd2qPx-e0Fvg3C6DoZGyxjILla2jiAArkToA3R-_SKF6hJ4BhninYtFILwMC56j6xT8zepeW6sq8K6TykeUeLR9CF4Pqwr_JJFNDAY2es4-YGG9RppT1WztN7shs8xnClOoe7eKJJAZby0XmwUaWZF4ZtsGGNvSEwGs6KHVikTVeEYC2rOJzTMqpsJ9M9yZuH_awQzMuJrjj1lZ8)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c85c09642e564ab19932020733210c84&_e=LM-KdDVv3V-AHxQm1fEjeBbjKeH3w5vUHfWitfeIXiCF0iRA9WhL2QjY6nK3H5u2I3_rNJ8XveyWwIyhuSCmSz46qS40sofNFEVmahuX-7hV2iyJt5Jqbr5ycV-izq5MOSqr5NgJP6GRGNFj-RaLhMVu5LDz8cZJ0PJaYS-Hj5scY3XOu9xFprdGSx8Hd2Ur4WsZpfANz1oH8buvT8Onq7kLMuIFMcAYOeB7VfoA0b12QE6iJd2qPx-e0Fvg3C6DoZGyxjILla2jiAArkToA3RaFtAyPAzkgG4xohFsEBl4qJ7HCHsn_4lYY7M4wKvZ7WBwsnxEJdZXiBCokoBv1kj9mtd3xVS-nuhvPIO3jzcvjatClWN_wgYYg9RthrNjlpKyRlu4EWPmHKzyuhsd_oqajcWFdn51edaBpYU2nlRLzjEgpPt9x26HaSq6gYMGY)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
Josh Hawley and I both took oaths to defend our democracy. I didn’t break mine.
#
Last night, some folks on cable news tried to claim Josh Hawley didn’t actually show us he was a fraud and a coward on January 6th. So let’s get this straight, Peter.
Josh Hawley didn’t just run away from the Capitol. **He ran away from the same people he raised his fist and claimed to be fighting for just hours earlier.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28406?refcode=em20230307-2850&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2850%2E614464%2E1xTGwy)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28406?refcode=em20230307-2850&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2850%2E614464%2E1xTGwy)**
As a U.S. Marine, I took an oath to defend our democracy — just like Josh Hawley when he was sworn into the U.S. Senate. **But unlike him, I didn’t break mine.**
That’s why I’m running to replace him — so Missourians will have a real warrior for working people standing up and fighting for them in Washington. And it’s why I need your help today, Peter.
**We don’t need any more frauds or cowards like Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.[Will you add your first donation of $10 or anything at all right now so we can defeat him, flip this seat, and stand up for our democracy?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28406?refcode=em20230307-2850&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2850%2E614464%2E1xTGwy)**

Josh Hawley didn’t just run away from the Capitol. He ran away from the same people he raised his fist and claimed to be fighting for just hours earlier. As a U.S. Marine, I took an oath to defend our democracy — just like Josh Hawley when he was sworn into the U.S. Senate. But unlike him, I didn’t break mine. That’s why I’m running to replace him — so Missourians will have a real warrior for working people standing up and fighting for them in Washington. And it’s why I need your help today, Peter. We don’t need any more frauds or cowards like Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thanks for standing with me, — Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

subject: I know North Carolinians want to expand Medicaid and increase access to health care in our state.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:

|

Since the moment I was sworn in, one of my biggest priorities has been expanding Medicaid and getting folks the health care coverage they deserve. Now, Republican legislative leaders have agreed to expand Medicaid. It’s a monumental step. But we need to act quickly. Peter, every day that passes without expanding Medicaid leaves **an additional 600,000 North Carolinians** who would be eligible with limited access to health care. And we miss out on **billions of federal dollars** and **lose big money every month** we don’t expand Medicaid. The numbers are clear. The moment is urgent. Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

clean_body: Read our ATTACHED confidential memo | | | | 🚨BREAKING FOX NEWS ALERT🚨 This is BAD. Fox News just confirmed our WORST FEARS about the future of our great nation. "Read Senator Tim Scott’s EXCLUSIVE MEMO HERE to figure out what this means for the United States!" | | | "Generic Button" | | | Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support. I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on. Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. This is just the beginning. "Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?"** | | "JOIN MY TEAM" Thank you for everything, and God Bless, Tim Scott | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Senator Vance has been quite busy representing the People of Ohio in Washington since he swore his oath just over two months ago.

Our **Hillbilly on the Hill series,** which you'll receive every first Tuesday of the month, is here to keep you updated with everything Senator Vance is up to.

Thank you always for your support.

** 'WE OWE EVERY AMERICAN THE PEACE OF MIND THAT THEIR COMMUNITY IS PROTECTED FROM A CATASTROPHE OF THIS KIND'** [**(Wall Street Journal)**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=621e88ba7a514ff4a27e7d348b408e0a&_e=QymIDHvC_2gMLQSZZZQqMPTxRm75nyDWKeLg77gDVBMKp_aPlp_6dNiTZgqBABwHXbJvpu_kSgkqjCNr3HSl0BATil7icjFVjCSawCaeCJcoHKu0BrxBxDtv-jvM63K1OfMMN63GwJDmvG7nkCTUKdJaLRRqYiIInyL8L43xXI2g-3GIFyVcn3-wLSfRuqXvBQVT_u5Et9EWnHTLntg6fCj4BWWa-bkvVWJvyi-ych9wJqonxH5wp3SVntzi4sHrAaU7kVq9U23y9oqOuVNNXtoqq_57cmwKILXdUBStVqYzftOkcO5RXIfiXSywJUWT) - Ohio senators are leading a bipartisan effort to respond to last month's train derailment in their state, proposing legislation that would subject railroads to a series of new federal safety regulations and increase fines for wrongdoing.

Senators JD Vance and Sherrod Brown, Sens. Marco Rubio (R., Fla.), Josh Hawley (R. Mo.), Bob Casey (D., Pa.) and John Fetterman (D., Pa.), introduced legislation intended to prevent future train disasters such as the Feb. 3 derailment of Norfolk Southern Corp. railcars near East Palestine, Ohio.

The bill's bipartisan nature could give it momentum in the Senate...

** 'WE ARE RULED BY UNSERIOUS PEOPLE WHO ARE WORRIED ABOUT FAKE PROBLEMS'** [**(Fox News ' Tucker Carlson)**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=621e88ba7a514ff4a27e7d348b408e0a&_e=QymIDHvC_2gMLQSZZZQqMHBucaWIutwn5ltlVLmN6dwPD0Zj5jNmVp60Mcd1FQEI4Byfa6ppPK7FxC4cMWsQv8xjaUgIVuAQ2IHo9-_1snqbDcakr0c043iPqBUkxWksX4TweM6V7hc502oyEvivK8EvSS8yk6cc5Xu396y_iXu5tE70P3xyN5YSu7efpUpuBrR6vf4uT0R6XB2FoVwMCSKLdkurBDomFkZ2qaTLHQI%3D) - Senator Vance joined Tucker Carlson to discuss the federal government's disappointing response to the train derailment in East Palestine.

_Watch Senator Vance 's full interview: _

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=621e88ba7a514ff4a27e7d348b408e0a&_e=QymIDHvC_2gMLQSZZZQqMHBucaWIutwn5ltlVLmN6dwPD0Zj5jNmVp60Mcd1FQEI4Byfa6ppPK7FxC4cMWsQvw2jqC6oOM4F7E-iD9KjhlJllcllYaii4CTvh00FKrRzol9GtlA40q56x0W1ia100JxDEUfxyGm-2nEcfEtkyg4dsQr0gvwMW-QeTdwnrCfio-y-PPLr0yXGCcrFYY1I9rahDFz3-iDnrIo_4MDDtOQ%3D)

** 'ADDITIONAL ASSESSMENTS WILL BE NECESSARY'** **[(WFMJ Youngstown)](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=621e88ba7a514ff4a27e7d348b408e0a&_e=QymIDHvC_2gMLQSZZZQqMJ0KVLFIBQS84V8hCMW2brqYUuhvnJR--A9OtIRXvImiQR3frgcL-yurNNcgFpEuktMtpCcWTgL-H62F7vrjucfjKYVOrRkwcgZSdq3x4xK_QBV1ucEYIG4g3x0cz_8TtPCuTcxiN1ADsVLaleBooWwIJRuJuZzrJuPKdHxN5uwVLegpyXe0XQTisduoBcyjkg6w6vY_G4hV8yYDz71e2xvfEQmOIpAM2mOxBGAYaonngCGoN5mrbLCjBpJ_jwMOlVDNL2_ZmRvKsxIzk08bFZvw_ZzpvIfohv-CGX9jqD3S)** \-- Ohio Senators J.D. Vance (R) and Sherrod Brown (D) are calling on officials to ensure access to medical testing for people affected by the East Palestine train derailment.

Vance and Brown sent a letter Monday to EPA Administrator Michael Regan and CDC Director Rochelle Walensky about concerns over testing for residents.

The lack of access to testing led the senators to call on the federal government to allocate the resources and expertise needed to find a medical baseline for the community.

"In the coming months and years, additional epidemiologic assessments will be necessary to identify potential longer-term negative health outcomes in exposed residents."

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=621e88ba7a514ff4a27e7d348b408e0a&_e=QymIDHvC_2gMLQSZZZQqMAb6Bkn83l67iNQk1qzpAa-MKtGT8X0X6SlzBqWhtmataKWVyuy4nzNjkNXPw1PnbJQoa_kyLiVwaWTOZMUtAIV3SR16tQ94e1ykFLYk4rtsCmbyUuPYlq8sTF3hafcj2Jqqsh3hFK0hGubg9FnLCI5uu0D45LQ5NNQMKdNXnZC9E1tVWs_FIWBmGe2xiYwlpgeQNPduM1RjYeu52qilTwk7vjBhnKxVsx6PRiM-WF0_MxyOVm8njkR7s7bYIc73jSGU9yWQQS5laPTYJ1V6TX0%3D)

** 'EAST PALESTINE NEEDS LONG-TERM INVESTMENT'** [**(Washington Post)**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=621e88ba7a514ff4a27e7d348b408e0a&_e=QymIDHvC_2gMLQSZZZQqMAb6Bkn83l67iNQk1qzpAa-MKtGT8X0X6SlzBqWhtmataKWVyuy4nzNjkNXPw1PnbJQoa_kyLiVwaWTOZMUtAIV3SR16tQ94e1ykFLYk4rtsCmbyUuPYlq8sTF3hafcj2GztI0g7UnmGra2NvI4I3eRlWc5qufYQ8Xgjo0KCjiz41O99w8PwSJ-sKNQEXKzZJjMn20iXo5EACdVWRHOWVAxU5vr_nbE8OXHRrkKoLOVW2kudEY8wyxjXH3eIU7dO1hhtzHMRj69LougkDCn1TqU%3D) - No matter how much independent testing shows the worst of the environmental catastrophe is behind us, East Palestine will be dealing with bad perception, and its economic consequences, for years.

The mayor, a good man with an impossible job, told me that about half of his constituents are terrified and half of them just want the media circus to go home so they can get to work rebuilding the community they love. We can help, not just tomorrow but months from now. East Palestine needs long-term investment, from both the federal government and Norfolk Southern Railway.

_Read Senator Vance 's full Op-ed [**here.**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=621e88ba7a514ff4a27e7d348b408e0a&_e=QymIDHvC_2gMLQSZZZQqMAb6Bkn83l67iNQk1qzpAa-MKtGT8X0X6SlzBqWhtmataKWVyuy4nzNjkNXPw1PnbJQoa_kyLiVwaWTOZMUtAIV3SR16tQ94e1ykFLYk4rtsCmbyUuPYlq8sTF3hafcj2ALS8K0dHAsNN6gkV5EV4gK3cajaIudJQNmKV-pV1vklJXiHLfXV0XxlynKrt5b56xTwoDKBSiG6pmxqGJg4C6eZa0N5aVdoIx_XjmpQFRD1YH8liVskbZwhyZI6FQpD8diDg7OAz1GDieGSW7bFh5o%3D)_

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=621e88ba7a514ff4a27e7d348b408e0a&_e=QymIDHvC_2gMLQSZZZQqMORue1IUp38sWNdpYqg3IC3rMJe8hbdPHB5u3sU4_OTQzT1_84oZp-LQpVpXNPKg3nfA2Pe-m3oeoFZsYkJtJL5zHBdzZtHGDaFLl46VLBMlkMDxCAgLd3CzfVs5T9IIDBCxlH83u5EyCSOTOALd3N8F_x3BEvwjIMymDsy3GckLk20foUmwMwWRXjs19XpE80_dov99Lbfls78YkCh-BYwjqB7JDzMHLUyvv-vjz6etHfHu5tR7sZn4QTjkO3sZ5_keOKJoe9OrVNukbUs4qLl7E4oaRomJATzHvCSeSz-InaL-Pf1VwvR5FOA_Wjl26K6RR1e596cIxjXrUbba38V51lB_ZHYqW4pVe1Q9L06-)

** 'I'D LIKE TO SEE THE PRESIDENT CARE' **[**(Fox News ' Jesse Watters)**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=621e88ba7a514ff4a27e7d348b408e0a&_e=QymIDHvC_2gMLQSZZZQqMHBucaWIutwn5ltlVLmN6dzspzEqrFKtCE_87CE3NekJFB5-GzXdqQ_MuCa7_X8fCa4ShFrf1NKJ66LkpeuxVtSGDlFiKahpvRvOwp-Adg8XbZd75saNxsvs3AN5gUl5Ukr5GfUEbkQ3jByQVelcxyLWqyfSlhf-BvQUv0Xj4gU58zUnXfr-TSCgohUgCm1ZGaOyntpjc-uK7_dbhg0hNHc%3D) - Senator Vance joined Jesse Watters to discuss President Biden's reluctance to visit East Palestine.

_Watch Senator Vance 's full interview here: _

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=621e88ba7a514ff4a27e7d348b408e0a&_e=QymIDHvC_2gMLQSZZZQqMHBucaWIutwn5ltlVLmN6dzspzEqrFKtCE_87CE3NekJFB5-GzXdqQ_MuCa7_X8fCf0j7wqXxyZaZRC3dqVF2wo_A7dpeqKfr5WeCaYdaJLOQLSa-USubf_9rBjqXmxY4teusRscQ3ik4RUj6oTnEudOtG94vycoyoxCFFbXKNC7EWyzWvHZmLHtlUfy8naaGVH_qNvInrbYyZHAdfgkmZU%3D)

** 'THERE IS NO SHORTCUT THROUGH THIS'** [**(WKYC Cleveland)**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=621e88ba7a514ff4a27e7d348b408e0a&_e=QymIDHvC_2gMLQSZZZQqMHmjc0ge_Ms4Tcx_w_NJuJ2tXJau3UCEdOtoqIcHH4Q_t7Rt4Zj87JgQ3DXM8MdFu4RJb1mZRZ_B4WX-e-4TmI2R6QJvcDYWfF3r3XQ07T1WLSk8HqhskxFI7aQD1yh-vt-3jqZL_TgUyjkFSgO1u69VvOG4bVyWTw0YAzDCBu814d8ARUz_QnSzADExzewn52ozKDhaZ75l7aURB_0wEUJ8Xfc02rVYFfMlu3Tc7TU-bzixstCvHtBqhHaflWUoTaxvv-8ZpbhNgndF8Fl8HQAa93RImce2FLb8ANumA1E6EA1i-dyPlIqCdisGDiCpXV3IN60drsFkqhqExafa6yDj1JrKtv8crrPD7kBSt9g5bnCg_WIYzp9YfBbpM3Mwmw%3D%3D) \-- Former President Donald Trump was in East Palestine Wednesday as the village continues its cleanup from the train derailment that took place nearly three weeks ago.

U.S. Senator JD Vance was among those in East Palestine for Trump's visit on Wednesday. Vance spoke to the media about what it means to have Trump visit East Palestine.

During a trip to East Palestine, Senator Vance met with the residents there.

** 'BIDEN BLAMED TRUMP AND REFUSED TO SHOW UP' **[**(Fox News ' Laura Ingraham)**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=621e88ba7a514ff4a27e7d348b408e0a&_e=QymIDHvC_2gMLQSZZZQqMHBucaWIutwn5ltlVLmN6dxFQmXu9divlDueKpvqG7LEu6Os-oQ7-uk80PMtw4tSUcW86PEQfEHcYfgDhHizFLCP6-secxwdIudwPnlAgOI2JbX4l7vCSDgAGBDqHNjm39s1IjU2XIxPmIYk-Ua3Ag3u8kksw9r2a6tucBqwneVezpdNS7v4LiTFMZJD_k942EVs7okliNq-ZwIA_zKcSU4%3D) - Senator JD Vance joined Fox News' Laura Ingraham to discuss Biden's 'total catastrophic failure' handling East Palestine.

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=621e88ba7a514ff4a27e7d348b408e0a&_e=QymIDHvC_2gMLQSZZZQqMHBucaWIutwn5ltlVLmN6dxFQmXu9divlDueKpvqG7LEu6Os-oQ7-uk80PMtw4tSUbNT8nWMXN4KkQDMpy4n7ok31iMKtdZBHGUhl_4-bYQa1E1pwzSLHvNUKtaHktLGmPapNo1yHoCCcatLYQVP10VLbXRVM55rJKuFsB-9u5jl4Jx2uyvLNV4F1ykJpUSjcQoxHZb8iQSfXncG8yLB2Yw%3D)

**' CONGRESS HAS A REAL OPPORTUNITY TO ENSURE THAT WHAT HAPPENED IN EAST PALESTINE WILL NEVER HAPPEN AGAIN'****[(Associated Press)](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=621e88ba7a514ff4a27e7d348b408e0a&_e=QymIDHvC_2gMLQSZZZQqMMaYGM7Cih4ZjrB4YfMPeZw9inTuUgKMqvf5dy4atTjJHOoy_mOGJSKI70NEe4cV8wlKce2gVtxTy5uNhlWBgISOHEOpIHC-g_KYL1xwel1ODihN1SsJx36kMbJbtkCwqpvVms9CsC04mmDZfCW3ygVviRGGMy_W6BXDFZVEfwIcDQ4wFfvON_ccFXsc7-k3XD-p2NYgUIlv-F4HPw_pa47iAF3osuIAn0bOkAPW2vVE2aX05Q7zxn6d8RnwqEBp4W-An9kTsfBI4tgzwcsCAoNoTm7jnvS1juvbbR2_fVyL)** \-- Railroads including the one whose train derailed and caught fire in Ohio would have to follow new safety rules under bipartisan legislation introduced Wednesday by the state's two U.S. senators, even as regulators plan to step up inspections on tracks carrying the most hazardous materials.

The Railway Safety Act of 2023, co-sponsored by U.S. Sens. Sherrod Brown, a Democrat, and JD Vance, a Republican, and four others responds to the derailment of a Norfolk Southern freight train in East Palestine, in northeast Ohio near Pennsylvania, on Feb. 3, when 38 cars derailed and several carrying hazardous materials burned.

**' THESE LAKES SUPPORT THOUSANDS OF JOBS, BILLIONS OF DOLLARS OF ECONOMIC ACTIVITY AND PROVIDE A RELIABLE SOURCE OF DRINKING WATER FOR MILLIONS'****[(Cleveland.com)](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=621e88ba7a514ff4a27e7d348b408e0a&_e=QymIDHvC_2gMLQSZZZQqMF9Vx27x3VH2kWwbvXZZE2Z1wkOQeQniYq1reeXxOqmMCSVoJpjQLQ1kEW5hKBwAzbUl483t7lmA7hQa8rAHULvPemmiSNt-XB-KIWtcVSvOMJMWH9LVnxeHRsUFCq6nGcmDXHdx0h0RMrhwLvn-D1BsY7GpzcPOsb6o6Wc_-q90gqu9N00Qkum_-m-Vqd6PcqJ3S6AoIF8unZZmeP2FLveCIH4_xXMiNKmsCkHPwTf6mQYF5Mto6b3DnSFHfKsGuuCh4ZqFH_fdYwpi2wioIQc%3D)** \-- Newly-elected U.S. Sen. JD Vance will co-chair the U.S. Senate's Great Lakes Task Force, replacing his predecessor Rob Portman at the helm of a group that pushes to protect the world's largest freshwater lake system.

"The people of Ohio deserve a bipartisan, whole-of-government approach to the problems affecting our abundant natural resources. That's exactly what this task force aims to provide and I'll do all that I can to ensure the Great Lakes are protected not just today, but for generations to come," said Vance.

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance.

clean_body: | Senator Vance has been quite busy representing the People of Ohio in Washington since he swore his oath just over two months ago. Our Hillbilly on the Hill series, which you'll receive every first Tuesday of the month, is here to keep you updated with everything Senator Vance is up to. Thank you always for your support. 'WE OWE EVERY AMERICAN THE PEACE OF MIND THAT THEIR COMMUNITY IS PROTECTED FROM A CATASTROPHE OF THIS KIND' - Ohio senators are leading a bipartisan effort to respond to last month's train derailment in their state, proposing legislation that would subject railroads to a series of new federal safety regulations and increase fines for wrongdoing. Senators JD Vance and Sherrod Brown, Sens. Marco Rubio (R., Fla.), Josh Hawley (R. Mo.), Bob Casey (D., Pa.) and John Fetterman (D., Pa.), introduced legislation intended to prevent future train disasters such as the Feb. 3 derailment of Norfolk Southern Corp. railcars near East Palestine, Ohio. The bill's bipartisan nature could give it momentum in the Senate... 'WE ARE RULED BY UNSERIOUS PEOPLE WHO ARE WORRIED ABOUT FAKE PROBLEMS' - Senator Vance joined Tucker Carlson to discuss the federal government's disappointing response to the train derailment in East Palestine. Watch Senator Vance 's full interview: 'ADDITIONAL ASSESSMENTS WILL BE NECESSARY' \-- Ohio Senators J.D. Vance (R) and Sherrod Brown (D) are calling on officials to ensure access to medical testing for people affected by the East Palestine train derailment. Vance and Brown sent a letter Monday to EPA Administrator Michael Regan and CDC Director Rochelle Walensky about concerns over testing for residents. The lack of access to testing led the senators to call on the federal government to allocate the resources and expertise needed to find a medical baseline for the community. "In the coming months and years, additional epidemiologic assessments will be necessary to identify potential longer-term negative health outcomes in exposed residents." 'EAST PALESTINE NEEDS LONG-TERM INVESTMENT' - No matter how much independent testing shows the worst of the environmental catastrophe is behind us, East Palestine will be dealing with bad perception, and its economic consequences, for years. The mayor, a good man with an impossible job, told me that about half of his constituents are terrified and half of them just want the media circus to go home so they can get to work rebuilding the community they love. We can help, not just tomorrow but months from now. East Palestine needs long-term investment, from both the federal government and Norfolk Southern Railway. Read Senator Vance 's full Op-ed 'CONGRESS CAN LEGISLATE A SOLUTION TO THIS PROBLEM' - Senator Vance spoke with 10TV in East Palestine about possible solutions. Watch Senator Vance 's full interview here: - 'I'D LIKE TO SEE THE PRESIDENT CARE' - Senator Vance joined Jesse Watters to discuss President Biden's reluctance to visit East Palestine. Watch Senator Vance 's full interview here: 'THERE IS NO SHORTCUT THROUGH THIS' \-- Former President Donald Trump was in East Palestine Wednesday as the village continues its cleanup from the train derailment that took place nearly three weeks ago. U.S. Senator JD Vance was among those in East Palestine for Trump's visit on Wednesday. Vance spoke to the media about what it means to have Trump visit East Palestine. During a trip to East Palestine, Senator Vance met with the residents there. 'BIDEN BLAMED TRUMP AND REFUSED TO SHOW UP' - Senator JD Vance joined Fox News' Laura Ingraham to discuss Biden's 'total catastrophic failure' handling East Palestine. Watch Senator Vance 's full interview here: ' CONGRESS HAS A REAL OPPORTUNITY TO ENSURE THAT WHAT HAPPENED IN EAST PALESTINE WILL NEVER HAPPEN AGAIN' \-- Railroads including the one whose train derailed and caught fire in Ohio would have to follow new safety rules under bipartisan legislation introduced Wednesday by the state's two U.S. senators, even as regulators plan to step up inspections on tracks carrying the most hazardous materials. The Railway Safety Act of 2023, co-sponsored by U.S. Sens. Sherrod Brown, a Democrat, and JD Vance, a Republican, and four others responds to the derailment of a Norfolk Southern freight train in East Palestine, in northeast Ohio near Pennsylvania, on Feb. 3, when 38 cars derailed and several carrying hazardous materials burned. ' THESE LAKES SUPPORT THOUSANDS OF JOBS, BILLIONS OF DOLLARS OF ECONOMIC ACTIVITY AND PROVIDE A RELIABLE SOURCE OF DRINKING WATER FOR MILLIONS' \-- Newly-elected U.S. Sen. JD Vance will co-chair the U.S. Senate's Great Lakes Task Force, replacing his predecessor Rob Portman at the helm of a group that pushes to protect the world's largest freshwater lake system. "The people of Ohio deserve a bipartisan, whole-of-government approach to the problems affecting our abundant natural resources. That's exactly what this task force aims to provide and I'll do all that I can to ensure the Great Lakes are protected not just today, but for generations to come," said Vance. Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. | Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. JD Vance for Senate Inc., P.O. Box 6564 Cincinnati, OH 45206 Copyright (C) 2022 JD Vance for US Senate, All rights reserved.

body:
| Peter: When I was growing up, I never could have imagined that I'd run for elected office one day – let alone become the first computer programmer and the first former synagogue president ever elected to the Senate.

As the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran, I was surrounded by loved ones who taught me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence – and I've carried these with me my entire life. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59813629/395175666/-1557579732?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230307_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlZGJiMDYyLTBlYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_64jg-vE_jA9QEo5uR2shRkqR4-gJWipBxjYBf0wWRA=) I carried those values with me when I was working and waiting tables at Caesars Palace to pay for college, becoming the first in my family to graduate. I carried them with me when I was working as a computer programmer in a male-dominated field. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59813630/395175667/-1557579732?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230307_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlZGJiMDYyLTBlYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_64jg-vE_jA9QEo5uR2shRkqR4-gJWipBxjYBf0wWRA=) I carried those values with me during my first-ever campaign for Congress in 2016, when I flipped a highly competitive district from red to blue, **and in 2018, when I defeated a Republican incumbent against all odds – becoming the second woman senator in Nevada's history.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59813631/395175668/-1557579732?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230307_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlZGJiMDYyLTBlYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_64jg-vE_jA9QEo5uR2shRkqR4-gJWipBxjYBf0wWRA=) To this day, those values of hard work, determination, and persistence fuel my fight to advocate for working families and bring much-needed progress to the lives of all Nevadans.

**But right now, experts at _The Washington Post_ are calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection – and _FiveThirtyEight_ says that Nevada could once again decide Senate control.**

The GOP will come after me with everything they've got, and I simply cannot fight back without your grassroots support. [So please, Peter, will you split $10 or more now between my campaign and UniteDemocrats today to help me defend my seat and protect our Democratic Senate majority? »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59813632/395175669/-1557579732?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230307_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlZGJiMDYyLTBlYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_64jg-vE_jA9QEo5uR2shRkqR4-gJWipBxjYBf0wWRA=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jacky Rosen and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59813638/395175675/-1557579732?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230307_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlZGJiMDYyLTBlYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_64jg-vE_jA9QEo5uR2shRkqR4-gJWipBxjYBf0wWRA=)

name: Andy Kim
subject: People should be our top priority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Our armed service members signed up to put their lives on the line for us at home and abroad. I take that very seriously.

That's why in my time on the Armed Services Committee, I've worked hard to ensure that our defense budget prioritizes the people who make up our military, not just hardware. Shiny new planes may be cool, but they are nothing without the people operating them – we need to act like it.

Now, as the top Democrat on the subcommittee on military personnel, I've made that my mission.

Last week, I was pleased to introduce legislation to help further offset the cost of in-home childcare. I am committed to reducing everyday expenses for military families, especially in areas with high demand and low availability.

Military families in New Jersey routinely say finding and affording child care is their top concern. As a father, I know how crucial reliable child care is. Our service members deserve to know that their children are cared for in a safe environment. The demand for child care is high, with long waitlists at centers, particularly for children under four. Right now, 22% of military families –more than one out of every five – can't access the child care they need.

We must fund safer and more reliable child care options for service members. I was proud to vote for investments in the past, but it's clear that much more is required to meet the demand. Let's support the sacrifices that our military families make daily.

Our service members invest in us. We must use our defense budget to invest in them. We must put people over planes. Supporting our armed service members and veterans is something that we can all get behind.

Andy
