clean_body: Our armed service members signed up to put their lives on the line for us at home and abroad. I take that very seriously. That's why in my time on the Armed Services Committee, I've worked hard to ensure that our defense budget prioritizes the people who make up our military, not just hardware. Shiny new planes may be cool, but they are nothing without the people operating them – we need to act like it. Now, as the top Democrat on the subcommittee on military personnel, I've made that my mission. Last week, I was pleased to introduce legislation to help further offset the cost of in-home childcare. I am committed to reducing everyday expenses for military families, especially in areas with high demand and low availability. Military families in New Jersey routinely say finding and affording child care is their top concern. As a father, I know how crucial reliable child care is. Our service members deserve to know that their children are cared for in a safe environment. The demand for child care is high, with long waitlists at centers, particularly for children under four. Right now, 22% of military families –more than one out of every five – can't access the child care they need. We must fund safer and more reliable child care options for service members. I was proud to vote for investments in the past, but it's clear that much more is required to meet the demand. Let's support the sacrifices that our military families make daily. Our service members invest in us. We must use our defense budget to invest in them. We must put people over planes. Supporting our armed service members and veterans is something that we can all get behind. Andy Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: $5 [] $15 [] $25 [] $50 [] Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: backstory on my campaign debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi there –
It is the honor of my lifetime to serve in the Senate. Working to make life better for Granite Staters is something that deserves my full attention.
That’s why I’m sending you this email. Our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off, and we’re under a time crunch to fill the gap. If you could split $20 right now -- between my campaign and Serve America -- to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
The backstory is this:
GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win.
My team was laser-focused on making strategic decisions that would allow us to win. We made last-minute investments with the information we had, hoping that the funding we needed would come through.
Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid.
Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to my campaign and Serve America to help us retire our debt? Every dollar you give helps me spend less time fundraising and more time fighting for hardworking families, and I’m grateful for anything you can give. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
Thank you so much.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Keep Florida Red
subject: Rick Scott vs. Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Keep Florida Red**
body:
Senator Rick Scott needs our help fighting a three-front war.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62404962:6tK5iaGaN:m:1:3365131770:4B7D9C8CC53902955F263B60906B4B56:r "Headline") Peter: Senator Rick Scott needs our help fighting a three-front war. He's being targeted by the Leftist Lincoln Project and Mushy Mitch McConnell who are already starting to smear Senator Scott, and McConnell just removed Scott from Senate Committees like a jealous teenager. **BRENNAN CENTER REDISTRICTING ROUNDUP:**

clean_body: How Congressional Maps Could Change Before 2024... | BRENNAN CENTER REDISTRICTING ROUNDUP: “The House majority Republicans won in 2022 is so slim that many are eyeing an epic rematch in 2024, but as the Brennan Center’s Michael Li points out in a new piece, ‘There’s a big wild card in the mix: In a number of states, the maps used in 2022 may not be the ones used in 2024.’ ” = Some big changes come in states with long-running gerrymandering problems. In North Carolina, with newly sworn-in justices, the state supreme court has controversially agreed to reconsider the Harper v. Hall ruling that struck down the legislature’s gerrymandered state senate map. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = As the Brennan Center noted, some states may also have to pass new maps depending on the results of federal lawsuits. name: Dan Goldman
subject: 58 years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, 58 years ago today, John Lewis led Black civil rights activists in a march across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama. When they reached the other side of the bridge, they were met by armed police officers who brutally beat the nonviolent protesters who were there to demand the right to vote. We now remember this day as Bloody Sunday. There is no doubt that the courage, commitment, and struggles that John Lewis and other civil rights activists faced that day and throughout the Civil Rights Movement are what made critical legislation like the _Voting Rights Act_ possible. **But now, more than a half-century later, there is still much work to be done — because the attacks on voting rights and our democratic process are far from over.** From racially-motivated gerrymandering to restrictions on mail-in voting and voter registration, to phantom allegations of “voter fraud,” Republicans are doing everything they can to suppress our voices — particularly in Black and Brown communities. **[The fundamental right of one person, one vote is truly the foundation of our democracy. That’s why I’m asking you today to add your name alongside mine and join me in calling on the House to pass my first bill — the _Early Voting Act._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59815817/395184148/1341367481?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230307_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTkxZTlhZi0xNGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k-eauH4r-Iw7as8CaktGNXuu5B9G_UcUdsRq1Z04Iv0=&emci=10d53b23-08bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2191e9af-14bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=13556823)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59815818/395184149/1341367481?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230307_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTkxZTlhZi0xNGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k-eauH4r-Iw7as8CaktGNXuu5B9G_UcUdsRq1Z04Iv0=&emci=10d53b23-08bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2191e9af-14bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=13556823)
---
The _Early Voting Act_ will make federal elections uniform across the country, no matter if you are rich or poor; White, Brown, or Black; Democrat or Republican; or living in urban neighborhoods or rural farmland. This bill is a significant step to ensure equal access to the ballot and our only guarantee that Americans’ voices can be heard.
The _Early Voting Act_ will make voting more accessible to all. It will:
* Require 14 days of early voting nationwide, including weekends.

* Ensure that polling places are accessible by public transportation and near students on college campuses.

* Specify that votes are counted before Election Day so voters can receive results quickly and transparently.

**[So in the spirit of continuing the legacy of John Lewis and his fellow activists who faced violence that Sunday in Selma, please join me in calling on the House to expand voting rights by passing the _Early Voting Act_ immediately. Our democracy requires nothing less.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59815819/395184150/1341367481?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230307_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTkxZTlhZi0xNGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k-eauH4r-Iw7as8CaktGNXuu5B9G_UcUdsRq1Z04Iv0=&emci=10d53b23-08bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2191e9af-14bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=13556823)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59815820/395184151/1341367481?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230307_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTkxZTlhZi0xNGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k-eauH4r-Iw7as8CaktGNXuu5B9G_UcUdsRq1Z04Iv0=&emci=10d53b23-08bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2191e9af-14bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=13556823)
---
Thank you for standing up for our rights and our democracy with me today.
— Dan
Dan Goldman for New York
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008
United States **[dangoldmanforny.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59815821/395184152/1064912967?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230307_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTkxZTlhZi0xNGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k-eauH4r-Iw7as8CaktGNXuu5B9G_UcUdsRq1Z04Iv0=&emci=10d53b23-08bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2191e9af-14bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=13556823) | [info@dangoldmanforny.com](mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com)** | **Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**

name: John Pierce
subject: Did the FBI set up the January 6 protesters?
body:
The American people have a right to know. My clients have a right to know. | | | | [ ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FT892ZQr0TMcp4XKH892JtEXzvQ%2FU892oj6wKXdn892D8aHAn7636g6w/1/01000186bd64df33-16946efc-d8e6-4da2-b221-90e9c9f859f1-000000/K-gXbT6E86EuMIBcaqA41cUrrOM=312)

* * *

Please read the message below from our sponsor, NCLU.
We encourage you to [**visit their site today**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FT892ZQr0TMcp4XKH892JtEXzvQ%2FU892oj6wKXdn892D8aHAn7636g6w/2/01000186bd64df33-16946efc-d8e6-4da2-b221-90e9c9f859f1-000000/B8zGk0kgiI9Nb2eyVOE3ZOjOsK4=312).

| [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FT892ZQr0TMcp4XKH892JtEXzvQ%2FU892oj6wKXdn892D8aHAn7636g6w/3/01000186bd64df33-16946efc-d8e6-4da2-b221-90e9c9f859f1-000000/tAWNotM7a4tn_4ruHvLq6PWTnkI=312)
Dear Patriot,

[](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FT892ZQr0TMcp4XKH892JtEXzvQ%2FU892oj6wKXdn892D8aHAn7636g6w/4/01000186bd64df33-16946efc-d8e6-4da2-b221-90e9c9f859f1-000000/W4xmswndQZHlpjcadMTP_VNDGko=312) [ **If you 're sick of the FBI treating Americans' Constitutional rights like _trash_ , it's absolutely crucial for you to give a critical $25, $50, $100, or more immediately. ** ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FT892ZQr0TMcp4XKH892JtEXzvQ%2FU892oj6wKXdn892D8aHAn7636g6w/5/01000186bd64df33-16946efc-d8e6-4da2-b221-90e9c9f859f1-000000/mNqo5Doh1HuSPpDJssi--yaHoJg=312)

A short time ago, I watched FOX Network's Brett Baier interview FBI Director Christopher Wray.

I felt sick to my stomach by the time it ended, because:

✔ Wray might be one of the most dishonest people in the country.

✔ Wray refused to say that the extremely dangerous Mexican drug cartels should be classified as terrorist organizations.

✔ Wray refused to answer a crucial question that affects dozens of my clients and hundreds of other innocent January 6 prisoners across the country.

What was that question, you ask?

**" Did the FBI have undercover agents or paid informants or assets in the mob that stormed the Capitol on January 6?" **

And here are other critically important, follow-up questions Brett Baier should've asked, but didn't:

Did FBI agents, informants, or assets attack U.S. Capitol Police or encourage others to attack them?

Did FBI agents, informants, or assets break windows, lead the charge into the Capitol building, and encourage others to do that?

The American people have a right to know.

My clients have a right to know.

**As you know, they face years in prison. They have a right to know if they were set up or entrapped by the FBI!**

Please don't get me wrong -- my experience with most FBI field agents has been positive and they seem like honorable people.

But their leaders are the worst of the worst, and every conservative man and woman in the country knows it.

FBI leaders need to be prosecuted.

But right now, hundreds of innocent Americans are being prosecuted by Joe Biden's vicious Department of Justice.

You know I'm taking on the DOJ and FBI on their behalf...and with your urgent help I can win.

[**Patriot, please help me defend these wrongly accused patriots in court with your very best gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more right now.** ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FT892ZQr0TMcp4XKH892JtEXzvQ%2FU892oj6wKXdn892D8aHAn7636g6w/6/01000186bd64df33-16946efc-d8e6-4da2-b221-90e9c9f859f1-000000/wzllBbGFFGgmqclTJPyELg4VxZo=312)

This vital work is exhausting and expensive.

[**So please give what you can immediately.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FT892ZQr0TMcp4XKH892JtEXzvQ%2FU892oj6wKXdn892D8aHAn7636g6w/7/01000186bd64df33-16946efc-d8e6-4da2-b221-90e9c9f859f1-000000/fQ1y_PDHep1flH3qa3TBWo7NWbw=312)

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Founder and General Counsel
National Constitutional Law Union

**P.S. Patriot, my clients are innocent.** And they have the right to know if the FBI set them up or laid a trap for them. [**Please help me give each one of them the very best defense I can with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more right away.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FT892ZQr0TMcp4XKH892JtEXzvQ%2FU892oj6wKXdn892D8aHAn7636g6w/8/01000186bd64df33-16946efc-d8e6-4da2-b221-90e9c9f859f1-000000/_91lEGK6N_VHtukijGaD55NEDpU=312)

At the end of this month, we're legally required by the FEC to report how much money we've raised so far, and how many contributions make up that amount. **_It’s true – the fight for fair redistricting isn’t over!_**

That’s because voters across the country are challenging gerrymandered congressional maps in their states. If they’re successful, these states could be required to implement new, fair maps before the 2024 election. Of course, Republican politicians are fighting like hell to prevent that from happening.

But remember what Attorney General Eric Holder said: **“Wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win.”

That means we have two options, team:**
**OPTION ONE: We can grow complacent.**
We can cross our fingers, and we can hope that new maps in key battleground states are fairly drawn and that map-manipulating politicians aren’t allowed to gerrymander their way into unearned power.
**OPTION TWO: We can keep fighting for fair maps!**
Ahead of the 2022 elections, the NDRC’s efforts to mobilize communities, hold map-manipulating politicians accountable, and more helped secure what _The New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.”

**If we continue implementing this proven strategy, we can help ensure the maps are even fairer in 2024!**
[**_With control of the House on a knife’s edge, securing new maps in a few key states could be instrumental to helping Democrats win back the majority. So please: Will you pitch in before midnight tonight to help support all the NDRC’s work?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59816751/395187378/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230307_FR_3D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5MDFjMzI5LTE4YmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aUJBl9TzZK3A2Re6Ea-WVseV8gwZJhxq1wr5kPcbgTU=)

clean_body: | We wanted to make sure you saw this, team: | = = It’s true – the fight for fair redistricting isn’t over! That’s because voters across the country are challenging gerrymandered congressional maps in their states. If they’re successful, these states could be required to implement new, fair maps before the 2024 election. Of course, Republican politicians are fighting like hell to prevent that from happening. But remember what Attorney General Eric Holder said: “Wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win.” That means we have two options, team: OPTION ONE: We can grow complacent. We can cross our fingers, and we can hope that new maps in key battleground states are fairly drawn and that map-manipulating politicians aren’t allowed to gerrymander their way into unearned power. OPTION TWO: We can keep fighting for fair maps! Ahead of the 2022 elections, the NDRC’s efforts to mobilize communities, hold map-manipulating politicians accountable, and more helped secure what The New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” If we continue implementing this proven strategy, we can help ensure the maps are even fairer in 2024! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Peter, I'm James Comer, the head of GOP investigations. I haven't sent many emails like this before so please hear me out.
Now that I'm leading the investigations in DC, my good name is being attacked every day by the White House and dark money groups.
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62405397:6cn5WaGMN:m:1:3331421248:5F601A92CB0E2A6A7C66E7DED8F8F85B:r)
---
I'm not kidding, there is a guy at the White House whose entire job is to attack me in the national press every day because I have the courage to shine a light on the failures of the Biden Administration.
[**I 'm working day and night to defend myself from these attacks, and I'm relying on patriots across the country to support my campaign so I can fight back against these attacks.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62405397:6cn5WaGMN:m:1:3331421248:5F601A92CB0E2A6A7C66E7DED8F8F85B:r)
The Left has even launched a dark money group called the "Congressional Integrity Project" to undermine our work. They are determined to stop the truth about Joe and Hunter from seeing the light of day.
**[If you're as serious about exposing Biden as I am, I'm asking for your help with a contribution to my campaign.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62405397:6cn5WaGMN:m:1:3331421248:5F601A92CB0E2A6A7C66E7DED8F8F85B:r)**
It's crucial that I'm able to fight back against these attacks, my integrity and credibility must be defended.
Thanks for everything you're doing in our movement, I really do appreciate it. Thank you,
| [ **DONATE** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62405397:6cn5WaGMN:m:1:3331421248:5F601A92CB0E2A6A7C66E7DED8F8F85B:r)

The Justice Department is making HUGE moves to bring Trump to justice after he incited the deadly January 6 insurrection.

**_DONALD TRUMP CAN OFFICIALLY BE SUED!_**

But Trump and the MAGA mob are HELL-BENT on escaping accountability — so we need to demonstrate MASSIVE grassroots support to stop them.

name: Team AOC
subject: Amazon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Amazon is pulling out of its HQ2 deal
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230307-3974-header&t=1&akid=3974%2E2526796%2EsvzFfI)
Have you heard?
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230307.KeoEUO&refcode=em20230307-3974-P_FND_ANO_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3974%2E2526796%2EsvzFfI)
Back in 2019, Amazon attempted to build their new Headquarters in Queens. Alexandria opposed the deal in which the City and State promised $3 _billion_ in tax breaks in exchange for promises of “Amazon jobs” with little guarantees or guardrails.
Amazon ultimately decided not to build their headquarters in New York. And consequently the whole New York power establishment came for Alexandria.
**Billboards went up in Times Square denouncing Alexandria, powerful politicians promised “revenge” and op-eds came out insulting her intelligence. But, in the end, we were right and they were wrong.**
Alexandria may never get an apology for that time, but it was worth it. We protected our district from a scam deal to drain public dollars from schools and infrastructure in exchange for empty promises.
Alexandria never backs down from standing up for what is right, regardless of the insults and threats directed at her by the powerful establishment or corporate interests. Her job is to see the big picture and take care of our communities — and that’s exactly what she did here.
[Can you show your support for Alexandria’s work to protect and defend our communities from corporate greed and special interests by making a $3 contribution to our campaign today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230307.KeoEUO&refcode=em20230307-3974-P_FND_ANO_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3974%2E2526796%2EsvzFfI)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230307.KeoEUO&refcode=em20230307-3974-P_FND_ANO_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3974%2E2526796%2EsvzFfI)**
Your contribution will help show that you and our movement has her back, no matter what.
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230307?refcode=em20230307-3974-P_FND_ANO_HDL&t=23&refcode2=3974_2526796_svzFfI&akid=3974%2E2526796%2EsvzFfI)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230307-3974-P_FND_ANO_HDL&t=24&akid=3974%2E2526796%2EsvzFfI)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=3974%2E2526796%2EsvzFfI) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=3974%2E2526796%2EsvzFfI) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=3974%2E2526796%2EsvzFfI)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

subject: We must stand up for Social Security!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| **[Sign your name: Support Social Security expansion and stop Congressional Republican attempts to undermine it!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59818728/395194179/1701156455?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230307_PT_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_socialsecurity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjJjNzBjNC0xZGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUVg3yxXJ6ARGvwucQWIFgqrVA8A6fEyvZHSCCD9Hq8=&emci=accf95a6-1cbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9b2c70c4-1dbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)**
**[Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59818729/395194180/1701156455?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230307_PT_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_socialsecurity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjJjNzBjNC0xZGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUVg3yxXJ6ARGvwucQWIFgqrVA8A6fEyvZHSCCD9Hq8=&emci=accf95a6-1cbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9b2c70c4-1dbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)**
* * *

There’s a growing number of voices who are saying they want to cut or privatize Social Security.

**For Dan, that’s a non-starter and something he will strongly oppose.**

We should not be making it harder for seniors to get by and pay their bills. Insurance programs like Social Security—that workers have paid into their entire life—are an earned benefit, NOT a handout.

Dan has always fought to pass legislation to protect and strengthen Social Security. He’s committed to fighting against any move to undermine the program because he knows that over two million Michiganders rely on Social Security to make ends meet.

Dan knows that people who work their entire lives and contribute with every paycheck deserve to be able to rely on that money when they retire.

**[We have to fight back against Republican attempts to undermine Social Security. We need 1,000 signatures on our petition in the next 24 hours so we can keep applying pressure and stand up for Social Security. Will you sign on?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59818730/395194181/1701156455?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230307_PT_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_socialsecurity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjJjNzBjNC0xZGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUVg3yxXJ6ARGvwucQWIFgqrVA8A6fEyvZHSCCD9Hq8=&emci=accf95a6-1cbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9b2c70c4-1dbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)**
**[Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59818731/395194182/1701156455?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230307_PT_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_socialsecurity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjJjNzBjNC0xZGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUVg3yxXJ6ARGvwucQWIFgqrVA8A6fEyvZHSCCD9Hq8=&emci=accf95a6-1cbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9b2c70c4-1dbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)**
Dan is committed to fighting for Michigan seniors. He led the charge for a law that allows Medicare to negotiate lower drug costs. He introduced legislation to get seniors their lost pensions, secured funding for affordable senior housing, and now as a member of the House Budget Committee, he’s committed to ensuring Republicans don’t slash funding for Social Security.

It’s Congress’s duty to protect Social Security benefits, not pull the rug out from Michigan seniors.

**[If you agree, we need your voice: Sign your name to the petition today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59818732/395194183/1701156455?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230307_PT_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_socialsecurity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjJjNzBjNC0xZGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUVg3yxXJ6ARGvwucQWIFgqrVA8A6fEyvZHSCCD9Hq8=&emci=accf95a6-1cbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9b2c70c4-1dbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)**

— Team Kildee

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! clean_body: | There’s a growing number of voices who are saying they want to cut or privatize Social Security. For Dan, that’s a non-starter and something he will strongly oppose. We should not be making it harder for seniors to get by and pay their bills. Insurance programs like Social Security—that workers have paid into their entire life—are an earned benefit, NOT a handout. Dan has always fought to pass legislation to protect and strengthen Social Security. He’s committed to fighting against any move to undermine the program because he knows that over two million Michiganders rely on Social Security to make ends meet. Dan knows that people who work their entire lives and contribute with every paycheck deserve to be able to rely on that money when they retire. Dan is committed to fighting for Michigan seniors. He led the charge for a law that allows Medicare to negotiate lower drug costs. He introduced legislation to get seniors their lost pensions, secured funding for affordable senior housing, and now as a member of the House Budget Committee, he’s committed to ensuring Republicans don’t slash funding for Social Security. It’s Congress’s duty to protect Social Security benefits, not pull the rug out from Michigan seniors. — Team Kildee Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States ** **

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59818867/395194657/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjM0Y2M2Yi0xZWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFD2i-8GU5R1f2pgqv_R_TjgpbRuGHDOdbqGDGLkdC4=)
Hi Friends —
I wanted to reach out with a quick note today and explain why I count on your support and why it’s so important that you contribute today.
I am honored to have been elected House Freshman Class President of the 118th United States Congress, having the opportunity to follow in the footsteps of many historic Democrats over the years.
Becoming Freshman Class President has given me a lot of responsibility — from becoming a united voice for the Freshman Class to helping guide House Democrats’ strategy to holding Republicans accountable. And on top of all that, I have the responsibility to help elect Democrats all across the country — Democrats that could decide the House majority in 2024 and take back the gavel from Kevin McCarthy.
[**So, I am asking you today if you can make a contribution to help me continue to make an impact in Congress and in our Democratic leadership. Your contribution will go directly toward my work to take back the majority and deliver progress for working families.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59818868/395194658/60992958?refcode2=df34cc6b-1ebd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230307-1-t1a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjM0Y2M2Yi0xZWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFD2i-8GU5R1f2pgqv_R_TjgpbRuGHDOdbqGDGLkdC4=)
When you contribute today, you are not only supporting me but helping support the 34 freshman House Democrats that are fighting for American families across the country. Your contribution puts us one step closer to defeating Republicans and regaining the House Majority.
[**So if you can afford it, please make a contribution to support my work today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59818869/395194659/60992958?refcode2=df34cc6b-1ebd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230307-1-t1a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjM0Y2M2Yi0xZWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFD2i-8GU5R1f2pgqv_R_TjgpbRuGHDOdbqGDGLkdC4=)
Thank you in advance for your contribution and continued support.
Robert

body:
| |
---
|
---
| | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.
---

This is why 2A Task Force was created, to protect our constitutional rights and to stop the Democrats that are hell-bent on taking away our freedoms. The Second Amendment ensures that we can keep our communities and the ones we love safe from harm, but also protects us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. There are now actual checks and balances, but it's not an excuse to **STOP** building an army of 2A Task Force warriors, who are devoted to ensuring that Senate Democrats fail to disarm American citizens. What do you say, Friend? Join the fight and support 2A Task Force.

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like YOU – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities. | | This is why 2A Task Force was created, to protect our constitutional rights and to stop the Democrats that are hell-bent on taking away our freedoms. The Second Amendment ensures that we can keep our communities and the ones we love safe from harm, but also protects us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. There are now actual checks and balances, but it's not an excuse to STOP building an army of 2A Task Force warriors, who are devoted to ensuring that Senate Democrats fail to disarm American citizens. What do you say, Friend? Join the fight and support 2A Task Force. | | | Paid for by 2nd Amendment Task Force

name: Ted Cruz
subject: NO MORE OIL to Communist China!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62405418:60aF7aGNO:m:1:3331421248:8FEFFF5981185E275B1199087E5516F2:r)
---
Peter, My message is clear and simple: **NO MORE OIL to Communist China!** I'm proud to be leading the charge, alongside West Virginia Democrat Joe Manchin, to build a bipartisan coalition to stop the Biden administration from shipping one more drop from our nation's oil reserve to our nation's greatest advisory. Senate Republicans are all-in and we have FIVE Democrat cosponsors on the Cruz-Manchin Protecting America's Strategic Petroleum Reserve from China Act!**
** **I shared more on this important legislation on one of the latest episodes of _Verdict_. **
---
[**LISTEN NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62405418:60aF7aGNO:m:1:3331421248:8FEFFF5981185E275B1199087E5516F2:r)
---
Joe Biden exploited our nation's oil reserve to drop the cost of gas before the election. You've seen where prices have headed since. And we know that some of the oil the Biden administration released was shipped out to Chinese communists with ties to Joe and Hunter and their business dealings. _You can bet that Joe Biden and his far-left pals are firing up their spin machine to stop us! _ **It 's time to take China off the table, period.** The fact that we've drained our stockpile of emergency oil to help fuel China's economic growth is the definition of insanity.

For Liberty,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62405418:60aF7aGNO:m:1:3331421248:8FEFFF5981185E275B1199087E5516F2:r)

Peter, All of us are hoping for a brighter future in Indiana. When it comes to having meaningful work, good education for our children, and financial stability for the future, we’re all united in our goals. We want what’s best for our families and the Indiana Democratic Party is working to make that a reality. This year we have a huge chance to build Indiana up for the future by electing mayors and other city and town officials who share our values. The impact of these elections will compound over years and help us improve our state. name: Ro Khanna
subject: We need action to rein in childcare costs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
The lack of affordable, quality childcare is a national problem and requires a comprehensive national solution.
#
Friend,
There is a childcare crisis in America.
More and more Americans are struggling to make ends meet, and working parents are spending a shocking percentage of their income simply to pay for childcare.
Half of new parents have to spend at least 20% of their income on childcare. Single parents earning an average wage have to spend 35% of their income.
And the problem is getting worse. Real wages are stagnant, and childcare costs are [growing even faster than inflation](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11303?t=9&akid=2642%2E946728%2E8pwmGf).
**We have to fix this.**
[**Sign if you agree: Congress must take action to cap childcare costs.**](https://act.rokhanna.com/sign/childcare-reform-petition/?t=10&akid=2642%2E946728%2E8pwmGf)
[****](https://act.rokhanna.com/sign/childcare-reform-petition/?t=11&akid=2642%2E946728%2E8pwmGf)
The lack of affordable, quality childcare is a national problem and requires a comprehensive national solution. We can’t be distracted by bogus excuses like “we can’t afford it.” [The average wealthy democracy contributes 28 times more](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11304?t=12&akid=2642%2E946728%2E8pwmGf) than the United States to support its citizens’ childcare needs. Canada, for example, just made quality childcare available for just $10 a day. In one of the world’s wealthiest countries, why can’t we do the same?
[**TAKE ACTION: Sign the petition telling Congress to cap costs for quality childcare.**](https://act.rokhanna.com/sign/childcare-reform-petition/?t=13&akid=2642%2E946728%2E8pwmGf)
Onward,
Ro

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-em-footer?refcode=em20230307-2642-footer&t=14&refcode2=2642_946728_8pwmGf&akid=2642%2E946728%2E8pwmGf)**
---
[](https://facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA) | [](https://twitter.com/RoKhanna)
Email us: [info@rokhanna.com](mailto: info@rokhanna.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Ro for Congress, PO Box 3513, Santa Clara, CA 95051.

body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59819784/395197876/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5YjA5ZDQ5LTIyYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IQWhLOxmAiGZrAULWk0ujZDoxxh0IYJ7HGx2e6f8kuY=&emci=f0c54381-17bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=99b09d49-22bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) | | | Dear Peter, We have just two weeks until the start of [virtual lobby days for the environment!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59819785/395197877/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5YjA5ZDQ5LTIyYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IQWhLOxmAiGZrAULWk0ujZDoxxh0IYJ7HGx2e6f8kuY=&emci=f0c54381-17bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=99b09d49-22bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) And it comes at an important time in the legislative session. With an important bill deadline approaching, we need your help to ensure this year’s biggest environmental priorities don’t die in committee, and the anti-environment bills don’t gain traction. [**Can you join us for OLCV/OCN 2023 Virtual Lobby Days?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59819786/395197878/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5YjA5ZDQ5LTIyYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IQWhLOxmAiGZrAULWk0ujZDoxxh0IYJ7HGx2e6f8kuY=&emci=f0c54381-17bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=99b09d49-22bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) All it takes is a couple hours of your time on March 21st and a couple more on your day of lobby meetings. All of it done over Zoom. All of it adding up to a big virtual splash for the environment! **OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Days – March 21st to 23rd**
The Virtual Clean Green Lobby Machine Returns (via Zoom) to Support 2023 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon
**Tuesday, March 21st, from 6pm-8pm** – Priority Presentations & Training (all participants)
**Wednesday, March 22nd, hold from 9am-5pm** – Lobby Meetings for SDs 1-16
**Thursday, March 23rd, hold from 9am-5pm** – Lobby Meetings for SDs 17-30
You can look up your senate district (SD) [here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59819787/395197879/1765198759?appid=fd070b56c975456ea2a25f7e3f4289d1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5YjA5ZDQ5LTIyYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IQWhLOxmAiGZrAULWk0ujZDoxxh0IYJ7HGx2e6f8kuY=&emci=f0c54381-17bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=99b09d49-22bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230)
Place: **Entirely on Zoom** (links sent to RSVPs a few days prior)
[**RSVP today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59819788/395197880/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5YjA5ZDQ5LTIyYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IQWhLOxmAiGZrAULWk0ujZDoxxh0IYJ7HGx2e6f8kuY=&emci=f0c54381-17bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=99b09d49-22bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) On March 21st, we will do a training that covers all the official Priorities for a Healthy Oregon, which are Resilient, Efficient Buildings Bill Package; Toxic-Free Bill Package; Factory Farm Moratorium; Zero Waste Bill Package; Natural Climate Solutions; and the budget. Then, on either March 22nd or 23rd, you will get to meet with your state representative and senator to ask for their support on these important bills! What makes our environmental lobby days fun, powerful, and rewarding is people like you. [**So, I hope you will RSVP today and join us in just two weeks!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59819789/395197881/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5YjA5ZDQ5LTIyYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IQWhLOxmAiGZrAULWk0ujZDoxxh0IYJ7HGx2e6f8kuY=&emci=f0c54381-17bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=99b09d49-22bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Thank you, Britney VanCitters

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, We have just two weeks until the start of And it comes at an important time in the legislative session. With an important bill deadline approaching, we need your help to ensure this year’s biggest environmental priorities don’t die in committee, and the anti-environment bills don’t gain traction. All it takes is a couple hours of your time on March 21st and a couple more on your day of lobby meetings. All of it done over Zoom. All of it adding up to a big virtual splash for the environment! OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Days – March 21st to 23rd The Virtual Clean Green Lobby Machine Returns (via Zoom) to Support 2023 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon Tuesday, March 21st, from 6pm-8pm – Priority Presentations & Training (all participants) Wednesday, March 22nd, hold from 9am-5pm – Lobby Meetings for SDs 1-16 Thursday, March 23rd, hold from 9am-5pm – Lobby Meetings for SDs 17-30 You can look up your senate district (SD) Place: Entirely on Zoom (links sent to RSVPs a few days prior) On March 21st, we will do a training that covers all the official Priorities for a Healthy Oregon, which are Resilient, Efficient Buildings Bill Package; Toxic-Free Bill Package; Factory Farm Moratorium; Zero Waste Bill Package; Natural Climate Solutions; and the budget. Then, on either March 22nd or 23rd, you will get to meet with your state representative and senator to ask for their support on these important bills! What makes our environmental lobby days fun, powerful, and rewarding is people like you. Thank you, Britney VanCitters OLCV Organizing Manager | | ---|---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters. | ---|---

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: On this day in 1965:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Today, I am always reminded of my friend and hero, the late Congressman John Lewis.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59820166/395199624/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzEyYzFlYTgtMjJiZC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pj3Qd4JaovVn7ZbtMtzpLkVNRAKt9EZYCYmGd5T_X-g=&emci=3a561316-fdb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=712c1ea8-22bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

On today's anniversary of "Bloody Sunday," I am always reminded of my friend and hero, the late Congressman John Lewis.

In 1965, Congressman Lewis led over 600 civil rights activists across the Edmund Pettus Bridge to demand voting rights and protections. Their peaceful protest was met with violence from state troopers and extremists, and Congressman Lewis bore scars on his head from the attack for the rest of his life.

He bravely fought for the right to vote, because he knew that voicing our opinions at the ballot box is a cornerstone of American democracy.

**[On the anniversary of "Bloody Sunday," I hope you'll join me in honoring Congressman Lewis's memory and the countless Civil Rights activists who have been leading the movement for social justice for decades. Will you sign on to our petition to demand Congress defend our right to vote?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59820169/395199625/-698040624?ms=em23_230307_bloody_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230307_bloody_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230307_bloody_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230307_bloody_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=+s7671AAF4BVrjC5pFu+Sxcu2R9ntT82ZDpOYeaqPHLVLJe8Mi0wXD/GMZn+GpdizqRDUkDNg+FwIrnbixvIGUC2AoKIkMsr2s6tJvONAP2AuudpHzD6LbLFtmTR79UDh6TaVBC8VgG4Dzxu75v74cobYoJ0qhRjmSmpTYmjEQ8=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzEyYzFlYTgtMjJiZC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pj3Qd4JaovVn7ZbtMtzpLkVNRAKt9EZYCYmGd5T_X-g=&emci=3a561316-fdb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=712c1ea8-22bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)**

In 2023 alone, state legislators have introduced 150 restrictive voting bills and 27 election interference bills. These laws brazenly attempt to restrict and sabotage the rights of voters of color, seniors, and young people.

For far too long, voter suppression has been wielded to silence the voices of marginalized communities. As citizens of this nation, each of us has a role to play in the fight for equality – **because none of us are equal until we all are.**

I have proudly co-sponsored legislation expanding and strengthening the government's ability to respond to voting discrimination and protect the voices of ALL American voters.

**[Congressman Lewis's fight lives on in all of us. On today's anniversary, please join me in calling on Congress to defend our constitutional right to vote.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59820171/395199628/-698040624?ms=em23_230307_bloody_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230307_bloody_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230307_bloody_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230307_bloody_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=+s7671AAF4BVrjC5pFu+Sxcu2R9ntT82ZDpOYeaqPHLVLJe8Mi0wXD/GMZn+GpdizqRDUkDNg+FwIrnbixvIGUC2AoKIkMsr2s6tJvONAP2AuudpHzD6LbLFtmTR79UDh6TaVBC8VgG4Dzxu75v74cobYoJ0qhRjmSmpTYmjEQ8=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzEyYzFlYTgtMjJiZC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pj3Qd4JaovVn7ZbtMtzpLkVNRAKt9EZYCYmGd5T_X-g=&emci=3a561316-fdb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=712c1ea8-22bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)**

In solidarity,

Derek

clean_body: Today, I am always reminded of my friend and hero, the late Congressman John Lewis. Peter, On today's anniversary of "Bloody Sunday," I am always reminded of my friend and hero, the late Congressman John Lewis. In 1965, Congressman Lewis led over 600 civil rights activists across the Edmund Pettus Bridge to demand voting rights and protections. Their peaceful protest was met with violence from state troopers and extremists, and Congressman Lewis bore scars on his head from the attack for the rest of his life. He bravely fought for the right to vote, because he knew that voicing our opinions at the ballot box is a cornerstone of American democracy. In 2023 alone, state legislators have introduced 150 restrictive voting bills and 27 election interference bills. These laws brazenly attempt to restrict and sabotage the rights of voters of color, seniors, and young people. For far too long, voter suppression has been wielded to silence the voices of marginalized communities. As citizens of this nation, each of us has a role to play in the fight for equality – because none of us are equal until we all are. I have proudly co-sponsored legislation expanding and strengthening the government's ability to respond to voting discrimination and protect the voices of ALL American voters. In solidarity, Derek Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma, WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. | =

The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team, "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership." | | | "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP" You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year. We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. "Renew your membership before it’s too late >>>" \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM Subject: We hate to see you go. Friend, for the last 3 years , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,but we have bad news for you. It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak. There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to "11:59 PM TONIGHT." "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?" | | | "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP" | - "ORDER NOW" We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side. You only have until "11:59 PM" to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. "Renew before it’s too late >>>" Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down. Thank you, Mark, National Republican Membership Office | | | | | | "Membership Footer" Join the conservative team working tirelessly to rebuild America! Retaking the Majority was just the first step. Now the next step towards saving our country is underway, and House Republicans need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. "Step up and claim your 2023 House Majority Membership today!"** | | | "DONATE" | | Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team. | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Team Baldwin
subject: We’ll cut to the chase
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/126?t=1004&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]Hi Peter, we’ll cut right to the chase: We’re respectfully
asking you to pitch in $5 today to support Tammy’s work to make progress
for our working families and defend her Senate seat — and with it, the
Democratic Senate majority. We’ll explain more in just a minute.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/127?t=1005&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/128?t=1006&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/129?t=1007&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/130?t=1008&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/131?t=1009&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/126?t=1010&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

We know we ask you to pitch in to our campaign every so often, but do you
know why?

We ask because thousands of $5 donations from emails like this one helped
Tammy win reelection in 2018 in a state that went to Donald Trump just two
years earlier.

It was $5 that helped us flip the Senate majority in 2020 and hold onto it
in 2022, allowing us to pass landmark legislation like the Inflation
Reduction Act to address rising costs, combat the climate crisis, and
lower prescription drug prices.

And it was $5 that allowed Congress to pass Tammy’s historic legislation
to protect marriage equality. The Respect for Marriage Act requires the
government to recognize the validity of same-sex and interracial
marriages. That’s a big deal.

We know five bucks might not seem like a lot, especially when you compare
it to National Republicans’ jaw-dropping fundraising hauls. But to us,
every $5 donation makes a huge difference — it’s what sustains our work to
protect our Democratic majorities so we can keep making progress for
working families.

Now, as you probably know, we’ve got a tough fight ahead of us. Cook
Political Report wrote that Democrats are going to be playing defense this
entire election cycle, including right here in Wisconsin. If we’re going
to re-elect Tammy and hold onto the Democratic Senate majority, it’s going
to take a lot of folks pitching in what they can, when they can. That’s
why we’re asking:

[ http://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/132?t=1011&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]Will you pitch in just $5 to support our grassroots campaign today?
Your support will help us defend Tammy’s seat so she can continue to
deliver for Wisconsin’s working families.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/127?t=1012&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/128?t=1013&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/129?t=1014&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/130?t=1015&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/131?t=1016&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/126?t=1017&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for pitching in if you can today, Peter. It means the
world to our team, and to Tammy.

— Team Baldwin

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1002&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]www.tammybaldwin.com | [ mailto:INFO@tammybaldwin.com ]INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM | [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=1003&akid=24%2E35263%2Eo8kixi ]Privacy Policy

name: Adam Frisch
subject: I’m running against Lauren Boebert again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hello, **I am officially running again against Lauren Boebert!** In 2022, we came just 546 votes short of kicking Boebert out of Congress. It was the closest race in the __entire__ country. **Now, I’m running again to finish the job, but I need you with me from day one:** [**Please, will you split a donation now between me and Gabe Vasquez, and become a Founding Donor to my 2024 campaign to defeat Boebert?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59820977/395203459/-97598275?refcode=fl_em_ta_20230307frisch_af_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjY3NTYzMy0yNGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GI1iJdicyh0UKlidbJtJshyddlj202bs8AK7QmuYGcA=) No one believed we could pull it off in 2022. All of the pundits said Colorado’s 3rd congressional district was a “Safe Republican” seat. The national Democrats _and_ the national Republicans wrote us off. But we proved them all wrong. With Lauren Boebert now on notice, this campaign is going to get even nastier. Her Super PACs and supporters are going to spin lie after lie against me on TV. **I’m counting on you to be able to correct the record and hold Boebert accountable.** [**No amount is too small: Click here now to split a donation between Gabe Vasquez's and my campaign of whatever you can afford today. It’s important that we have as strong of an early showing as possible.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59820978/395203460/-97598275?refcode=fl_em_ta_20230307frisch_af_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjY3NTYzMy0yNGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GI1iJdicyh0UKlidbJtJshyddlj202bs8AK7QmuYGcA=) I never could have done it last time without supporters and donors like you. I am eternally grateful to have you alongside me again. With gratitude -
Adam
---
| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico.

clean_body: | Hello, I am officially running again against Lauren Boebert! In 2022, we came just 546 votes short of kicking Boebert out of Congress. It was the closest race in the entire country. Now, I’m running again to finish the job, but I need you with me from day one: = No one believed we could pull it off in 2022. All of the pundits said Colorado’s 3rd congressional district was a “Safe Republican” seat. The national Democrats and the national Republicans wrote us off. But we proved them all wrong. With Lauren Boebert now on notice, this campaign is going to get even nastier. Her Super PACs and supporters are going to spin lie after lie against me on TV. I’m counting on you to be able to correct the record and hold Boebert accountable. = I never could have done it last time without supporters and donors like you. I am eternally grateful to have you alongside me again. With gratitude - Adam | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
From the growing Chinese Communist Party threats to protecting Taiwan, Mike is on the frontlines fighting for a more secure America.| | | [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d0855115a0c44908ca7ddd4bd4a463a&_e=YF3QUDLvThz0_bBYVpyhvQEavImSGhWqPWwzh-MvR6Ozjj7Tcd_sfjHj_t8IJcA96Lez3h6Q9ssataetjcY2AaPzziixF4LQyiV3ExLWPbX1GeQaS_MDKwxWHCvdEdF5hh5wHTzGevy8tEo0iaVNQ8YalKps35h2o_z_59s_ZN764Y3vHA7M5rAJqk7KW5KxTK8fMCysyol-Z3XDnPKXyw%3D%3D)

| | Peter, America’s growing tensions with the Chinese Communist Party stem from their efforts to spy on our nation, to steal intellectual property and undercut American competitiveness, to push “digital fentanyl” to our kids via TikTok, and smuggle _actual_ fentanyl across our southern border. Mike understands the growing national security threat we face. That’s why he’s come out swinging against the CCP for bringing us into the _New Cold War._ Every month, we bring you the latest from around the globe. You can give to Mike **_[here](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d0855115a0c44908ca7ddd4bd4a463a&_e=YF3QUDLvThz0_bBYVpyhvcNRGHu20cXc_IMWCpXjyPhI0F2aAq-1zfyLs5LxNoLSbIayJnCiH0Bdf8y492TLfwxgAEdMBKNXclz2jG1EqWKGfDhd5ygP0PjM1I7tZJd1-Mj4Gebcid8EcfsTu2hl3NzH9lfJvv42ndiWqH6oOEz0jLrTguyJK3YmNMbZflkR9j8AmsqItc1yFR76s9ldbl9ZneNMAH8JH5QHuLFm8cDTsiKdqibHTIxTk87qyQGl)_** and check out his work on international issues below.

[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d0855115a0c44908ca7ddd4bd4a463a&_e=YF3QUDLvThz0_bBYVpyhveeazPktx6uV7eEy5c7re7BuiYTVGm4Tm0Ymr9Fs7JA02sa3DOY-S0swvyztst_zVnoYAOqqw6c3NGDQCTPOLBPaqo4Wpvb0WYR6w64_Tt0RPfoPVZTPXlhd5oaid9QqA8-idCiD8Mrm4tIlAEFSbXrQUJQdhsabF5d2Pibf04KDrcf7yZFWWszyTtfRaqc-yluQOA3e_STMIyPbgEfFc7M_GvFiv6zkbdnWVhTNMEZUX_5Ub5LR4k340qq8dnE7tQ%3D%3D)
---
**Bottom Line:**_“The cyber assault on Taiwan has already begun. If we are to prevent Taiwan from suffering the same fate as Ukraine, we must work to ensure U.S. Cyber Forces are efficiently organized and operationally capable of defending our interests in cyberspace.”_
---
|
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d0855115a0c44908ca7ddd4bd4a463a&_e=YF3QUDLvThz0_bBYVpyhvYuzHoNSO1uX3MLmsyx97fDDbe2fBLNl23cOLIz_RLzIfs3fuXbuGOoMGLEERe-B1b7DeU4e2J6rgsvdVobx3yvwcaPEbPKuR0gQ33-QXS1NDksrYfxJvtP4LzBP_xJtKhg0SdAX6OXK36G48LY1efGdY1QykgDw0tyRHWAcfdXF41J8CXgz256462aNqWocUiIco7gl23BG4s_j3qR4I2SeEbhaNyHhoHMsDgqqSd4G)
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d0855115a0c44908ca7ddd4bd4a463a&_e=YF3QUDLvThz0_bBYVpyhvYuzHoNSO1uX3MLmsyx97fDDbe2fBLNl23cOLIz_RLzIfs3fuXbuGOoMGLEERe-B1b7DeU4e2J6rgsvdVobx3ytqJdLGUyRmt10DbmZ1-4dQKEUmbT1hmAgstf1LnFwvh3_zsHo_f7JkgKP0yoXCWFmklSP2ddfcrRqJlhMxfANn-GHJlLOcvDCzeBBsgrUnd61ypZX6nTdawPRK21x36sJ_NyjSFRqLDHZpqESxzEHl)
---
**Bottom Line:**_"This is a sound investment in U.S. national security because not only are we defending a country from authoritarian aggression, not only are we taking one of our biggest geopolitical competitors down several notches in the process, and we're doing it without U.S. boots on the ground in harm's way, but we're also simultaneously dealing a blow to the Chinese Communist Party.”_
---
|
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d0855115a0c44908ca7ddd4bd4a463a&_e=YF3QUDLvThz0_bBYVpyhvRPopvxkj6tX5qiInxpo4BIkjixUdYskSIS4bEFZEasC2XXwT6ESUdXdfNDrHY-kudVhRBFN3-DWvF2yb-3aekyP4NRIhyamYdpnnza5_6QGj-3rM0slXlYi9CC8WPAY1RhW7vUymi8e3JyA4SFrcrxV71jmslBSy-RymnjBIbi4wa59xN9xAje5PimNYXuWqoD37Hifx9ohiP9X-6zOOQtws_5-i8MJbTz4mjmnvZp7BDtukXNlRAIefpU1ibGpKpqAeUxFLRx9jSpJ_K2SN8E%3D)
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d0855115a0c44908ca7ddd4bd4a463a&_e=YF3QUDLvThz0_bBYVpyhvRPopvxkj6tX5qiInxpo4BIkjixUdYskSIS4bEFZEasC2XXwT6ESUdXdfNDrHY-kudVhRBFN3-DWvF2yb-3aekyP4NRIhyamYdpnnza5_6QGj-3rM0slXlYi9CC8WPAY1Ziq9077CbkVNhJCfHtyFc-PJjrcBnQRFrbATYZmhSjexT6KabLFE_5LqhXR6gjBsa6yOFTi82vFGr-cpXUmVcZ42q5hxeTD4ZS6O6Hb0qN7DaiAYH0UXbeZ5douiKEnp0CSo1nRN4XF_hgcrl_nIDo%3D)
---
**Bottom Line: “** _The legislation Rep. Krishnamoorthi and Wisconsin's Republican Rep. Mike Gallagher introduced in the House singles out TikTok and Bytedance. But it also leaves room for restrictions on social media companies housed in countries of ‘concern’ that include China, Iran, North Korea, Cuba and Venezuela.”_
---
**Peter, Mike is working to hold the Chinese Communist Party accountable for bringing us into the New Cold War. **
---
[**SUPPORT MIKE’S CAMPAIGN**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d0855115a0c44908ca7ddd4bd4a463a&_e=YF3QUDLvThz0_bBYVpyhvcNRGHu20cXc_IMWCpXjyPhI0F2aAq-1zfyLs5LxNoLSbIayJnCiH0Bdf8y492TLf6XdNl5fDgil-fppvaYhUR6SpdGcknzFl97EiJP5vtXeEeddnx_mlVJF8DeWgapbGU2AXWONP2YOcnN4sF__ZuhEd8chlSXVGi1DkOq3LBO3QD87ppahQNOicLZDyPKhHliDtlbvqz-26eFSXKTtvec77AkWYtNZs-VvRhI6ak1D)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1552e2f1368241079e7c2b011595cc41&_e=QK4sL7OflBILS0EKsOQn805VQlrmb63p1F9eSGKKPYLxh0cDGQYe2Nssn7ddxkxR0nXYj9KxMx660RClfKPxrq-0kio55Lnyz6mjiz9_ryMzDg_YkF8rMF2Q9PncYiM__sXueMVJ6dd4aBQdqtpA-XPVA2PoU-GkjWgDGaUXI6-rp2suW6TUnTohpEXy1fL6Qa8yumPA_xc0Tl4SrQAA2Qstp-N9Kmk7FnhdlkQ3EVlZG2WALylJCSSw6APTRijRxqMdJKD5j5smAKq9ya6uchwAh3g8bNCgCjvibu8ruNQ9My4T6co085jATQA7-YxCXTrzqKgrj2gkp2fzwuGKjvA6dN99azcyoIgy24znuyEsqRkDBGPAHyEWM2d3MVH46EG8-1r8T1po1NWuy8rsnw%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1552e2f1368241079e7c2b011595cc41&_e=QK4sL7OflBILS0EKsOQn805VQlrmb63p1F9eSGKKPYLxh0cDGQYe2Nssn7ddxkxR0nXYj9KxMx660RClfKPxrq-0kio55Lnyz6mjiz9_ryMzDg_YkF8rMF2Q9PncYiM__sXueMVJ6dd4aBQdqtpA-XPVA2PoU-GkjWgDGaUXI6-rp2suW6TUnTohpEXy1fL6Qa8yumPA_xc0Tl4SrQAA2Qstp-N9Kmk7FnhdlkQ3EVlZG2WALylJCSSw6APTRijRsRJFP5DFB4n2JvkSWmGeDMoiuYWZEKWluPd-VzBgnomAvxctYF5_rydfnrKw-kwNxDUHmxvp5XwjwZ8ogA3IB4xHCP1bgfW_iP5u14pS2WIUvlGeTh6AGe2S-CUv3fxkE3v5ccV_Xqe450EIZ3f-Cg%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1552e2f1368241079e7c2b011595cc41&_e=QK4sL7OflBILS0EKsOQn805VQlrmb63p1F9eSGKKPYLxh0cDGQYe2Nssn7ddxkxR0nXYj9KxMx660RClfKPxrq-0kio55Lnyz6mjiz9_ryMzDg_YkF8rMF2Q9PncYiM__sXueMVJ6dd4aBQdqtpA-XPVA2PoU-GkjWgDGaUXI6-rp2suW6TUnTohpEXy1fL6Qa8yumPA_xc0Tl4SrQAA2Qstp-N9Kmk7FnhdlkQ3EVlZG2WALylJCSSw6APTRijRPdm0XsseYwwXA-WAZmXx6jrQx8Jrk9WnTQaExfK9ReY8wjQWcgR0r5BNV1gKPD1vnbmPTrQX6symjyiJZZFj6nMmUb0DjMHkWcV788qnff1dlysHG80LxeZLPTEZhZzf81EbjKPKchi_6KxInV-PpA%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1552e2f1368241079e7c2b011595cc41&_e=QK4sL7OflBILS0EKsOQn805VQlrmb63p1F9eSGKKPYLxh0cDGQYe2Nssn7ddxkxR0nXYj9KxMx660RClfKPxrq-0kio55Lnyz6mjiz9_ryMzDg_YkF8rMF2Q9PncYiM__sXueMVJ6dd4aBQdqtpA-XPVA2PoU-GkjWgDGaUXI6-rp2suW6TUnTohpEXy1fL6Qa8yumPA_xc0Tl4SrQAA2Qstp-N9Kmk7FnhdlkQ3EVlZG2WALylJCSSw6APTRijR4jU2HK-gran_K8tbfv0FNbxn5JW-915kIYNjo7SvKoWe0g0D5p4Facr4HvnYh09XidLdXdLjZ-GlTRigfGGjKd2GdYctLz4rkZFbYqFbOsfqK4yWb2WIjd2jX7pbLwEGec0BF-MPQ2XUTM2MwQA1fQ%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1552e2f1368241079e7c2b011595cc41&_e=QK4sL7OflBILS0EKsOQn805VQlrmb63p1F9eSGKKPYLxh0cDGQYe2Nssn7ddxkxR0nXYj9KxMx660RClfKPxrq-0kio55Lnyz6mjiz9_ryMzDg_YkF8rMF2Q9PncYiM__sXueMVJ6dd4aBQdqtpA-XPVA2PoU-GkjWgDGaUXI6-rp2suW6TUnTohpEXy1fL6Qa8yumPA_xc0Tl4SrQAA2Qstp-N9Kmk7FnhdlkQ3EVlZG2WALylJCSSw6APTRijRnXBXqhkCeKwgOfKPT1KNpAdiFLj7TV6RFylqz446wt6E6HlbTz-0PxYCSdHUe90ZPAxraCmhTDLc62Kb7iQbccTmvZ02YUdeNwb-hF9aBlMeo3X_IA_YT3o1-ip-9nHjn2yzr-PZDTTsRbPckA-X4w%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[ An In-depth Look At Tucker Carlson Shattering The January 6th Narrative ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgj5opbt3sbf7is8vp6istki6hg3seqgre3b1cl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9j61p34c5h2bs)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoth39tgm7a4k3k5mtjv574lidcinckqdc49j638_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9j61p34c5h2bs)
[ House Speaker Kevin McCarthy gave “Tucker Carlson Tonight” an exclusive preview of security camera footage from the Capitol Building, which had been concealed from the public for over two years. On Monday, Carlson shared snippets of the footage that feature key individuals from the January 6th incident. Speaker McCarthy provided over 40,000 hours of security camera footage, of which three sets were released to Fox News and Carlson. ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvp23i9i1ckajsm219h2g6qlp2rnkok1101c0e48_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s9j61p34c5h2bs)

We refuse to be silenced, and we hope you do too. and never miss a story. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition: Support efforts to reduce consumer fees
body:
A minute for fair credit practices!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T41d68004-da4a-4cd6-ae2b-3c19c0cdee90/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, The Biden administration has proposed new rules that would slash credit card late fees. Those fees could be reduced to $8, saving American consumers as much as $9 billion a year. **[Sign the petition: Support President Biden and Congress’ efforts to protect American consumers with the termination of “junk fees”.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8feed8a2-55aa-4506-aff0-e634d0075d29/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** President Biden will also urge Congress to ban hidden "junk fees" and penalties that creep into everyday retail services across industries including entertainment, utility, and travel. The Junk Fee Prevention Act would target excessive fees on things like online concerts, sporting events, airline tickets, hidden hotel fees, and termination fees for TV, phone, and internet services.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ccffee7-6d23-443a-8c6d-b40658919def/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| These efforts by the Biden administration to undo the burden of corporate-greed on consumers has been ongoing. The Biden administration previously announced efforts to reduce junk bank fees that largely target low-income folks and people of color. Those changes will reduce fees by more than $1 billion annually. The new proposed focus on “junk fees” will help millions of Americans find fast relief from costly fees that pile up and obstruct any meaningful efforts to reach economic relief. Join us in supporting the Biden administration’s efforts to curb harmful consumer fees, and urge Congress to do their part to protect consumers by passing the Junk Fee Prevention Act. **[Sign the petition: Support President Biden and Congress’ efforts to protect American consumers with the termination of “junk fees”.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T703d0845-373f-45cc-95e8-28ed85fff184/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Cliff
