| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc03fd0da-a716-43e1-8522-e9ae4257b8b6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, The Biden administration has proposed new rules that would slash credit card late fees. Those fees could be reduced to $8, saving American consumers as much as $9 billion a year. President Biden will also urge Congress to ban hidden "junk fees" and penalties that creep into everyday retail services across industries including entertainment, utility, and travel. The Junk Fee Prevention Act would target excessive fees on things like online concerts, sporting events, airline tickets, hidden hotel fees, and termination fees for TV, phone, and internet services. | | | | | | | | These efforts by the Biden administration to undo the burden of corporate-greed on consumers has been ongoing. The Biden administration previously announced efforts to reduce junk bank fees that largely target low-income folks and people of color. Those changes will reduce fees by more than $1 billion annually. The new proposed focus on “junk fees” will help millions of Americans find fast relief from costly fees that pile up and obstruct any meaningful efforts to reach economic relief. Join us in supporting the Biden administration’s efforts to curb harmful consumer fees, and urge Congress to do their part to protect consumers by passing the Junk Fee Prevention Act. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: In the dead of night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
Kevin McCarthy removed me from the House Intelligence Committee.

| Peter,

It actually happened.

In the middle of the night, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the House Intelligence Committee.

| | It's no wonder this race is gaining national attention ** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59828522/395206937/1176129059?sourceid=1048721&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRlOTcwMi0yOWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5WXPc4NlMG9Oc_4mqgZD3wcJhUjhkn3QgW4N9uS6tG0=&emci=0fcd1da1-09bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d1de9702-29bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** Judge Janet Protasiewicz is on the ballot for Wisconsin's state supreme court in less than a month, and the outcome of her race will determine reproductive and voting rights in her state for _years_ to come. **Donate to EMILYs List to help pro-choice women like Janet WIN consequential state and local races across the country as soon as April 4:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59828524/395206938/1176129059?sourceid=1048721&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRlOTcwMi0yOWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5WXPc4NlMG9Oc_4mqgZD3wcJhUjhkn3QgW4N9uS6tG0=&emci=0fcd1da1-09bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d1de9702-29bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** Peter,

Last month, EMILYs List proudly endorsed civil rights advocate and public servant Judge **Janet Protasiewicz** in her race for Wisconsin's state supreme court.

After decisively winning her primary last month, she's gearing up for one of the most consequential general elections since the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ last summer. Her opponent is a proud anti-choice extremist who's endorsed by three anti-abortion groups in the state and couldn't be a greater threat to democracy or abortion access in Wisconsin. **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59828528/395206939/1176129059?sourceid=1048721&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRlOTcwMi0yOWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5WXPc4NlMG9Oc_4mqgZD3wcJhUjhkn3QgW4N9uS6tG0=&emci=0fcd1da1-09bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d1de9702-29bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** **** As a former assistant district attorney, Janet's deep commitments to her community and impartiality have made her voice _critical_ to the progress of Wisconsin's justice system for over 35 years.

Here's the thing, Peter: The current makeup of Wisconsin's supreme court is _heavily_ weighted in favor of anti-democracy and anti-choice interests but Janet's race provides a unique opportunity to _flip_ the ideological balance of the court.

This year, the court is facing two hugely consequential cases: Republican efforts to undermine voting rights via redistricting _and_ the legality of an 1849 abortion ban. Needless to say, the results of both will affect _millions_. ******** ********We are proud to stand with candidates like Judge Janet, who are facing higher stakes than ever. Are you ready to step up? Donate now to support and help elect pro-choice, pro-democracy women to key offices across the country:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Help-Elect-Women-This-March](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59828540/395206946/1176129059?sourceid=1048721&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRlOTcwMi0yOWJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5WXPc4NlMG9Oc_4mqgZD3wcJhUjhkn3QgW4N9uS6tG0=&emci=0fcd1da1-09bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d1de9702-29bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)******** ******** Thank you for stepping up when it counts,

clean_body: | | | It's no wonder this race is gaining national attention Judge Janet Protasiewicz is on the ballot for Wisconsin's state supreme court in less than a month, and the outcome of her race will determine reproductive and voting rights in her state for years to come. Donate to EMILYs List to help pro-choice women like Janet WIN consequential state and local races across the country as soon as April 4: Peter, Last month, EMILYs List proudly endorsed civil rights advocate and public servant Judge Janet Protasiewicz in her race for Wisconsin's state supreme court. After decisively winning her primary last month, she's gearing up for one of the most consequential general elections since the overturning of Roe v. Wade last summer. Her opponent is a proud anti-choice extremist who's endorsed by three anti-abortion groups in the state and couldn't be a greater threat to democracy or abortion access in Wisconsin. As a former assistant district attorney, Janet's deep commitments to her community and impartiality have made her voice critical to the progress of Wisconsin's justice system for over 35 years. Here's the thing, Peter: The current makeup of Wisconsin's supreme court is heavily weighted in favor of anti-democracy and anti-choice interests but Janet's race provides a unique opportunity to flip the ideological balance of the court. This year, the court is facing two hugely consequential cases: Republican efforts to undermine voting rights via redistricting and the legality of an 1849 abortion ban. Needless to say, the results of both will affect millions. **** ****We are proud to stand with candidates like Judge Janet, who are facing higher stakes than ever. Are you ready to step up? Donate now to support and help elect pro-choice, pro-democracy women to key offices across the country: **** **** Thank you for stepping up when it counts, Sarah Curmi (she/her/hers) Vice President of State & Local Campaigns, EMILYs List **** **** ** ****** ******** ******** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Team Grassley
subject: Senator Grassley pressed the U.S. Attorney General about the investigation of Hunter Biden and the Biden family’s foreign financial entanglements.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
| [](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=afab5af5699a44b89827cc997df6398e&_e=stsTIHL7bThxgsH9Xi3vCQB2RMryxbFuroPK_DCmy5QbkGrLX7okDoKFvQ0DvBa4ZSpzqwUARCiQFGyw8M0qq-F866kBQ7FFSSL9923R8Q3CYDf6BTKjB_lOmQkIhWQt07_v0VYRQeTGWwvZPZ_1pHJTLy5DoK6InMRVw-Y2QaWhowARUt8pV01-rUXHpYnoZOfG4kpMw_oeKdG8bNOf8Q%3D%3D) As you know, Senator Grassley takes congressional oversight very seriously, no matter which political party is in the White House. Public confidence in our institutions is crumbling. Iowa's watchdog is working tirelessly to hold the government accountable and restore the public trust. When the Department of Justice targets parents speaking up at local school board meetings or sets its sights on Catholics for their religious views or refuses to prosecute crimes against pregnancy crisis centers, Americans see right through it. When the IRS targets conservatives and looks to hire 87,000 new agents, it's no wonder small businesses and taxpayers are worried. When political bias encroaches upon the levers of government, America is on a slippery slope to losing the public trust and letting government control the people. Last week, Senator Grassley pressed the U.S. Attorney General about the investigation of Hunter Biden and the Biden family's foreign financial entanglements. [**To learn more, listen to Dan Bogino 's take on the exchange from his radio program here.**](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=afab5af5699a44b89827cc997df6398e&_e=stsTIHL7bThxgsH9Xi3vCQB2RMryxbFuroPK_DCmy5QbkGrLX7okDoKFvQ0DvBa4wKk7cUSluKL6RL0OHFrjiK-lx6T4GtYnWtsvrqGZc7Md--Bb88kYu7BGqSV0Zx_TvcHg2fjpwSY3EeQTSiL04qd5kYSG9WGYDZ8sPuvQblYxoMk0hsYtrraSCb8H26amCTiNpo3qC7gt7K8HcbkVEA%3D%3D)****[****](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=afab5af5699a44b89827cc997df6398e&_e=stsTIHL7bThxgsH9Xi3vCQB2RMryxbFuroPK_DCmy5QbkGrLX7okDoKFvQ0DvBa4Jgq9q5CEcL95pz5moov1Wf6w3LpBsUnmfWKMtukDpBl7C8jWjigTbo_vxVTQdtCYZtOtDvxQCUuA3CMU3iTNRwH9Tfwu2CbeeXXlZat5jE5CorNdpghmdLg1Y2tgBygdOzUEJ3m0z6GXcncYAE3y3w%3D%3D) As you know, Senator Grassley is known for his stubborn tenacity. From fighting wasteful spending to rooting out corruption, Iowa's senior U.S. Senator works for you. Keep in touch,
Team Grassley

---

name: Frances Hui
subject: Do you know what living without freedom is like?
body:
The CCP imposed a national security law that cracked down on political activism in Hong Kong.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad2a9cf703d946459d1da02fd61b430d&_e=1Ue0XITMNc09dUv-ZClQ-4TI2ruYtn5UIZMKV0LLSuF3aa4yMLGf8mYzfIwvKGQ8nfKFusDgiSZP0pUwzRpiIz1jHjcBQBZAT1nZIrocc_FcWRYzW8DdmCVMWPsV5G4EtTtx5qwwL_qxy3WYY5QcrJwwQR4FGdS-R_MJ0Rvp8cUshNHaDPE-m50IKGIssEK84Nd66xsQwYZPlBacy6dms7kZR2FIuWu8JkEEejG4-nGeMMCyUjvjXjLmdUxgI1CQZHZALpV_gilCrs0fq7f6cA%3D%3D)

Friend,

I grew up in Hong Kong, a city that was once free. When I was 14, I got involved in social movements as a student in Hong Kong.

Then the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) cracked down and started stealing our freedom.

The CCP imposed a national security law that cracked down on political activism in Hong Kong. _Offenders could face penalties of up to life in prison_.

**Friend, the CCP is the ultimate surveillance state. They are known for silencing the opposition, human rights abuses, and persecuting people for their religion. **

Their takeover of Hong Kong left no family, town, or life untouched.

My name is Frances Hui, a speaker with the Dissident Project and the first Hong Kong activist to receive political asylum in America.

The Dissident Project provides high schools with access to informed, intelligent perspectives from speakers who have lived under current and former socialist states worldwide.

And I've set a goal to raise $15,000 this month to support our work as we reach thousands of students with the true horrors of communism.

[_**Friend, will you with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad2a9cf703d946459d1da02fd61b430d&_e=1Ue0XITMNc09dUv-ZClQ-4TI2ruYtn5UIZMKV0LLSuF3aa4yMLGf8mYzfIwvKGQ8nfKFusDgiSZP0pUwzRpiIz1jHjcBQBZAT1nZIrocc_FKWyme6znAeF0q0wlUFCpKUamcNxjm3tEkYr8kBRJgoT3Dzf1Tf0iSh-XqwXzOaX059o1M9a3VQe4WqtCqHzDT8hG37Jg-5inLksjj0CyluuZUzYVRBySuHWT_QsnMsg-rsmKPM2JEXXtH_sNKzVVsiJKM3t63CuKnxdjBe3_s9w%3D%3D)

The Dissident Project hosts speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Eritrea,
and Venezuela with unique stories that high schoolers need to hear.

We undergo a rigorous audition and training process. There we learn to communicate our experiences in a _powerful but compassionate_ way.

And our speakers are in high demand!

**Our dissidents have already completed over 20 speeches across the country, with four upcoming speeches on the books. **

We're gearing up for a busy spring, which is why I'm emailing you today.

The Dissident Project is a not-for-profit endeavor. We don't charge schools for access to our speakers, so their testimonies are more accessible to all. **But to keep our services completely free, we rely on the generosity of people like you. **

**Will you chip in today and support the Dissident Project?**

[_**Donate $10 >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad2a9cf703d946459d1da02fd61b430d&_e=1Ue0XITMNc09dUv-ZClQ-4TI2ruYtn5UIZMKV0LLSuF3aa4yMLGf8mYzfIwvKGQ8nfKFusDgiSZP0pUwzRpiI1GeLoRLM9pVKm5mXgNmrSjycWXiM5MkDJDrxOGP4FASPc4icvZWNZf3dISLmLf2CvXjMBbXpLF_FJ0rnUSs11IX0DHakyRK02gvmmgII7hkpTOCKJh1m6ieod9_IeSyCbAkPGZJRc3tZGeIVJPr4T6YbylyjIUA4tbNcyEtEMJCHHIbSflf0AWvnSt4ACj1kw%3D%3D)

[_**Donate $250 >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad2a9cf703d946459d1da02fd61b430d&_e=1Ue0XITMNc09dUv-ZClQ-4TI2ruYtn5UIZMKV0LLSuF3aa4yMLGf8mYzfIwvKGQ8nfKFusDgiSZP0pUwzRpiI1GeLoRLM9pVKm5mXgNmrSjvfAcW7sJwoLquhCe_Rw0g__oVRZaOJstnpK9pMb1wwGpiPMXRvYGl1aH1cVLhKvn48uvnTueQDBV4uJOVnJ2yzph12aS6fDyu0ZTCFQSHuc0O1pSfgtCpcF8k14tqQ4R2Ixrvsq7ejjNzuZhMEK7zROO2iOjOiCVSxG_LJ_DEDg%3D%3D)
[_**Sponsor a School $1,000 >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad2a9cf703d946459d1da02fd61b430d&_e=1Ue0XITMNc09dUv-ZClQ-4TI2ruYtn5UIZMKV0LLSuF3aa4yMLGf8mYzfIwvKGQ8nfKFusDgiSZP0pUwzRpiI1GeLoRLM9pVKm5mXgNmrSjNoq5w8DhXm-jQATOtmbOE_t9Agf7GXDnuAw-etxBGo_MBNAqZlRFmAWBNnHdyD6-l_V56qOfMM-nJdVvMA3rcwIHqXQ0FLxDhPTAdze_rIsRPUaewHUtrkM8X3PfYRf-icqBJENk1BLU7eAC1PsoQUxkkKr7E7bs6XDJ_02hx2g%3D%3D)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad2a9cf703d946459d1da02fd61b430d&_e=1Ue0XITMNc09dUv-ZClQ-4TI2ruYtn5UIZMKV0LLSuF3aa4yMLGf8mYzfIwvKGQ8nfKFusDgiSZP0pUwzRpiIz1jHjcBQBZAT1nZIrocc_GWfi_AZxlyyhzGAd-Dc7aPm9A85odO8TrES0cwrpiQVqq8a7hd7mttSj83RuX5Z4tXiUIfWzHCZZGy_e5YUMXf8Z9N6YLN25VdWpvhEWq5aw5ZEtQ70HrNq8BTwFwNOEo62bkh8klRgqNvot-0KKBGMGtvqgyDVpHNcImz8W-p6w%3D%3D)

**I want to share my story with students across America. **

This might be the only time these high school students get to hear the truth about how life in Hong Kong has radically changed since being under the thumb of the CCP.

Students should be thankful that they live in a country that protects our freedoms - the right to free speech, protest, and gather together to share ideas.

_**But these freedoms are often taken for granted.**_

American students need to understand how dangerous communism is to the freedoms we hold dear. Our experiences remind them how easily they can lose their freedom and how hard it is to try and get it back when it's gone.

Your generous gift will give high school students a lesson they will carry with them for a lifetime.

[_**Will you help me reach more high school students with my story? Your generous gift helps me travel to high schools across the country. Please donate by clicking here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad2a9cf703d946459d1da02fd61b430d&_e=1Ue0XITMNc09dUv-ZClQ-4TI2ruYtn5UIZMKV0LLSuF3aa4yMLGf8mYzfIwvKGQ8nfKFusDgiSZP0pUwzRpiIz1jHjcBQBZAT1nZIrocc_GPBNKWpG6mUoQZkE1psgl5ml9-nb3_8LmJoKPckTurVgMHSofVsTv6ppiIl5T10rZaykmWODSDu4P0YUJOXOpOP-A1ynoNmo8Sq53d0rrNYfrUmjwLF4KQ0YEv8HzX6nc8fZ2sshz-O_asTK1rJGzxYpRFiPvOcMHxyorIm-rKXw%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Frances Hui

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

| Team,

Laborers are the backbone of our nation — and the power to collectively bargain is essential to building the middle class and strengthening workers' rights. **_That’s why I support efforts to enhance labor rights every day I’m in Congress._**

Kansas workers deserve the right to ensure they have fair wages and safe working conditions while on the job — and I am committed to protecting union workers not only in Kansas, but across the country.

clean_body: | Team, Laborers are the backbone of our nation — and the power to collectively bargain is essential to building the middle class and strengthening workers' rights. That’s why I support efforts to enhance labor rights every day I’m in Congress. Kansas workers deserve the right to ensure they have fair wages and safe working conditions while on the job — and I am committed to protecting union workers not only in Kansas, but across the country. | | Just a few days ago, my Democratic colleagues in the House and I re-introduced legislation to protect the right to organize. It will stop so-called “right-to-work” laws and protect workers. This is the sort of legislation that you sent me to Congress to champion. That’s why I need to ask all my grassroots supporters to help me do all I can for labor. Sign on now→ Thank you, Sharice * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. name: Team NPP
subject: WOW, fellow activist!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
Turnout was nearly 50% in all three State House special elections

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59834414/395214569/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230307SEOP_N_TEAM_90do_5_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1YTU2MzdkLTMwYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1qUcYhDFDLR6anvNALwqmwMHmyS03EB92BwBePBMR4A=)
| All we really have to say is WOW, fellow activist.

As we all know by now, Democrats won all three races in the special elections, but we have more great news. **In all three PA House districts, turnout was nearly 50% of the 2020 presidential election.**

All three Democratic candidates outperformed the results of every election in these districts since 2020, including beating the 2020 presidential election’s results **by double digits**. All that for special elections in the middle of February of an “off-year!”

In PA House District 35, the district with the most competitive baseline where we focused our efforts, Democrat Matt Gergely overperformed Biden by _**more than 30 points!**_ **[Fellow activist, results like these don’t come out of nowhere — they come from the hard but crucial work that we need to be doing for every election. Will you pitch in $10 today to help us pull it off and repeat these results across the Commonwealth?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59834415/395214570/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230307SEOP_N_TEAM_90do_5_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1YTU2MzdkLTMwYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1qUcYhDFDLR6anvNALwqmwMHmyS03EB92BwBePBMR4A=)** clean_body: Turnout was nearly 50% in all three State House special elections = | All we really have to say is WOW, fellow activist. As we all know by now, Democrats won all three races in the special elections, but we have more great news. In all three PA House districts, turnout was nearly 50% of the 2020 presidential election. All three Democratic candidates outperformed the results of every election in these districts since 2020, including beating the 2020 presidential election’s results by double digits. All that for special elections in the middle of February of an “off-year!” In PA House District 35, the district with the most competitive baseline where we focused our efforts, Democrat Matt Gergely overperformed Biden by more than 30 points! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = Many people were truly shocked by the turnout numbers for this election, but we cannot say the same. We have known for a long time that Pennsylvanians are ready to start electing candidates that best represent their communities. All they need is the support to do so. Next up: this May’s municipal, judicial, and local primary elections and then November’s generals for the same races. This type of turnout is exactly what we want to see in every single election! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. It’s moments like these that make me proud to be your Congresswoman.
Delivering funding for important projects and initiatives across our district is crucial. It’s what helps cement our state as a leader for science and sports in education.
_Securing this funding is personal for me, too._
Growing up, sports were a formative part of my life. I was a collegiate swimmer, and my coaches were a few of my biggest inspirations. Even before I was elected, I’ve been at the forefront of making inner city sports and education opportunities more accessible across Las Vegas.
But listen, this also goes to show that **Democrats know how to get things done.** We advocate for our communities tooth and nail and refuse to let any battle, no matter how tough, stand in our way.
[**I’m working hard to accomplish big things for students, families, and working people across NV-03. clean_body: | = | | Team, I have big news that I’m excited to share with you: = I’m proud to have fought for $3.25 million in funding for UNLV’s Sports Research and Innovation Initiative! This funding will go a long way towards diversifying Nevada’s economy and bolstering Las Vegas’ sports scene. = | | | = It’s moments like these that make me proud to be your Congresswoman. Delivering funding for important projects and initiatives across our district is crucial. It’s what helps cement our state as a leader for science and sports in education. Securing this funding is personal for me, too. Growing up, sports were a formative part of my life. I was a collegiate swimmer, and my coaches were a few of my biggest inspirations. Even before I was elected, I’ve been at the forefront of making inner city sports and education opportunities more accessible across Las Vegas. But listen, this also goes to show that Democrats know how to get things done. We advocate for our communities tooth and nail and refuse to let any battle, no matter how tough, stand in our way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Happy Women’s History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
As the first woman to hold my seat, I have a deep respect for the trailblazers who advocated for equal rights and opportunity in all sectors of our society.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59834697/395215551/1394218500?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230307-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmFiYTJmMjktMzJiZC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=z8bfTZpD2XONKGiCfqIie0Gc7qEaONiSX0ZYniZWUU4=)
---
| Peter,

This Women’s History Month, I’m grateful for the women who came before me. As the first woman to hold my seat, I have a deep respect for the trailblazers who advocated for equal rights and opportunity in all sectors of our society. _**They paved the way for generations – including the historic number of women, like me, elected to 2018’s freshman class – and I thank them.**_ Many of those same advocates, including my mother, have pushed for the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment. Just a few years ago, Virginia became the 38th and final state needed to ratify the ERA – _**a long-overdue milestone in the push for equality.**_

However, we still have work to do. Republican intervention has all but stalled the amendment’s progress – a major roadblock in the push to include women’s equality in our Constitution.

But, I’m committed to taking the next step toward Constitutional equality in our country.

[_**I hope you’ll support my campaign so I can continue standing up for equality this cycle and beyond.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59834698/395215552/1394218500?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230307-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmFiYTJmMjktMzJiZC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=z8bfTZpD2XONKGiCfqIie0Gc7qEaONiSX0ZYniZWUU4=)

| We're not exaggerating when we say we are fighting a party that trades in conspiracies and lies. The election denial from 2020 and 2022 has proven that. And what's worse is it won't be different for this next coming election.

clean_body: | | | Our opponents are far from honest | | | We're not exaggerating when we say we are fighting a party that trades in conspiracies and lies. The election denial from 2020 and 2022 has proven that. And what's worse is it won't be different for this next coming election. We need to start our efforts immediately if we want to defend Arizona voters from these election deniers. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: These aren't just fringe nobodies. The former Republican Attorney General of our state stayed silent on a report that disproved the various conspiracies, lies, and outlandish claims that our elections weren't fair. It's this type of denial that we will be up against very soon. We must hit the ground running on our efforts to defend our elections. body:
We’re excited to introduce this new way to support Katie.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=18961%2E3422442%2EJpccdM)
Derek,
We’re so grateful you’re on Team Porter and fighting alongside us to elect Katie as California’s next U.S. Senator.
Today, we’re excited to introduce a brand-new way to build support for Katie: **becoming a member of our Grassroots Fundraising team and raising donations from your friends, family, and neighbors.** **[Click here to create your very own fundraising page for Katie Porter!](https://secure.actblue.com/brandings/234749/lists/new?refcode2=18961_3422442_JpccdM&akid=18961%2E3422442%2EJpccdM)**

Here’s how it works: Starting today, you can create and design your own official ActBlue fundraising page. Then you’ll be able to share the link with your network and bring in grassroots donations for Katie!
After you share your page, you’ll be able to log in to ActBlue and track the results of your hard work any time you want.
Whether you raise one donation, or five, or hundreds, you’ll be making a huge difference to our campaign. Katie is the only candidate in this race who doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, so she’s counting on this team to go the extra mile.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Obscene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
Kevin McCarthy raised an astounding $12.3 million from a collection of donors from Big Pharma, the fossil fuel industry, and other corporate interests.

| Peter —

In a single night last month, Kevin McCarthy raised an astounding **$12.3 million** from a collection of donors from Big Pharma, the fossil fuel industry, and other corporate interests.

It just goes to show everything that’s broken in Washington.

We have a terrible system of campaign finance that has allowed the rich and powerful to buy off our elections ever since the Supreme Court’s 2010 decision in _Citizens United v. FEC._

I’m not accepting corporate PAC money in this race, but if we’re going to reach every voter in California and compete with McCarthy and the MAGA Republican Party’s millions, then I’m going to need your help right now:

[Please, before our FEC fundraising deadline, can you pitch in $10 or any amount to support our campaign and Upset the Setup today and reject the corrupting influence of money in politics that allows Kevin McCarthy to raise $12.3 million in a single night?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59834964/395216814/-355456225?amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=UTS_20230307_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViODRhZDZiLTMzYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qSoXHNmOo9BT33SIS7QurclWOmuoknVSpeGL3vpcHsk=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59834966/395216815/-355456225?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&refcode=UTS_20230307_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViODRhZDZiLTMzYmQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qSoXHNmOo9BT33SIS7QurclWOmuoknVSpeGL3vpcHsk=)

It just goes to show everything that’s broken in Washington. We have a terrible system of campaign finance that has allowed the rich and powerful to buy off our elections ever since the Supreme Court’s 2010 decision in Citizens United v. FEC. Latest polls showed that the race for control of Congress is already neck-and-neck. **[THEN:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59834975/395216869/-1810142053?refcode=20230307_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTg0YWQ2Yi0zM2JkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEsw_Hxyu6bKLXAVFTk3mB5dDy6hoETswaf7Y4JUAxE=)** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59834979/395216878/-1810142053?refcode=20230307_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTg0YWQ2Yi0zM2JkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEsw_Hxyu6bKLXAVFTk3mB5dDy6hoETswaf7Y4JUAxE=)**of dollars to save their Majority. **[BUT NOW:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59834981/395216885/-1810142053?refcode=20230307_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTg0YWQ2Yi0zM2JkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEsw_Hxyu6bKLXAVFTk3mB5dDy6hoETswaf7Y4JUAxE=)** Team, your support has a direct impact on our ability to prepare for 2024, and we know from the last election that the earlier we can prepare, the stronger we will be. When everyone chips in, even just a little bit, it all adds up. That’s why we’re asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = – Team Salinas | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20WAGOP?=
subject: 🚨TAKE ACTION: Democrats are killing police pursuit reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Email Democrat leadership and urge them to bring it to the floor before Tomorrow's cutoff!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Don't you think we deserve answers?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Biden owes the American people answers for what is happening at the southern border. We're supposed to be a nation of law and order, but instead, we're a nation with open borders
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=92d3b727d31048288cb8c6ae33d5f9da&_t=dVH7jBnW93j_7Jmpvu-OGA1oOEfNsEWpm2SHK_ARLAyEdtaNIwSiMHAWu_eb3Y-uGD-RxqdVPBoO2MpN_DhMn_ubKNp6nH_Ia-R8Gaei_28%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=92d3b727d31048288cb8c6ae33d5f9da&_t=dVH7jBnW93j_7Jmpvu-OGA1oOEfNsEWpm2SHK_ARLAyEdtaNIwSiMHAWu_eb3Y-uGD-RxqdVPBoO2MpN_DhMn_ubKNp6nH_Ia-R8Gaei_28%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=92d3b727d31048288cb8c6ae33d5f9da&_e=e0LwpegJratyC2zyjL_CgZWI4xhjYPCVJwC04SqT8atibyKpwGdKRKoz73n4pfTVP_Wk1aKJrbb4CMSFbXvEG0M41q2nibtVccf5MRatg-RtRLGt_UbKRGOVKkJByIZAnvXshuOkgYpH4jY3Qk770oiWIAxt1oLEx1Abw2xJHaMxZeubioBQbk2rj0d7Z9DVfOKYgqGN8sRN1ODv3YYGxWD08kVIXFzdC_-0cMHs5dJVnKQv09p2kTtY0YpO__o_vXAGBtrY-sVVLI18SVJByfAP0sj5KwWB3WVOwpGYBiUdoc3-68Kj1-hCXL2P2bwtRX9DEXd3I8sZ76361wbPBlsdlZG3uoIWy1LcEmCYDdXRNOo2zBfUod_rQ9iJqVB5cDMRiugxtq0Lddj1S3k4QbvOZm8MnOawhf4TqMTJyvMSUnV83N5lxOsCit_thGTMSHq1rgWkFkbnx9V62CDGmN_rF9lO1ZBpBDtlDbBCYwQ%3D)
|

Fellow Conservative,

I don’t even know where to begin. The headline above should give every single one of us cause for concern.

I can assure you that our enemies have taken notice of Biden’s open disregard for the border. Right this very moment, terrorists who want to kill innocent Americans are plotting how best to take advantage of a sleeping giant. The mere fact that more than ONE million undocumented migrants have been able to evade capture under President Biden is not only astonishing, it should also frighten every one of us.

Just look at the increasing number of arrests of individuals on the terrorist watch list since Biden took office:

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=92d3b727d31048288cb8c6ae33d5f9da&_e=e0LwpegJratyC2zyjL_CgZWI4xhjYPCVJwC04SqT8atibyKpwGdKRKoz73n4pfTVP_Wk1aKJrbb4CMSFbXvEG0M41q2nibtVccf5MRatg-RtRLGt_UbKRGOVKkJByIZAnvXshuOkgYpH4jY3Qk770oiWIAxt1oLEx1Abw2xJHaMxZeubioBQbk2rj0d7Z9DVfOKYgqGN8sRN1ODv3YYGxWD08kVIXFzdC_-0cMHs5dJVnKQv09p2kTtY0YpO__o_vXAGBtrY-sVVLI18SVJByfAP0sj5KwWB3WVOwpGYBiUdoc3-68Kj1-hCXL2P2bwtIGtvDuTgDXbJWb8BoJ_jJ4MNJhrNdMjLteAQykSqIIkzkwbUcjo495JHxlvMtyKsegifzosvQPyFNA2cbxumWAAFxBMjmI_9mLJprgxwPSNGdFZDU55-9acl_S6Y8ZlQp46OAL0WnOplILGHw9LRoZm45m7CqBG7k3m3iYOlWaA%3D)

Biden and his liberal allies in Congress have thrown their hands up in defeat when it comes to securing the border; quite frankly, their actions tell us that they don’t care that our Customs and Border Patrol agents are being hamstrung by the administration’s dangerous open border policies. Instead of investing their time into ensuring our safety, Biden and company are busy devising ways to write off student loan debt.

**Doesn’t all of this make you angry??**

If you’re as upset as I am about Democrats’ inability to get our border under control, let me and my team know today. **[We’re looking for 251,000 signatures by the end of the first quarter (yes, the same number of undocumented migrants that crossed the border in December)](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=92d3b727d31048288cb8c6ae33d5f9da&_e=e0LwpegJratyC2zyjL_CgZWI4xhjYPCVJwC04SqT8atibyKpwGdKRKoz73n4pfTVP_Wk1aKJrbb4CMSFbXvEG0M41q2nibtVccf5MRatg-RtRLGt_UbKRGOVKkJByIZAnvXshuOkgYpH4jY3Qk770oiWIAxt1oLEx1Abw2xJHaMxZeubioBQbk2rj0d7Z9DVfOKYgqGN8sRN1ODv3YYGxWD08kVIXFzdC_-0cMHs5dJVnKQv09p2kTtY0YpO__o_vXAGBtrY-sVVLI18SVJByfAP0sj5KwWB3WVOwpGYBiUdoc3-68Kj1-hCXL2P2bwtl8SqQl8hkuxZ5MkwO7vRK2th_1knX7zBWUKbKYY12V6e7Dl5qiLmcnqii0yJxSwmtZP4mqBiJPSWpFWb_r5CVEUeBfNms7TZVJbWWMZ__BTTocv-AoUnRtcgCmAVZxWBrlnzF7f0OFgP055Xlr3g_VZMYD6TwXTrQnK7v3se7q0%3D)**.

[**Are You Fed Up with Biden's Border Chaos?
Let Us Know -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=92d3b727d31048288cb8c6ae33d5f9da&_e=e0LwpegJratyC2zyjL_CgZWI4xhjYPCVJwC04SqT8atibyKpwGdKRKoz73n4pfTVP_Wk1aKJrbb4CMSFbXvEG0M41q2nibtVccf5MRatg-RtRLGt_UbKRGOVKkJByIZAnvXshuOkgYpH4jY3Qk770oiWIAxt1oLEx1Abw2xJHaMxZeubioBQbk2rj0d7Z9DVfOKYgqGN8sRN1ODv3YYGxWD08kVIXFzdC_-0cMHs5dJVnKQv09p2kTtY0YpO__o_vXAGBtrY-sVVLI18SVJByfAP0sj5KwWB3WVOwpGYBiUdoc3-68Kj1-hCXL2P2bwtSo9QHDKYBE0zyXusNLKtFhInuys8nOh-HFtGXFuYmorhOL2OL1lhsHgbCeIK1c6a2rU9PcemeinJnf2AQBDLA_wQraF2tuyN1T_lmXZGzPVwWiNoYzOd0bfYh6IjhTw0aAjOc8AH9rnXjDIaWk1KGXlvwWslX8wOcDVOqCOJFqg%3D)

**[Let's make sure Democrats hear us loud and clear.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=92d3b727d31048288cb8c6ae33d5f9da&_e=e0LwpegJratyC2zyjL_CgZWI4xhjYPCVJwC04SqT8atibyKpwGdKRKoz73n4pfTVP_Wk1aKJrbb4CMSFbXvEG0M41q2nibtVccf5MRatg-RtRLGt_UbKRGOVKkJByIZAnvXshuOkgYpH4jY3Qk770oiWIAxt1oLEx1Abw2xJHaMxZeubioBQbk2rj0d7Z9DVfOKYgqGN8sRN1ODv3YYGxWD08kVIXFzdC_-0cMHs5dJVnKQv09p2kTtY0YpO__o_vXAGBtrY-sVVLI18SVJByfAP0sj5KwWB3WVOwpGYBiUdoc3-68Kj1-hCXL2P2bwtvpq2L2fZ6AiaW_6fxpLPhd4rSdy0F0Z13VY4z-LdPEMAbW1RB992YJA_EujYdjiNfYlD_so8x13KcJXc6bHtShPbeXUwIpFol0byTzfha003Q_y5pD7KJ1XDuEFcEN8zqcgbWnpFrxq951pFwQYjvjiSUI6vUaApUjclOnh2yAY%3D)** **
**

God Bless,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=92d3b727d31048288cb8c6ae33d5f9da&_e=e0LwpegJratyC2zyjL_CgZWI4xhjYPCVJwC04SqT8atibyKpwGdKRKoz73n4pfTVP_Wk1aKJrbb4CMSFbXvEG0M41q2nibtVccf5MRatg-RtRLGt_UbKRGOVKkJByIZAnvXshuOkgYpH4jY3Qk770oiWIAxt1oLEx1Abw2xJHaMxZeubioBQbk2rj0d7Z9DVfOKYgqGN8sRN1ODv3YYGxWD08kVIXFzdC_-0cMHs5dJVnKQv09p2kTtY0YpO__o_vXAGBtrY-sVVLI18SVJByfAP0sj5KwWB3WVOwpGYBiUdoc3-68Kj1-hCXL2P2bwt9_SLn38y1GiBlB4t3NdtsOiZb6VQX_PbGMDd9hCwvSh5DWYaEQzH2zWJllXu6-MqR_RGjRNKwzZM5ZlSPLD-bs0BwGjRtQ42w-S2ypgxdPirrrYBYi5OrX6iVpehvRVmHNj2OdNtCfawUSzA42pe3XFTh53Fay8CoMAOJ9iCIEA%3D)
Jim Jordan

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=92d3b727d31048288cb8c6ae33d5f9da&_e=e0LwpegJratyC2zyjL_CgZWI4xhjYPCVJwC04SqT8atibyKpwGdKRKoz73n4pfTVP_Wk1aKJrbb4CMSFbXvEG0M41q2nibtVccf5MRatg-RtRLGt_UbKRGOVKkJByIZAnvXshuOkgYpH4jY3Qk770oiWIAxt1oLEx1Abw2xJHaMxZeubioBQbk2rj0d7Z9DVfOKYgqGN8sRN1ODv3YYGxWD08kVIXFzdC_-0cMHs5dJVnKQv09p2kTtY0YpO__o_vXAGBtrY-sVVLI18SVJByfAP0sj5KwWB3WVOwpGYBiUdoc3-68Kj1-hCXL2P2bwtiTwdxqtQ5yaT9J8ocqfqKcONL2qM99Uw9UDTLvV5q0U6yEVGSRxr9pNK85KaN5zk7NtIpTKEKWbdf7El30OtuLcbrvP4nVgvnUJ_fjra5iBo_Y5ieDmUc1RNuCrIgKDmSdlplfT_nCYMxmS4twUNabP1E-q6inabqmn51ioBlBQ%3D)

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=92d3b727d31048288cb8c6ae33d5f9da&_e=e0LwpegJratyC2zyjL_CgZWI4xhjYPCVJwC04SqT8atibyKpwGdKRKoz73n4pfTVP_Wk1aKJrbb4CMSFbXvEG0M41q2nibtVccf5MRatg-RtRLGt_UbKRGOVKkJByIZAnvXshuOkgYpH4jY3Qk770oiWIAxt1oLEx1Abw2xJHaMxZeubioBQbk2rj0d7Z9DVfOKYgqGN8sRN1ODv3YYGxWD08kVIXFzdC_-0cMHs5dJVnKQv09p2kTtY0YpO__o_vXAGBtrY-sVVLI18SVJByfAP0sj5KwWB3WVOwpGYBiUdoc3-68Kj1-hCXL2P2bwt6vp43hSCb8ZGXtPRr2SMvXEGlMdQ5dlVD_TWVyxMQ8j1w1kw4pUG2TvBUvGNxivgFOQk51wSFgsagPqlhQ0fn47vJ_cwcUIQJeLCcnJvHH-eezN6KXZIsnBko2wyPMm08llPAR8vI-TKrBtNGrbBsuj36JRGYTmy1vWZDmhmrtk%3D)

name: Team Ruiz
subject: not hyperbole
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P
body:
| | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. name: Geoff Simpson
subject: An insider update on our candidate recruitment 👀
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hi, Peter! I wanted
to personally reach out to share an update on our candidate recruitment
efforts for this 2024 cycle.

But first, I want to thank you for being a part of this organization. We
don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so your support means a whole lot
to us, especially now as it’s a tough time financially for many grassroots
organizations and nonprofits.

Now, to share some updates about what we’re focused on right now. We have
been laser focused on candidate recruitment:

* Last cycle, we spoke with 3,990 local leaders about our races and
vetted 1,653 potential candidates to ensure we backed the best
possible leaders. This is what we are in the middle of doing right
now!

But, unfortunately, right when our work and need for resources is ramping
up – donations to JD have started to slow down. Our work right now depends
on our ability to fundraise in order to execute on our ambitious plans.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/129870?refcode=em20230307-27869&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=27869%2E1203867%2EqeHp0n ]Will you rush a $3 contribution right now to support our
candidate recruitment efforts?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/129870?refcode=em20230307-27869&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27869%2E1203867%2EqeHp0n ]Contribute $3

AOC in 2018; Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush in 2020; and most recently Summer
Lee in 2022 all came out of our candidate recruitment program. And
everyday we are talking to potential candidates who could join them and
the rest of the squad in 2024!

But it can only happen if we are able to reach our fundraising goals.

We are $20,535 away from hitting our mid-goal this month and asking
everyone who cares about JD’s existence to chip in whatever they can.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/129870?refcode=em20230307-27869&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=27869%2E1203867%2EqeHp0n ]Will you make your best gift right now?

Thank you so much for your support,

Geoff Simpson
Campaigns Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=27869%2E1203867%2EqeHp0n ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=27869%2E1203867%2EqeHp0n ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230307-27869-footer&t=1024&refcode2=27869_1203867_qeHp0n&akid=27869%2E1203867%2EqeHp0n

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=27869%2E1203867%2EqeHp0n

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Hi, Peter! I wanted to personally reach out to share an update on our candidate recruitment efforts for this 2024 cycle. But first, I want to thank you for being a part of this organization. We don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so your support means a whole lot to us, especially now as it’s a tough time financially for many grassroots organizations and nonprofits. Now, to share some updates about what we’re focused on right now. We have been laser focused on candidate recruitment: * Last cycle, we spoke with 3,990 local leaders about our races and vetted 1,653 potential candidates to ensure we backed the best possible leaders. This is what we are in the middle of doing right now! But, unfortunately, right when our work and need for resources is ramping up – donations to JD have started to slow down. Our work right now depends on our ability to fundraise in order to execute on our ambitious plans. [ ]Will you rush a $3 contribution right now to support our candidate recruitment efforts? [ ]Contribute $3 AOC in 2018; Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush in 2020; and most recently Summer Lee in 2022 all came out of our candidate recruitment program. And everyday we are talking to potential candidates who could join them and the rest of the squad in 2024! But it can only happen if we are able to reach our fundraising goals. We are $20,535 away from hitting our mid-goal this month and asking everyone who cares about JD’s existence to chip in whatever they can. [ ]Will you make your best gift right now? Thank you so much for your support, Geoff Simpson Campaigns Director Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Let’s talk about Elon Musk.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
**Let’s talk about Elon Musk, the richest man in the world.** Yesterday, you may have experienced the worldwide outages on Twitter (we sure did). Just a few months ago, billionaire Elon Musk spent **_$44 billion_** to buy Twitter, declaring himself a champion of free speech.
Now the website is crashing left and right, trolls are taking over, white supremacists are openly spreading hate, and Elon himself is spewing misinformation to his millions of followers. Apparently, “free” speech means weaponizing Twitter for his own personal agenda.
[**Our speech should not be bought and sold. Pramila is fighting for a wealth tax and accountability for billionaires like Musk who want to own the media. If you agree, chip in $3 so Pramila can take billionaires like Elon to task and win.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39919?refcode=em20230307-2246&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2246%2E420207%2EsygN_J)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jen=20Kiggans?=
subject: The fight never ends…!
body:
I am working for you! | | | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=d739c7931c&e=4955722b3e)
---
| | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=3ffde4d53a&e=4955722b3e)
---
| Dear Peter,

The fight never ends! Since taking office in January of this year, I have not slowed down, working hard as YOUR voice in Washington! As your Congresswoman, I want to ensure that the rights, safety, and well-being of everyone in VA-02 are respected, protected, and upheld.
During the last few days, I have worked with my Republican colleagues in Congress to do the following:

* **Ended COVID Vaccine mandates for international air travelers.** All individuals are guaranteed equal access to travel, regardless of whether they are in perfect health or not. This makes sure that everyone can benefit from traveling without any restrictions.

* **Condemned the Chinese Communist Party’s spy balloon.** Our national security is of the utmost importance. The fact that a CCP spy balloon was allowed to float in our Country’s airspace is **unacceptable...!**

* **Fought to preserve election integrity by keeping non-citizens from voting in U.S.** elections. Maintaining election integrity is essential to a just and democratic society. We must ensure only American citizens have the right to vote. Millions of immigrants have worked hard to become citizens, and their hard-earned right to vote should be respected. Allowing non-citizens to vote without going through the proper steps diminishes the value of citizenship and weakens the right to vote in a functioning democracy. We must take measures to protect election integrity and honor the sacrifices of immigrants.

---
| [Help win the fight in Washington! >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=8faf8f145e&e=4955722b3e "Help win the fight in Washington! >>>")
---
| I am proud to stand up for the people of VA-02 and will continue to advocate on your behalf.
With Gratitude, Jen Kiggans
---
| | | | | | [](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=aedf1b9608&e=4955722b3e)
---

---

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Preventing another East Palestine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John joined a bipartisan group of senators to introduce the Railway Safety Act of 2023.
#
Derek,
We’re still figuring out the environmental + health impacts of the rail disaster in East Palestine, OH (and another similar derailment in Darlington Township, PA) — but the Senate is already working on action.
**This month, John Fetterman joined a bipartisan group of senators to introduce the Railway Safety Act of 2023.** This bill would require more notice to state emergency officials when trains are carrying hazardous materials, mandate better crewing of freight trains, increase monitoring of potential safety issues, and increase penalties in order to hold rail carriers accountable.
Though this bill was introduced by 3 Democrats (including John 👋) and 3 Republicans, it’s still not guaranteed to pass. That’s why we’re coming to you to ask:
**[Can you add your name in support of the Railway Safety Act of 2023 to urge Congress to send this important bill to the President’s desk ASAP?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-em-railroad-safety/?source=em20230307-1-8278&akid=8278%2E434096%2EA8ETtY)**
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-em-railroad-safety/?source=em20230307-8278&akid=8278%2E434096%2EA8ETtY)**
Right now, years of deregulation have given a few huge rail carriers way too much power, all while they cut corners and risk public safety to save a few bucks.
Fighting back in favor of everyday PA residents is what John is in the Senate to do. That’s why he joined on to this bill with 5 other senators to make progress for PA families’ safety + the safety of people around the country.
**[If you agree that we need to prevent future rail disasters, add your name and call on Congress to pass the Railway Safety Act of 2023.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-em-railroad-safety/?source=em20230307-1-8278&akid=8278%2E434096%2EA8ETtY)**
Thank you!
— Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230307-8278-footer&t=1&refcode2=8278_434096_A8ETtY&akid=8278%2E434096%2EA8ETtY)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: John joined a bipartisan group of senators to introduce the Railway Safety Act of 2023. Derek, We’re still figuring out the environmental + health impacts of the rail disaster in East Palestine, OH (and another similar derailment in Darlington Township, PA) — but the Senate is already working on action. This month, John Fetterman joined a bipartisan group of senators to introduce the Railway Safety Act of 2023. This bill would require more notice to state emergency officials when trains are carrying hazardous materials, mandate better crewing of freight trains, increase monitoring of potential safety issues, and increase penalties in order to hold rail carriers accountable. Though this bill was introduced by 3 Democrats (including John 👋) and 3 Republicans, it’s still not guaranteed to pass. That’s why we’re coming to you to ask: Right now, years of deregulation have given a few huge rail carriers way too much power, all while they cut corners and risk public safety to save a few bucks. Fighting back in favor of everyday PA residents is what John is in the Senate to do. That’s why he joined on to this bill with 5 other senators to make progress for PA families’ safety + the safety of people around the country. Thank you! — Team Fetterman 💛 | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

body:
The Washington Post is calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for re-election -- and FiveThirtyEight says that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, so I'm coming to you directly. | |
---

I carried those values with me when I was working as a cocktail waitress to pay for college, becoming the first in my family to graduate. I carried them with me when I was working as a computer programmer in a male-dominated field. I carried those values with me during my first-ever campaign for Congress in 2016, when I flipped a highly competitive district from red to blue, and in 2018, when I defeated a Republican incumbent against all odds -- becoming the second woman senator in Nevada's history. To this day, those values of hard work, determination, and persistence fuel my fight to advocate for working families and bring much-needed progress to the lives of all Nevadans. **But right now, experts at _The Washington Post_ are calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for re-election -- and _FiveThirtyEight_ says that Nevada could once again decide Senate control.** The GOP will come after me with everything they've got, and I simply cannot fight back without your grassroots support. **So please, Derek, will you split a contribution of $10 or more between my campaign and the DNC to help me defend my seat, protect our Democratic Senate majority, and elect more Democrats like me up and down the ballot nationwide?**

clean_body: The Washington Post is calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for re-election -- and FiveThirtyEight says that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, so I'm coming to you directly. | | Derek: When I was growing up, I never could have imagined that I'd run for elected office one day -- let alone become the first computer programmer and the first former synagogue president ever elected to the U.S. Senate. As the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran, I was surrounded by loved ones who taught me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence -- and I've carried these values with me my entire life. I carried those values with me when I was working as a cocktail waitress to pay for college, becoming the first in my family to graduate. I carried them with me when I was working as a computer programmer in a male-dominated field. I carried those values with me during my first-ever campaign for Congress in 2016, when I flipped a highly competitive district from red to blue, and in 2018, when I defeated a Republican incumbent against all odds -- becoming the second woman senator in Nevada's history. To this day, those values of hard work, determination, and persistence fuel my fight to advocate for working families and bring much-needed progress to the lives of all Nevadans. But right now, experts at The Washington Post are calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for re-election -- and FiveThirtyEight says that Nevada could once again decide Senate control. The GOP will come after me with everything they've got, and I simply cannot fight back without your grassroots support. So please, Derek, will you split a contribution of $10 or more between my campaign and the DNC to help me defend my seat, protect our Democratic Senate majority, and elect more Democrats like me up and down the ballot nationwide? Thank you for taking the time to read my story -- and for standing with me in the fight ahead. Jacky Jacky Rosen U.S. Senator, Nevada The DNC's Congressional Split Series helps fundraise for and raise awareness around down-ballot Democrats in some of the most important races across the country. When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit folks on the ballot next cycle -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. subject: The Chicago runoff is less than one month away, and the stakes are high

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

We are less than one month away from the
Chicago Mayoral runoff, and the battle between progressive Brandon Johnson
and corporate "Democrat" Paul Vallas is the first big test of the power of
progressives in the 2023 election cycle.

Paul Vallas is as bad as it gets. As head of Chicago's public schools, he
depleted the teachers' pension fund, closed critical neighborhood schools,
and consistently put profit over educating kids. Republican donors and the
head of the Fraternal Order of Police support him, including their leader,
who openly praised the January 6 rioters.

His opponent, Our Revolution-backed Brandon Johnson, is a former union
organizer and teacher committed to providing "reliable transportation,
good paying jobs, affordable housing" to Chicago's residents.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8411?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230307_FR_Chicago_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Mayor&t=1011&akid=4094%2E5885482%2EjbH8iF ]That's why we need your help mobilizing our nearly 100,000 Our
Revolution members in Chicago to get out and vote. Can we count on you to
pitch in to help fund our organizing campaign to make 250,000 voter
contacts ahead of the April 4 runoff?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

Lifting up others is a core value of mine — I strongly believe that when we elect more women to positions of power, we all do better.

Happy Women’s History Month, Peter!

My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts’ 5th district in Congress. I am also in House leadership serving as the Democratic Whip.

When I first came to Congress in 2013, there weren’t many women serving alongside me. Multiple times, I was stopped and mistaken for someone’s spouse, and I had a hard time even getting into the Chamber.

Thankfully, walking through the halls of Congress in 2023 is much different. **There are more women serving in Congress than ever before — 93 women in the House Democratic Caucus alone!**

I’ve been adamant about helping elect more women to Congress, because the truth is that for generations, we’ve failed to address the persistent challenges faced by women, especially by women of color.

**And with MAGA extremists in the House majority threatening to take us back even further, the stakes of our work couldn’t be higher.

[_That’s why I’m writing to you today, Peter. We need strong women in Congress, and I’m asking you to support that effort by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Valerie Foushee to elect more women into office._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59837571/395226430/1474415607?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230307-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDExNzAyMS00MGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uMtA4BeEcLmoh4tF09VAYyj9Pue6DXxcA0CGdx4Xt1E=)**

Effective leadership isn’t about individual ambition. It’s about our collective good.

Lifting up others is a core value of mine — I strongly believe that when we elect more women to positions of power, we all do better.

**Together, Valerie and I will continue the fight for gender equity and women’s rights, and with your support, elect even more candidates who are committed to building the kind of country and future that our daughters deserve.**

[_**So please, if you can afford to, split a contribution today between my campaign and Valerie Foushee and help us fulfill the country’s promise of equality and opportunity for all.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59837593/395226452/1474415607?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230307-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDExNzAyMS00MGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uMtA4BeEcLmoh4tF09VAYyj9Pue6DXxcA0CGdx4Xt1E=)

Thank you for your support, Peter! I hope you take some time this month to reflect on our achievements, celebrate the women in your life, and recommit to building a stronger, more inclusive America.

All my best,

— Katherine

Representative Katherine Clark
Massachusetts 5th Congressional District
Democratic Whip

name: Jason Crow
subject: re: My bowl cut
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Folks, what do you see in this picture? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59837652/395226606/-1943478936?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230307_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmMzNzMzNS00MGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YoEMNTwKTJ8mJWHb4jsAKlxnSmJuc6HWh8i5wCMovFU=) If we ignore the bowl cut, you’ll see a kid who has no clue what life has in store for him. All he wanted was to play with his Legos and run around in the backyard. I grew up in a working-class family, so I know what the struggle is like for so many Americans. It wasn’t easy at times, but if there’s one thing my early life taught me, it’s to never give up. I’ll be honest: There wasn’t always enough money growing up, so I started working at a young age. Paper routes, Arbys, construction — and after high school I enlisted in the National Guard to help pay for college. **Then, right as I was preparing to graduate, 9/11 happened.** It was a defining moment. Like so many others, I felt the call to serve my country. I went active duty and became an Army Ranger, putting my life on the line to defend our nation’s values. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59837653/395226607/-1943478936?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230307_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmMzNzMzNS00MGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YoEMNTwKTJ8mJWHb4jsAKlxnSmJuc6HWh8i5wCMovFU=) I came back stateside after serving three tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. I wanted to continue giving back, so I offered pro-bono legal services to help veterans transition to civilian life. Then Donald Trump became president. Extremists began threatening to strip away our health care. Immigrants were being demonized. Even our democracy felt fragile. I felt that call to step up and serve again, so after long discussions, I decided to run for office. Our country _needed_ a new generation of leadership — one that seeks to unite us, not divide. **Coloradans agreed. In 2018, I became the first Democrat to ever represent Colorado’s 6th congressional district. It’s been full speed ahead ever since.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59837654/395226608/-1943478936?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230307_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmMzNzMzNS00MGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YoEMNTwKTJ8mJWHb4jsAKlxnSmJuc6HWh8i5wCMovFU=) That’s my story. I’ve always gone where the fight is — no matter the odds. **Progress doesn’t come easy. Progress happens because people put in the work and fight for it. Especially in moments like these.** Democracy is under attack. The right to vote is under assault. A fundamental freedom was recently yanked away for half of Americans. _And the extremism still isn’t over._ I refuse to let them win without a fight. [**I’m counting on your support every step of the way. Please add a $10 donation today to help me bring a new generation of leadership to Congress >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59837655/395226609/-1943478936?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230307_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmMzNzMzNS00MGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YoEMNTwKTJ8mJWHb4jsAKlxnSmJuc6HWh8i5wCMovFU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59837656/395226610/-1943478936?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230307_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmMzNzMzNS00MGJkLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YoEMNTwKTJ8mJWHb4jsAKlxnSmJuc6HWh8i5wCMovFU=)
---

clean_body: | Folks, what do you see in this picture? = If we ignore the bowl cut, you’ll see a kid who has no clue what life has in store for him. All he wanted was to play with his Legos and run around in the backyard. I grew up in a working-class family, so I know what the struggle is like for so many Americans. It wasn’t easy at times, but if there’s one thing my early life taught me, it’s to never give up. I’ll be honest: There wasn’t always enough money growing up, so I started working at a young age. Paper routes, Arbys, construction — and after high school I enlisted in the National Guard to help pay for college. Then, right as I was preparing to graduate, 9/11 happened. It was a defining moment. Like so many others, I felt the call to serve my country. I went active duty and became an Army Ranger, putting my life on the line to defend our nation’s values. = I came back stateside after serving three tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. I wanted to continue giving back, so I offered pro-bono legal services to help veterans transition to civilian life. Then Donald Trump became president. Extremists began threatening to strip away our health care. Immigrants were being demonized. Even our democracy felt fragile. I felt that call to step up and serve again, so after long discussions, I decided to run for office. Our country needed a new generation of leadership — one that seeks to unite us, not divide. Coloradans agreed. In 2018, I became the first Democrat to ever represent Colorado’s 6th congressional district. It’s been full speed ahead ever since. = That’s my story. I’ve always gone where the fight is — no matter the odds. Progress doesn’t come easy. Progress happens because people put in the work and fight for it. Especially in moments like these. Democracy is under attack. The right to vote is under assault. A fundamental freedom was recently yanked away for half of Americans. And the extremism still isn’t over. I refuse to let them win without a fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for reading this email, — Jason | Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us? | = Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. name: Team Cori
subject: They’re using tragedy as an opportunity to attack Black leaders.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
This is racism and misogyny: plain and simple.
#
Over the last few days, Missouri lawmakers have leveraged tragedy as a coordinated attack on Black leaders in St. Louis in order to bolster their resumes for future political campaigns.
**It’s disgusting. It’s racist. It’s misogynistic. And it willfully ignores real, pressing issues across the state.**
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230307.q2qcWe&refcode=em20230307-2292&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2292%2E1082990%2ETRZdcR)
In case you missed it: Missouri’s Attorney General, Andrew Bailey, is specifically targeting St. Louis Circuit Attorney, Kim Gardner — but notably not the Cedar County prosecutor who refused to pursue real accountability for the years-long abuse of young boys at the Agape Boarding School.
**Where is his concern for the reprehensible abuse of prosecutorial power in this case?**
These aren’t the only attacks — they’re using legislation as well.
On Monday, HB 301 passed in the Missouri House. This legislation directly disenfranchises St. Louis voters by removing power from our democratically-elected prosecutor.
SB78 cuts the community out of having input and control over our own local police department, making St. Louis one of the only major cities in the entire country without authority over its own police force. This gives power to the same anti-public safety Republicans who just voted to allow children to carry AR-15s.
Jefferson City politicians who are pushing HB 301 and SB 78 want to control St. Louis so badly, yet they have issues in their own districts they should be tackling. They should be focused on these priorities instead if they really want to make a difference in our communities:
* Rural hospitals are closing, forcing their constituents to travel hundreds of miles to seek healthcare.
* Missouri has some of the nation’s loosest gun laws, causing some of the highest rates of gun violence in this country.
* Existing policies punish unhoused populations while under-resourcing affordable housing efforts.

Instead of tackling real issues, people like Attorney General Bailey are fabricating problems to “solve.”
Their willful ignorance doesn’t stop there. Economically speaking, Kansas City and St. Louis bring in the majority of the revenue for the state, yet that fact gets pushed aside by state lawmakers who make it harder to do what we need to do to meet the full needs of our residents.
**As Cori said, we must reject these disingenuous, misogynistic, and racist calls by the Attorney General and state officials who seek to circumvent the will of the people of St. Louis who have entrusted democratically elected local officials to oversee and implement public safety.**
**[Team Cori will continue to expose these attacks for exactly what they are — but we need your help. You can help us amplify her message with a contribution today.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230307.q2qcWe&refcode=em20230307-2292&t=2&akid=2292%2E1082990%2ETRZdcR)**
**[Chip in $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230307.q2qcWe&refcode=em20230307-2292&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2292%2E1082990%2ETRZdcR)**
Together we can call out this injustice and take on whatever comes next.
Thank you,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230307?refcode=em20230307-2292-footer&t=22&refcode2=2292_1082990_TRZdcR&akid=2292%2E1082990%2ETRZdcR) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Who Will the Dems Support for President?
body:
Hiding from China No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qkyhyjl-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkyhyjl-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Tuesday! Join us tonight on CaucusRoom Live for[Ask CEO Matt Anything](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkyhyjl-trhiujldw-y/)!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkyhyjl-trhiujldw-j/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkyhyjl-trhiujldw-t/) **Subpoenas for Disinformation Board** Rep. Jim Jordan has **[subpoenaed the former head of the Disinformation](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkyhyjl-trhiujldw-i/) _Board_** to learn her official actions and duties for the DHS. **Obama for President?** While Democratic leaders are publicly rallying behind Joe Biden to be their guy for the 2024 election, behind the scenes, **[Democrats are still mulling the best leader for the party who could win a stand-off against Trump in 2024](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkyhyjl-trhiujldw-d/)**. **Stonewall Pete** The Department of Transportation**[has turned down repeated requests for information related to the taxpayer costs of 23 flights](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkyhyjl-trhiujldw-h/) **Secretary Pete Buttigieg and his advisers took on government private jets since taking office. **Hiding From China** [**Taiwan 's president, Tsai Ing-wen, will meet with House Speaker Kevin McCarthy in the U.S.** ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkyhyjl-trhiujldw-k/) instead of overseas to avoid provoking China. **What Time is it on The Moon** With more lunar missions than ever on the horizon**,[the European Space Agency wants to give the moon its own time zone](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkyhyjl-trhiujldw-u/).** **Bernie Doesn't Know**
## Avowed socialist Bernie Sanders [**struggled to explain the difference between "equity" and "equality"** ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkyhyjl-trhiujldw-o/)on HBO's "Real Time with Bill Maher", in an exchange that has gone viral online.

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkyhyjl-trhiujldw-x/)!**
* He's a **[dummy](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkyhyjl-trhiujldw-m/)**.
